title: WALLBUDDY — HIRING: Senior AI Video Creator (Amazon + Etsy Product Videos)
description:
Full-Time — $180–$225/week — Work With a Global Wall Art Brand

Mandatory Test Project Required to Apply



About Wallbuddy



We are a fast-growing global wall art brand selling thousands of premium posters and framed prints across Amazon US/CA/UK/DE/FR and Etsy.



We are now launching a major push into AI-powered product video creation and are looking for a world-class video creator, not just a basic editor.



This job is for someone who can make videos that are:



???? visually stunning



???? emotionally engaging



???? high-converting



???? beautifully paced



???? brand-driven



If your work instantly makes people say “WOW… who made that?!” — you are the talent we want.



???? Role Overview



You will be the lead video creator for Wallbuddy’s Amazon and Etsy catalog.



You will create:



Product videos for all new Amazon FBA & FBM listings



Lifestyle + mockup showcase videos



A+ content videos



Ad creatives for Sponsored Brands Video



TikTok/UCG-style videos for ads



Storytelling videos for our hero products



Using tools like:

Google Veo / Veo 3

NanaBanana

Runway

Kaiber

Pika

CapCut / Premiere

After Effects

Clean, Flowframes, Topaz, etc.



If you are already an expert with Veo3, NanaBanana, Runway, etc., you move to the top of the list.



???? Your Core Responsibilities

Create high-impact product videos (4–12 seconds) for Amazon listings

Create longer ad videos for Sponsored Brands and Sponsored Display

Build a consistent Wallbuddy video style

Work alongside our PPC manager to create conversion-focused creatives

Generate new visual concepts using AI video tools

Improve and iterate on high-selling product videos



???? Requirements

Demonstrated excellence in video creation (portfolio required)

Strong experience with AI video tools

Ability to produce clean, modern, cinematic edits

High-level visual taste — we will reject generic editors

Fast turnaround times

Fluent English communication

Full-time availability (40 hours/week)



???? MANDATORY APPLICATION TEST (no exceptions)

To apply, you must complete this test project:

Create a 6–12 second product video for this Wallbuddy listing:



???? Choose ANY product from our Amazon store:


 



Your test video should:



Use any images from the listing (you may download the mockups directly)

Showcase the artwork + lifestyle feel

Include minimal text (optional)

Have clean pacing & smooth transitions

Show your creativity and talent



Upload your test video via YouTube (unlisted), Google Drive, or Loom.



? Applications without a custom video will be automatically rejected.

This is how we filter for elite talent.



???? How to Apply

Send us a message with:

Link to your custom test video (required)

Portfolio of past work

List of AI video tools you use

Short explanation of your workflow + editing strengths

Your expected weekly salary (within $180–$225/week)



Subject line:

WALLBUDDY VIDEO CREATOR — Your Name — TEST VIDEO INCLUDED



Only applicants who submit the required test video will be reviewed.



???? Salary

$180–$225 USD per week, depending on skill level.

Paid weekly. Full-time.

This is a long-term career role with a fast-growing global brand.

title: Senior SEO and Marketing Specialist
description:
Job Summary

We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Senior SEO Specialist to join our dynamic CNSS marketing team. The ideal candidate will have a deep understanding of search engine optimization strategies and techniques, with a proven track record of driving organic traffic and improving search rankings. This role requires a blend of technical expertise and creative problem-solving skills to enhance our online presence and maximize the effectiveness of our digital marketing efforts.



TRACKING SOFTWARE IS MANDATORY FOR ALL OUR EMPLOYEES. WE USE TERAMIND



Duties

Minimum 3 years of experience

Develop and implement comprehensive SEO strategies to increase organic search visibility and traffic.

Conduct keyword research to identify high-value opportunities for content creation and optimization.

Analyze website performance using tools such as Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Tag Manager to monitor traffic trends and user behavior.

Optimize website content, structure, and on-page elements (including HTML, CSS, and JavaScript) for improved search engine rankings.

Collaborate with the content team to create SEO-friendly content that aligns with business goals and audience needs.

Perform technical SEO audits to identify issues affecting site performance and provide actionable recommendations for improvement.

Stay updated on industry trends, algorithm changes, and best practices in SEO to ensure ongoing optimization efforts are effective.

Manage E-commerce SEO initiatives to enhance product visibility and drive sales through organic search channels.

Utilize Adobe tools for design enhancements that support SEO strategies.

Build high-quality backlinks and improve domain authority

Plan, launch, and manage Google Ads campaigns

Requirements



Proven experience as an SEO Specialist or similar role, with a strong portfolio demonstrating successful projects.

Proficiency in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and WordPress; familiarity with website development is a plus.

Experience with E-commerce platforms and optimizing product listings for search engines.

In-depth knowledge of Google Analytics, Google Search Console, Google Tag Manager, and other relevant SEO tools.

Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret data and make data-driven decisions.

Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal, with the ability to collaborate effectively across teams.

A proactive approach to problem-solving with attention to detail.

If you are passionate about SEO and eager to make a significant impact in a fast-paced environment, we encourage you to apply for this exciting opportunity.

title: Virtual Assistant- Medical Billing Specialist
description:
(Remote)

About Us:

St. Louis Dermatology & Cosmetic Surgery is a dermatology practice dedicated to providing high-quality care to our patients. We believe in fostering a collaborative and inclusive work environment where every tea
mber can thrive.



We are currently seeking a highly motivated and detail-oriented Medical Billing Specialist to join our growing team. We are a fun company that treats our team with respect, and we truly value you as a member of our team. This role is critical to our success—your input, contributions, and attention to detail are extremely important.



We are looking for someone who is positive, reliable, highly organized, and holds themselves to a high standard. We value tea
mbers who are open to feedback and committed to long-term growth with our organization.



Job Description:

We are seeking a detail-oriented Medical Billing Specialist to support our revenue cycle operations. This role is responsible for ensuring accurate claim submission, timely follow-up on unpaid claims, and effective communication with insurance companies and patients regarding billing matters.



Key Responsibilities:



Billing & Claims Management

Submit accurate and timely insurance claims 

Review claims for errors and correct rejections/denials

Post payments (insurance and patient) accurately in the system

Monitor accounts receivable and follow up on outstanding balances

Work denied or underpaid claims to ensure maximum reimbursement



Insurance & Patient Billing

Verify insurance benefits and coverage when needed

Understand and apply payer guidelines, coding basics, and billing rules

Respond to patient billing inquiries professionally and clearly

Assist patients with understanding balances, deductibles, and copays



Accounts Receivable Follow-Up

Proactively follow up with insurance companies on unpaid claims

Identify trends in denials and communicate with management

Escalate complex billing issues as needed



Administrative & Documentation

Document all billing activities accurately in the system (EMA or other EMR)

Maintain organized records of claims, communications, and resolutions

Collaborate with front desk, clinical team, and leadership to resolve issues



Customer Service

Maintain a professional, solutions-focused approach in all communications

Handle patient billing concerns with empathy and clarity

Uphold the practice’s high standards for patient experience



Qualifications:

Prior experience in medical billing or revenue cycle management

Strong understanding of insurance claims, EOBs, and denial management

Excellent attention to detail and accuracy

Strong written and verbal communication skills

Reliable internet and quiet working environment



Core Competencies:

Attention to detail and accuracy

Problem-solving and critical thinking

Time management and organization

Professionalism and discretion

Ability to work independently

Accountability and follow-through



Work Schedule:

Remote position based in the Philippines or similar time zone availability

Must be available during US Eastern Time business hours

Flexible schedule based on workload and practice needs



Performance Expectations:

Timely claim submission and low error rate

Reduction in outstanding accounts receivable

Effective resolution of denied claims

Accurate payment posting

Positive patient and internal team feedback



Compensation:

$7.25 USD/hour, with annual promotions and raises

Monthly reimbursement for OFS and SSS self-payments



What We Offer:

Collaborative and supportive work environment

Opportunity for long-term growth within the company

The chance to be part of a growing practice making a positive impact



How to Apply:

Please send me a message with your resume attached so I know you are serious about this role, and I will send you a link to complete a formal application and questionnaire.



Please note: It is best to have already completed your English proficiency assessment on OnlineJobs.ph (via 
) and 
, as these will be required during the application process.



Qualified candidates will move through additional screening questions, assessments, and a final interview.

title: Project Lead (Hybrid – South Metro Manila preferred)
description:
We're Hiring: Project Lead (Hybrid – South Metro Manila preferred)



About Digibeacon

Digibeacon is the premier ClickUp Solutions Partner in the Philippines. We're looking for a Project Lead who can take charge of IT and technology projects from start to finish — someone hands-on, client-focused, and skilled at building project management dashboards, reports, and productivity systems using ClickUp and related platforms.

This is a delivery-driven role. You'll be actively involved in scoping, configuration, client sessions, and full implementation.

Role Overview

As Project Lead, you'll collaborate directly with clients and internal teams to deliver each project according to requirements. You'll handle hands-on configuration, workflow setup, dashboard creation, and client onboarding to ensure every system we build is fully adopted and understood. PMP certification is a plus but not required.



What You'll Do

1. Lead and execute multiple IT and tech projects at the same time.

2. Engage directly with clients to gather requirements and turn them into workflows, dashboards, process diagrams, and reports.

3. Architect and configure project management spaces, structures, and tools — primarily ClickUp.

4. Build dashboards, reporting views, automations, custom fields, forms, and project templates.

5. Facilitate client workshops, onboarding sessions, and training.

6. Prepare project documentation, including process maps, SOPs, and implementation guides.

7. Coordinate timelines, deliverables, and cross-team dependencies.

8. Troubleshoot configuration issues and recommend practical solutions.

9. Monitor project progress and ensure milestones are met on time.

10. Deliver organized, scalable, and strategic setups that drive client satisfaction.



Qualifications

1. 2–4 years of experience managing or implementing IT, SaaS, or tech-related projects.

2. Strong hands-on experience with project management tools (ClickUp and similar platforms).

3. Ability to design workflows, dashboards, automations, and structured project setups.

4. Excellent communication skills and confidence in client-facing sessions.

5. Strong organizational and problem-solving skills, paired with a can-do attitude.

6. Experience in process mapping, diagramming, or SOP creation is a strong advantage.

7. PMP or similar certifications are a plus but not required.

8. Preferably based in or near the South of Metro Manila (this is a hybrid role).



What You'll Need

1. A desktop or laptop with specs capable of running multiple applications for virtual meetings and presentations.

2. A quiet home workspace.

3. A noise-cancelling headset.

4. A stable, high-speed internet connection atleast 50Mbps speed.



Why Join Digibeacon?

1. Competitive compensation package.

2. Hybrid work setup with a collaborative, high-performance team.

3. Direct exposure to executives and the chance to contribute to operational strategy and growth.

4. Hands-on experience with modern SaaS tools, data-driven reporting, and digital transformation projects.



How to Apply

1. Complete the sign-up form to process your application.

2. Only applicants who complete the form will be reviewed.

3. Apply here: 
.com/digibeaconcareers

title: Senior Operations & Case Manager (Psychiatry / Legal – Guardianship Practice)
description:
We are seeking a highly organized, detail-oriented operations professional to support a psychiatrist-led guardianship evaluation practice based in Florida.



This role is critical in coordinating communication between attorneys, petitioners, patients, and a licensed physician, while ensuring all cases are handled efficiently, professionally, and with strict confidentiality.



This is not a basic virtual assistant role.

You will act as the central operations coordinator and will be responsible for maintaining structure, accuracy, and accountability across all active cases.



---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



What You Will Own (End-to-End)

Manage high-volume inbox (attorneys, courts, petitioners)

Create and maintain a secure, centralized case tracking system

Coordinate psychiatric evaluations (physician + patient coordination)

title: Customer Success Manager (Hybrid – South Metro Manila preferred)
description:
We're Hiring: Customer Success Manager (Hybrid – South Metro Manila preferred)



About Digibeacon

Digibeacon is the premier ClickUp Solutions Partner in the Philippines. We're looking for a Customer Success Manager who can build strong client relationships, drive product adoption, and grow accounts through renewals and upselling of professional services. This is a client-facing role for someone who thrives on helping businesses succeed through ClickUp and other productivity platforms.

You'll be the trusted partner our clients rely on — guiding them from onboarding through long-term success while identifying opportunities to expand the value we deliver.



Role Overview

As Customer Success Manager, you'll work directly with clients and internal teams to ensure smooth onboarding, strong adoption, and lasting satisfaction. Beyond client support, you'll own renewals and lead upselling efforts for our professional services — helping clients unlock more value from their ClickUp setup while contributing to revenue growth. Experience in SaaS or project management tools is a strong advantage.



What You'll Do

1. Manage a portfolio of clients and serve as their main point of contact post-implementation.

2. Own the renewal process and ensure strong client retention.

3. Identify, pitch, and close upsell opportunities for professional services and add-on engagements.

4. Lead onboarding, training, and enablement sessions to ensure successful adoption.

5. Build strong, trust-based relationships with clients and understand their business goals.

6. Conduct regular check-ins, business reviews, and strategy sessions.

7. Monitor client health, usage, and satisfaction to proactively address concerns.

8. Collaborate with internal teams to resolve issues and deliver solutions quickly.

9. Gather client feedback and share insights with the team to improve our offerings.

10. Prepare client-facing documentation, proposals, and best-practice resources.

11. Drive client retention, satisfaction, and long-term account growth.



Qualifications

1. 2–4 years of experience in customer success, account management, or client services — preferably in SaaS or tech.

2. Proven track record of handling renewals and upselling professional services or solutions.

3. Hands-on experience with ClickUp or similar project management and productivity tools.

4. Excellent communication, presentation, and relationship-building skills.

5. Strong problem-solving ability and a proactive, customer-first mindset.

6. Ability to manage multiple clients and priorities at once.

7. Experience facilitating training sessions, workshops, or business reviews is a strong advantage.

8. Organized, detail-oriented, and confident in client-facing conversations.

9. Preferably based in or near the South of Metro Manila (this is a hybrid role).



What You'll Need

1. A desktop or laptop with specs capable of running multiple applications for virtual meetings and presentations.

2. A quiet home workspace.

3. A noise-cancelling headset.

4. A stable, high-speed internet connection at least 50Mbps 



Why Join Digibeacon?

1. Competitive compensation package.

2. Hybrid work setup with a collaborative, high-performance team.

3. Direct exposure to executives and the chance to contribute to client strategy and revenue growth.

4. Hands-on experience with modern SaaS tools, data-driven reporting, and digital transformation initiatives.



How to Apply

1. Complete the sign-up form to process your application.

2. Only applicants who complete the form will be reviewed.

3. Apply here: 
.com/digibeaconcareers

title: Cultural Exhibits and Research Support
description:
Job Description



A U.S.-based nonprofit cultural organization expanding its cultural exhibits, workshops, and community education programming. We are seeking a dependable and proactive Cultural Exhibits and Program Outreach Support tea
mber to assist with research, outreach, coordination, and follow-up related to monthly exhibits, presenters, and educational events.



This role supports exhibit development and continuity and requires someone who can independently identify and engage potential participants with minimal pre-existing leads.



Responsibilities



• Research potential exhibit topics, presenters, workshop facilitators, and cultural contributors

• Identify individuals and organizations aligned with monthly exhibit themes using Google searches and other public sources

• Proactively reach out by phone and
 to secure speakers, instructors, and chefs

• Conduct consistent follow-up regarding participation, availability, and scheduling

• Track responses, commitments, and next steps for presenters and partners

• Assist with scheduling workshops, seminars, fitness sessions, and exhibit-related activities

• Maintain organized notes, contact lists, and exhibit timelines

• Collaborate with the social media manager to post surveys, interest forms, and public notices to attract participants

• Flag gaps, delays, or issues requiring attention and help source solutions



Hours and Availability



• Up to 6 hours per week (hard cap)

• Hours may not be exceeded without prior approval

• Must have at least 3–4 hours of overlap with U.S. Central Time on weekdays



Qualifications



• Strong research and organizational skills

• Clear and professional written and verbal communication

• Comfortable making outbound calls and initiating contact with new individuals

• Self-starter who can work independently with minimal direction

• Highly reliable and detail-oriented with strong follow-through

• Resourceful in identifying and securing participants



Additional Notes



This role supports cultural exhibit coordination, outreach, and research. Final decisions, approvals, and public-facing communications remain with leadership.

title: Video Editor (PHP 358/HR - USD $6/HR | PART Time)
description:
Hey!



We are looking for a Video Editor ROCKSTAR who will turn our long form content into high-performing short form clips and weekly YouTube videos.



We are a marketing and education company that works with English speakers and already have a team of high-performing individuals from the Philippines. Mastery of the English language is a requirement and will be tested prior to hiring.



BENEFITS INCLUDE:

- 100% remote

- Weekly pay

- USD $6 / Hour = 350 PHP / Hour

- Paid training

- No work during the weekends

- Opportunity to go from part time to full time

- We pay for the AI and creative tools you will use (Adobe, Descript, Opus Clip, Canva Pro)

- Grow with a team that values initiative, speed, and high standards



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Short form (main focus):

- Take long form content (webinars, trainings, YouTube videos, podcasts) and turn it into short form clips for Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn

- Add attention-grabbing hooks, captions, emojis, B-roll, overlays, and pattern interrupts

- Create short testimonial videos from coaching calls, client interviews, and other raw footage

- Organize and manage video assets so clips are easy to find and reuse



Long form & channel support:

- Edit 1 piece of long form content per week (highlight key 
nts, add B-roll, overlays, and graphics)

- Publish that long form video on YouTube (upload, title, description, tags, end screens, cards)

- Create and upload custom YouTube thumbnails that drive clicks

- Handle one-off editing requests as needed (simple promos, clips, intros/outros, etc.)

- Analyze performance of published videos in YouTube Studio (CTR, views, watch time, retention) and provide simple reports and recommendations



Collaboration & cadence:

- Meet once a week with the owner of the company for feedback, direction, and priorities

- Join 1 monthly content planning session with the team

- Use AI tools (that we pay for) to speed up editing, transcription, captioning, and repurposing while still polishing by hand



Expected volume (part-time ~20 hours per week):

- 20–30 finished short form clips per week (30–90 seconds each)

- 1 edited and published long form YouTube video per week

- Ongoing testimonial edits and one-off requests as needed



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:



Experience & portfolio:

- Proven experience editing short form content from long form videos

- Strong portfolio showing:

Before/after edits from long form to short form

YouTube videos you have edited and thumbnails you have designed

Short testimonial / social proof videos (a plus)



Tool competence (we provide licenses):

You will work daily inside:

- Adobe Premiere Pro (primary editor)

- Basic Adobe After Effects (simple animations, lower thirds, transitions)

- Descript (transcription, rough cuts, repurposing)

- Opus Clip (AI clipping & short-form ideas)

- Canva Pro (YouTube thumbnails & simple graphics)

- YouTube Studio (publishing & analytics)

- Google Drive, Google Docs/Sheets (file management, tracking)

- ClickUp (task management)

- Slack (communication)



You don’t need to be a master of every tool on day one, but you must already be strong in at least one pro editor (Premiere / Final Cut / DaVinci) and be able to learn the rest quickly.

Having experience with video editing is a requirement to be considered for this role.

We will ask you what your favorite dog breed is, answer chowchow in your application so we know you have read the full job posting.

We will start with relatively limited hours (around 20 hours per week to begin) with the opportunity for it to grow as our relationship develops.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Mastery of the English language (spoken and written)

- Strong project management skills and ability to hit volume targets consistently

- Comfortable reviewing analytics and making basic performance recommendations

- Quiet environment to work



TECH REQUIREMENTS (MINIMUM):

- Computer: Windows 10/11 PC or Mac (released within the last 4–5 years)

CPU: Intel i7 / Ryzen 7 / Apple M1 or better (or equivalent)

RAM: Minimum 16 GB (32 GB strongly preferred)

Storage: At least 512 GB SSD, with 150+ GB free for active projects

GPU: Dedicated graphics card with 4 GB VRAM or more (e.g., NVIDIA GTX 1660 / RTX series or equivalent). For Mac, M1/M2 with integrated GPU is fine.



- Software capability:

Must be able to run Adobe Premiere Pro / After Effects smoothly while having multiple Chrome tabs, cloud drives, and AI tools (Descript / Opus Clip / etc.) open.



-High Speed Internet: Stable enough for uploading/downloading large video files and live calls without interruption

Reliable backup option (mobile data or secondary ISP) is a plus



- Other:

Quality headphones and microphone for edit reviews and team calls

Quiet, dedicated workspace suitable for focused editing work



If your current setup struggles with Adobe Premiere or AI tools like Descript / Opus Clip, please upgrade first before applying. This role requires fast, reliable hardware to hit our weekly volume targets.



SCHEDULE:

You must be available to work 4 hours per day, following this schedule: 3 PM – 7 PM Philippines time.



You must APPLY with this link:

title: E-commerce Specialist (Catalog, Inventory, PPC & Compliance)
description:
About the Role



We are looking for a highly experienced Amazon Specialist who can manage both Seller Central and Vendor Central operations across multiple product categories, including industrial, lawn and garden, and regulated or restricted products, including adult-category items.



This is an end-to-end ownership role covering catalog, inventory, PPC, and compliance. You should be comfortable handling complex backend issues, navigating Amazon policies, and leveraging tools like Helium 10 and AI to improve performance and efficiency.

Seller Central and Vendor Central Management



Manage day-to-day operations across both Seller Central and Vendor Central

Handle Vendor processes such as POs, chargebacks, shortages, and disputes

Optimize workflows across both platforms



Catalog Management



Resolve listing issues including suppressed listings, variation errors, and stranded inventory

Handle flat files and backend troubleshooting

Ensure listings are optimized and compliant with Amazon policies



Inventory Management



Forecast demand and manage replenishment for both FBA and Vendor POs

Prevent stockouts and overstock situations

Monitor inventory health and reduce storage and aged inventory fees



Amazon PPC



Launch and optimize Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, and Sponsored Display campaigns

Improve TACOS, ACOS, and overall profitability

Scale high-performing campaigns and reduce wasted spend



Compliance and Restricted Products



Manage listings in regulated or restricted categories including adult industry products

Handle approvals, documentation, and policy requirements

Work with Amazon support to resolve compliance and listing issues



Account Health and Performance



Monitor account health and policy compliance

Troubleshoot and resolve account or listing issues

Provide performance reports with actionable insights



Requirements



Proven experience with both Seller Central and Vendor Central

Strong expertise in catalog troubleshooting including flat files, variations, and backend fixes

Strong experience in inventory planning including FBA and Vendor PO management

Strong Amazon PPC experience with optimization and scaling

Experience handling restricted, regulated, or adult-category products on Amazon

Strong understanding of Vendor Central processes including POs, chargebacks, and shortages

Must be highly proficient with Helium 10 for keyword research, listing optimization, and tracking

Must be comfortable using AI tools such as ChatGPT for efficiency, analysis, and content optimization

Strong analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills



Nice to Have



Experience with industrial or lawn and garden product categories

Experience scaling brands across both Seller and Vendor models

Experience building SOPs or improving workflows

Who is fond of using adult products for personal use to judge product launches efficiently

title: SEO Operations Specialist
description:
We are seeking an SEO Operations Specialist to support the SEO Manager and broader SEO team in the execution, monitoring, and optimization of ongoing SEO services. This role will ensure quality control, process consistency, reporting accuracy, and proactive client account management across SEO initiatives.



Key Responsibilities: 



1. Google Business Profile (GBP) management 

* Conduct monthly GBP optimization checks to ensure accuracy of information and confirm posts are publishing correctly 

* Perform daily GBP review audits 

* Monitor for suspended or flagged listings and escalate to SEO team with screenshots and detailed notes 



2. Website SEO Support 

* Assign/coordinate SEO-related website post-launch tasks 

* Conduct post-launch SEO quality assurance (QA) checks to ensure correct metadata transfer, redirects, indexing, etc. 

* Identify and close recurring SEO gaps during website launches 

* Coordinate with Web Development Coordinator on SEO-related website issues and support 



3. Technical SEO Support 

* Run Screaming Frog crawls for new sites 

* Conduct URL mapping for website builds and migrations 



4. Reporting & Data Support 

* Compile monthly SEO performance data (traffic, conversions, rankings) 

* Support the SEO team in preparing reporting deliverables 





5. Process Documentation & Optimization 

* Regularly audit and update project management templates and SOPs as processes evolve 

* Document new service workflows 



6. Blog optimization support 

* Support blog optimization efforts as needed to alleviate workload from SEO tea
mbers 





Key Qualifications: 



1. Must have foundational understanding of SEO principles including: 

* On-page optimization (meta titles/descriptions, headers, internal linking) 

* Google Business Profile optimization best practices 

* Technical SEO basics (redirects, indexing, crawlability) 

* Local SEO ranking factors 



2. Must be comfortable working inside SEO tools such as: 

* Google Analytics 

* Google Search Console 

* Screaming Frog 



3. Must have strong attention to detail 

4. Must be able to identify inconsistencies, errors, or performance issues and escalate clearly with proper documentation (screenshots, notes, summaries) 

5. Must be process-oriented and able to follow, improve, and document SOPs and workflows 

6. Must be an excellent communicator, particularly when coordinating with Web Development, Support, and the SEO team 

7. Must be comfortable working independently while maintaining deadlines and quality standards 

8. Must be proactive in identifying gaps in service delivery and recommending improvements

title: Experienced Appointment Setter (American Accent Required) | High Commission Potential
description:
We are a fast-growing local SEO company helping businesses rank in the top 3 of Google Maps (Local Map Pack) through our proven optimisation system. We’re now hiring an experienced US Appointment Setter to join our outreach team and help us continue scaling our client acquisition efforts.



You’ll be responsible for following up with inbound leads, qualifying prospects, and booking high-quality appointments into our calendar. This includes calling leads who have submitted enquiries, nurturing conversations, confirming booked appointments, and ensuring prospects show up prepared for their scheduled calls. You will also be responsible for accurately recording notes in our CRM systems and tracking activity across our internal workflows.



This is a results-driven role where your ability to communicate clearly with US-based prospects, maintain strong follow-up discipline, and consistently generate qualified appointments will directly increase your commission earnings.



We’re looking for someone who:



- Has 1+ years of hands-on experience in appointment setting or lead qualification (required)

- Has experience calling and communicating with US-based prospects

- Speaks fluent English with a strong American-style accent (mandatory requirement)

- Is highly confident on the phone and comfortable following structured scripts

- Can uncover prospect pain points and qualify leads effectively

- Can manage high call volumes while maintaining professionalism

- Is proactive, highly organised, and able to work independently

- Has strong attention to detail when updating CRM notes and call outcomes

- Is tech-savvy and comfortable learning new systems quickly

- Can follow structured workflows and continuously improve performance



Tools We Use:

- GoHighLevel (Primary CRM)

- Google Sheets

- Notion

- Slack

- Loom



Required Working Hours:

- US Hours (9:00am – 7:00pm Eastern Time)

- Monday to Friday



Compensation:

- $7.50 per hour (~$1,500/month base pay)

- Performance commissions based on per qualified show, weekly show rates, and monthly targets (if you're hitting KPI's $1,800 - $2,000+ is doable)



If interested in this role, please submit your application via our application form here:



If you don't submit a video recording of yourself your application will not be considered.

title: Logistics Supervisor
description:
We are hiring a Logistics Supervisor for our operations team—someone with 3+ years of logistics or fulfillment experience and prior team leadership responsibility, ideally in a client-facing or multi-brand environment working for US clients/businesses. You’ll report to the Director of Operations and manage a team of 3-5 who are responsible for wholesale order fulfillment and freight management across our client base. We operate in NY(EST) time-zone.



About Pale Blue Dot



Pale Blue Dot provides strategic operations and finance advisory services to consumer packaged goods (CPG) brands. Our services include financial planning and analysis, fundraising advisory, supply chain management, sales operations support, and long-term strategy development. Our clients are some of the most innovative and ambitious CPG brands across food, beverage, personal care, and pet products.



Key Responsibilities



- Manage daily workflows for the logistics team supporting multiple CPG clients

- Lead weekly 1:1s with client leads to review shipments, task progress, and issue resolution

- Oversee execution of order fulfillment and freight coordination via our Order Management System (OMS)

- Monitor team workload, support prioritization, and ensure timely completion of recurring tasks

- Ensure SOPs are maintained, updated, and consistently followed across clients

- Drive process improvements to increase efficiency, accuracy, and scalability

- Support new client onboarding, including SOP development and OMS setup

- Maintain direct ownership of select client accounts



About You



- 3+ years of experience in logistics, fulfillment, or supply chain roles (CPG strongly preferred) with US-based brands

- 2+ years of experience managing a team or direct reports

- Strong understanding of ERP, WMS, and 3PL operations

- Highly organized and able to manage multiple timelines and priorities

- Strong communicator who can lead internal check-ins and coordinate across functions

- Experience developing and maintaining SOPs or fulfillment playbooks

- Google Sheets/Excel proficiency; comfortable with collaborative task management tools

- Motivated by structure, accuracy, and continuous process improvement

title: Online Math/Science Teacher(Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

description:
MISSION

You don't generate leads.

You make sure no leads are lost and systems don't break.



Your work directly impacts:

Booking rate

Show rate

Sales team efficiency

Revenue consistency



THIS ROLE IS NOT

A VA role

A “task completion” role

A “wait for instructions” role



This is an operator role. You own systems and outcomes.



NO AGENCIES!



WHAT YOU’LL OWN

Revenue Systems (PRIMARY)

Lead flow: Typeform ? CRM ? Calendar ? Sales

Booking systems and conversion flows

Show-up systems (SMS,
, reminders)

CRM accuracy (Close, pipelines, tracking)

Speed-to-lead systems

No-show and follow-up automation



AI & Automations

Zapier / Make workflows

ManyChat / AI chat flows

ActiveCampaign /
 sequences

AI-powered messaging + follow-ups (GPT-4o/Claude API integrations, Relevance AI, Lindy)

Identifying and eliminating every manual, repetitive step in the operation



You think AI first, automation second, manual last.



Tracking & Attribution Integrity

UTM tracking from ad click ? booked call ? closed deal

Every dollar spent on ads accurately tracked to a closed deal in the CRM — no missing data

Dashboards and reports leadership can actually read and act on

Regular audits — flag gaps before they become bad decisions



Operations Systems (SECONDARY)

Payment workflows (Slack notifications, tracking)

Refund automations

Student onboarding flows

Internal alerts and workflows

Revenue systems always come first.



System Maintenance

Fix broken automations fast

Resolve internal system issues (CRM, tracking, flows)

Prevent recurring problems — don't just fix, make it impossible to break again

Don't just fix. Build systems so it doesn't break again.



WHO THIS ROLE IS FOR

You hate manual work. Every time you see a human doing a repetitive task, it should physically annoy you until you automate it.



You are also:

Want to transition full-time in-house (not another “agency” client)

Fast, resourceful, and proactive

Comfortable figuring things out without being told

Obsessed with fixing problems quickly

Detail-oriented and system-driven

Calm under pressure when things break

Able to manage multiple systems without confusion



You take ownership. You don't wait.



MUST-HAVE SKILLS

Zapier or Make (advanced, multi-step workflows, filters, formatters, error handling)

CRM experience (Close CRM preferred; GHL or HubSpot accepted)

ManyChat or chatbot automation

 automation (ActiveCampaign or similar)

Strong troubleshooting ability, you diagnose fast

English proficiency sufficient for async team communication



AI REQUIREMENTS (NON-NEGOTIABLE)

You actively use AI tools daily, not just ChatGPT for
s

Experience with AI agent builders: Relevance AI, Lindy, or custom GPT-4o/Claude API integrations

Strong prompt engineering: you build prompts that run in live workflows, not just chat

You integrate AI into automation to improve speed, reduce manual work, and improve messaging

YOU WILL BE DISQUALIFIED IF

You’re looking for work/life balance or need weekends off

You need step-by-step instructions

You wait on others instead of solving

You move slowly

You blame tools instead of fixing issues

You don’t use AI in your workflow



SUCCESS IN THIS ROLE LOOKS LIKE

First 30 Days

Full audit of all systems completed

Full audit of the company's online presence including website, google, GEO, review sites (Trust Pilot), etc. 

Major leaks identified and fixed(booking, tracking, automation)

2 workflows identified and automated with AI

Plan to improve company’s online presence presented



30–60 Days

All help desk issues resolved same-day (<24h)

2+ funnel metrics improved by 15-25%

2 additional workflows automated with AI



60–90 Days

Systems run without constant issues

<10% of repetitive tasks still being done manually across the company

Clear documentation (SOPs) for all major systems

Total of 5+ workflows automated with AI



COMPENSATION

Base + Bonus equating to $1,500 – $2,000/month (based on experience)

Performance bonuses tied to:

System reliability

Speed of execution

Funnel performance improvements



HOW TO APPLY

Click here to submit a short video covering:

Your name + location

A system or automation you built

A time you fixed something broken (fast)

How you use AI in your work

How you approach solving problems

title: Virtual Operations Assistant — Luxury Home Renovation Company (Tampa, FL USA)
description:
About V&C Cabinet Design Concept

V&C Cabinet Design Concept LLC is a luxury kitchen and bathroom renovation company based in Tampa Bay, Florida. We specialize in high-end European and modern Italian design for residential clients, with projects ranging from $25,000 to $200,000. We are a growing company moving from 2 to 5 projects per month and we need a sharp, organized, and proactive Virtual Assistant to run our operations so our CEO can focus on design and sales.

This is a long-term position for someone who wants to grow with a premium American company.



The Role

You will be the operational backbone of V&C. You will own our lead pipeline, coordinate active projects, manage our communications, and keep our systems running smoothly — every single day.

This is not a task-by-task assistant role. We need someone who builds structure independently, takes ownership without being told what to do, and delivers results.



Your Responsibilities

Lead Management & CRM



Respond to all incoming leads via
 within deadlines

Enter every lead in Zoho CRM the same day — name, source, budget, status, next action

Qualify leads: Hot / Warm / Cold

Follow up at Day +1 and Day +7 on all open leads

Book consultations and send confirmation to clients

Prepare a brief for Nathalie 1 hour before every consultation



Project Coordination



Track all active projects: materials, deliveries, subcontractor schedules

Follow up with suppliers to confirm delivery timelines

Flag any delay or issue to Nathalie the same day

Send project documents to subcontractors and track their sign-off



Finance & QuickBooks Online



Enter all transactions in QuickBooks with correct project tags

Track client deposits and flag any overdue payments

Prepare the weekly financial status report every Friday



Client & Supplier Communication



Manage the V&C
 inbox daily

Send professional responses to clients, suppliers, and subcontractors

Follow up on unsigned contracts via DocuSign



Social Media & Marketing



Publish 3 posts per week (Instagram,
, LinkedIn, Google Business)

Use photos and content provided by Nathalie — apply the V&C caption formula

Respond to comments and messages on social platforms



Reporting & KPIs



Send an end-of-day report before 5:00 PM EST — numbers only, no narrative

Prepare the weekly KPI dashboard every Friday

Submit the monthly performance report on the 1st of each month





Requirements — Non-Negotiable



Minimum 3 years experience as a Virtual Assistant or Operations Assistant

Excellent written English — you will communicate directly with American clients

Experience with Zoho CRM or similar CRM (HubSpot, Salesforce)

Experience with QuickBooks Online

Strong knowledge of Google Drive, Google Calendar, Gmail

Experience managing social media accounts for a business

Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace

Available Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 2:00 PM EST

Self-starter — you do not wait to be told what to do next





Nice to Have



Experience in construction, renovation, interior design, or real estate

Experience with DocuSign and Houzz Pro

Experience with Canva for social media content





Schedule & Compensation



Hours: 20–25 hours per week

Schedule: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM – 2:00 PM EST

Rate: $8–$12 USD per hour based on experience

Contract type: Independent Contractor

Start date: As soon as possible





Performance Bonus Program

We reward consistency and results. Here is what top performers earn on top of their hourly rate:

Monthly Performance Bonus — up to $100 USD/month

Earned when all 3 conditions are met every month:



Daily end-of-day report sent before 5:00 PM EST — every working day

Zero leads missed or entered late in Zoho CRM

Weekly Friday report submitted before the sync — every week



6-Month Retention Bonus — $200 USD

Paid automatically at the 6-month mark for performers who meet their KPIs consistently.

12-Month Loyalty Bonus — $300 USD

Paid at the 12-month mark. We invest in people who invest in us.

Total bonus potential: up to $1,700 USD in year one for a top performer.



What We Offer



Long-term stable position with a growing luxury brand

Clear systems, SOPs, and full training provided from Day 1

Direct communication with the CEO — no layers of management

Performance-based rate increase reviewed at 90 days

A role where your work has real and visible impact on company growth

Performance bonus program rewarding consistency and results





How to Apply

Please send your application with ALL of the following — incomplete applications will not be considered:



Your resume or CV

A short cover letter (5–8 sentences) explaining why you are the right person for this role

Your answer to this question: "A new lead comes in at 9:00 AM on a Monday. The client wants a full kitchen renovation with a budget of $45,000. Walk me through exactly what you do in the first 30 minutes."

List the CRM and accounting tools you have used with your level of experience for each one



We will respond to all complete applications within 48 hours.



Important — Please Read Before Applying

We are looking for someone serious about a long-term commitment. If you are currently managing 5 or more clients simultaneously, this is not the right fit. We need someone who treats V&C as a priority.

We are a well-established mental health clinic in Alaska urgently looking for one dedicated, experienced Virtual Assistant who is assertive, confident, and NOT afraid to answer the phone.

This is a FULL-TIME, SINGLE-JOB ONLY position. We have been scammed in the past by applicants who were handling multiple jobs and could not give full commitment. If you currently have other clients or jobs, please do not apply.

Work Schedule:?9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Alaska Time (AKDT / AKST) – You must be fully available and logged in during these exact hours.

How to Apply: Please send your complete application including:

Only serious applicants who meet ALL the requirements above will be considered. No multiple-job holders. No beginners.

title: B2B Appointment Setter
description:
We're hiring Appointment Setters (Remote | Commission-Based)

Our setters are earning $50-$100+/day. $2,000-$5,000/month. From home. Here's how.



We're an AI automation company. We help businesses automate their operations and stop losing money. The market is booming and we need people on the phones.



Your job is simple. Call business owners, start a conversation, and book a meeting. That's it. You don't sell. You don't close. You don't explain pricing. You book the meeting and get paid.

Every qualified meeting you book, you get paid. No cap. Book 2 a day, get paid. Book 5 a day, get paid more. There is no ceiling.

On top of that you earn a bonus commission on every deal that closes from your meeting. So when your meeting turns into a paying client, you get paid again. Passively.



What we give you:

Power auto dialer that dials for you. You just talk.

Fresh targeted leads daily. You never source your own.

Proven cold calling scripts that are already booking meetings.

Full training on the product and the market.

Weekly coaching and call reviews to make you better every week.



The growth path:

Month 1-3: Book meetings, learn the product, sharpen your skills.

Month 3-6: Increased pay per meeting based on performance.

Month 6+: Move into a closer role. Run demos. Close deals. Double your income.

This is not a dead-end role. Our closers started as setters. Prove yourself and the bigger opportunity is yours.



What we need from you:

Cold calling experience. Non-negotiable.

Available 8 AM - 3 PM EST.

Comfortable earning based on results not hours.

Hungry. Consistent. Coachable.



D
 with your name, experience, and a 60-second voice note pitching yourself like I'm a prospect. No voice note, no reply.

title: Video editor
description:
We’re looking for a skilled video editor to take long-form YouTube content (10–30 minutes) and turn it into high-retention episodes, then repurpose the best 
nts into YouTube Shorts (and optionally Reels/TikTok). You should be comfortable working with multi-camera footage, adding clear visuals (graphs/charts), and creating simple animations to enhance storytelling.

We are in the niche of healthy longevity. 



What you’ll be editing

Long-form YouTube videos: 10–30 minutes

Repurposed content: 3–10 Shorts per long-form video (varies by episode)



Responsibilities

Edit long-form videos with strong pacing, clarity, and retention-focused structure

Sync and cut multi-cam footage (multiple angles) with clean switching

Add graphs/charts, on-screen callouts, lower thirds, and visual emphasis

Create simple animations (pop-ins, motion text, transitions, highlights—not full cartoon animation)

Improve audio (basic cleanup, leveling) and ensure clean, polished delivery

Repurpose long-form content into Shorts:

Identify standout 
nts

Add captions/subtitles, hooks, punchy pacing, and framing for vertical

Export correctly for Shorts (9:16) and long-form (16:9)



Required Skills

Proven experience editing YouTube long-form content

Ability to create charts/graphs and integrate them cleanly into edits

Comfortable with multi-camera editing workflows

Basic motion graphics / simple animation experience

Strong storytelling instincts (pattern interrupts, pacing, emphasis, clarity)

Tools (any of these are fine)

Adobe Premiere Pro / After Effects or DaVinci Resolve (Fusion ok) or Final Cut Pro

Ability to deliver project files or organized exports when requested



Deliverables (per episode)

1 edited long-form video (16:9) with clean audio + light motion graphics

3–10 Shorts (9:16) with captions + hooks + fast pacing

Export files optimized for YouTube (and optional social variants if needed)



Nice-to-Haves

Thumbnail sense / basic thumbnail assistance

Strong caption styling for Shorts (karaoke-style, emphasis words, etc.)

Experience in our niche (tell us what niches you’ve edited for)

title: Experienced QuickBooks Bookkeeper Needed – Cleanup + Ongoing Support for Resort Business
description:
We are hiring an experienced QuickBooks Bookkeeper to help a busy resort business get caught up on overdue bookkeeping and build a stronger system going forward.

This role will begin at 40 hours per week to tackle the backlog. After catch-up, the position will likely reduce to 15–20 hours weekly, with the potential to become a long-term full-time role if it is the right fit.

We are looking for someone who:

Has strong hands-on experience with QuickBooks

Knows how to reconcile accounts properly

Is comfortable working through bookkeeping that is behind

Will ask questions instead of assuming

Understands that bookkeeping is not just categorizing transactions

Can communicate clearly when something does not add up

Your role will include:

Catching up overdue books

Reviewing and cleaning up transaction records

Reconciling bank and credit card accounts

Flagging missing details, inconsistencies, and problem areas

Helping us improve accuracy moving forward

What matters most:

We need someone who is curious, accurate, and communicative. If you tend to guess, rush through work, or avoid asking questions, this is not the job for you.

We want someone who will:

Notice issues

Ask for clarification

Reconcile thoroughly

Help us get the books truly cleaned up

Hours:

40 hours/week to start

15–20 hours/week once caught up

Potential to return to or remain at 40 hours/week long-term for the right person

If you have strong QuickBooks experience and take pride in accurate bookkeeping, apply and tell us about your experience with cleanup work and reconciliations.



To apply, please include the word “RECONCILE” in your application and briefly describe your QuickBooks experience, especially with catch-up bookkeeping and reconciliations.

title: Senior Shopify Developer (Vibe Coder)
description:
About the Role

We're looking for a talented and experienced Shopify developer who doesn't just build stores — they make them smarter. This is a part-time or project-based position (with strong potential to grow into a full-time role) for someone who knows Shopify inside and out and has hands-on experience working with AI tools, specifically Anthropic's Claude API.

The ideal candidate is what we'd call a "vibe coder" — someone who uses Claude as a core part of their development workflow. You think in prompts as much as you think in code. You leverage Claude to move fast, iterate intelligently, and solve problems that traditional development would take 10x longer to crack.

You'll work directly with our team to build AI-powered features into our Shopify storefront, develop custom themes, and create automations that save time and improve the customer experience. If you love solving real business problems with code and AI, this role was made for you.



What You'll Work On

AI-Powered Store Features — Integrate the Claude API into Shopify to power intelligent features such as product recommendation engines, AI-assisted customer support, dynamic content generation, and personalized shopping experiences.

Custom Theme Development — Build, customize, and maintain Shopify themes using Liquid, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. You'll take designs from concept to pixel-perfect implementation.

Automation & Workflows — Use the Claude API and Shopify's APIs to automate repetitive store operations, generate product descriptions, process data, and streamline back-office workflows.



Requirements

Shopify Skills

5+ years of Shopify development experience

Deep proficiency in Liquid templating, Shopify CLI, and theme architecture

Strong knowledge of Shopify's Storefront API, Admin API, and webhooks

Experience with Shopify app development (public or custom apps) is a plus

Comfortable working in Online Store 2.0 theme structure

AI & Claude API Skills

Hands-on experience using the Anthropic Claude API (claude-opus-4, claude-sonnet-4, or similar)

Ability to design and implement prompt workflows for real-world use cases

Understanding of how to safely and efficiently pass store data to LLM prompts

Familiarity with streaming responses, tool use, and multi-turn conversations via the Claude API

Experience integrating AI into e-commerce contexts is a strong plus

General Technical Skills

Proficient in JavaScript / Node.js (React or Remix experience is a bonus)

Comfortable with REST APIs and JSON

Familiar with version control (Git/GitHub)

Able to read and write clean, well-documented code



Nice to Have

Experience with other AI/LLM APIs (OpenAI, Gemini, etc.)

Background in e-commerce marketing or conversion rate optimization

Familiarity with Zapier, Make (Integromat), or similar automation platforms

Experience with metafields, metaobjects, and Shopify's new data model



What We're Looking For in You

You're a vibe coder — Claude is open in your browser while you work, not just as a reference tool, but as an active development partner

You use AI to move fast: prototyping, debugging, writing boilerplate, and pushing the boundaries of what's possible with Shopify

You're self-directed and communicate proactively — you don't wait to be told what to do

You deliver clean work on time and flag issues early

You're excited about AI and stay current with how it's evolving in the e-commerce space

You care about the end result, not just writing code



How to Apply

Please include the following in your proposal or application:

A brief intro — who you are and what kind of Shopify + AI work you've done

Portfolio or examples — links to Shopify stores you've built or contributed to, and any AI integration projects

Claude API experience — describe at least one specific use case where you've used the Claude API (or any LLM API) in a real project

Your availability — hours per week and time zone

Your rate — hourly or project-based

Applications without relevant experience or examples will not be considered.

title: Legal Assistant
description:
Kimbrough Legal, PLLC



We’re seeking a sharp legal assistant for our busy law firm who can help our attorneys and paralegals assist our clients. Please, include a copy of your resume in your application.



The Legal Assistant is the first person most prospective clients interact with when they contact our firm and someone who will make a great first impression and ensure our callers feel comfortable and heard. This position is responsible for tracking, taking notes, and analyzing where a person is in their life, where they want to get to, and whether our firm is the one who can help get them there. You will be working closely with other staff members. At times, you will also need to know how to figure things out on your own and be able to creatively problem-solve and come up with solutions.



Responsibilities:



• Build the initial client relationship and confidence in our firm with every prospective client interaction

• Answer calls and
s from prospective and existing clients

• Keep our calendars filled with prospective client meetings

• Listen to prospective clients’ issues and maintain confidentiality

• Keep updated records and detailed documentation of client interactions and concerns in a paperless database system

• Track data in spreadsheets and a database system and provide weekly reports on trends

• Onboard new clients

• Nurture existing relationships with clients and ensure we go above and beyond to provide a “WOW” experience

• Organize client’s files in MyCase and Dropbox

• Drafting pleadings

• Preparing discovery

• Filing documents with the court

• Communicating with clients

• Assist attorney, paralegal, and legal assistant with administrative tasks as needed



Education & Experience:



• Must be a Law graduate or any related courses.

• For Non-Law Graduates – Must have at least 2 years of experience working in a Law Firm.

• Customer service and/or sales experience

• Strong people skills

• Ability to work remotely from home (see remote requirements)

• Knowledge of computer technology and the Internet (MS Word and Excel)

Including the ability to learn new programs easily

• Multi-tasking skills and the ability to work well under pressure

• Attention to detail and accuracy

• Excellent telephone, communication, and active listening skills

• Reliability and dependability

• Ability to work in a fast-paced environment

• Ability to work in a confidential environment maintaining client confidentiality at all times

• Problem analysis and problem-solving

• Has a professional manner and high energy level, exhibits a positive attitude

• Good time management skills

• Self-motivated and disciplined

• Ability to follow directions and use initiative to complete tasks



How to Apply:

If this sounds like the perfect fit for you, we want to hear from you!

Submit your resume and a brief cover letter explaining why you’d be a great addition to our team.



Come grow with us and apply today!

 / Bento (brand pitching platforms)

title: WooCommerce Developer (Full-Time, Remote)
description:
# Job Posting: WooCommerce Developer (Full-Time, Remote)



---



## Job Title

**WooCommerce Developer — Full-Time Remote (Long-Term)**



---



## Salary

?50,000 – ?60,000/month (based on experience and skills)



---



## Job Description



We're looking for a **sharp, independent WooCommerce developer** to join our growing e-commerce brands full-time. This is not a one-time gig — we're building something long-term and need someone who thinks like a partner, not just a coder.



You'll be the go-to developer for our WooCommerce stores. That means you own the technical side: building, optimizing, troubleshooting, and improving. You'll work directly with the founder — who thinks in outcomes and visuals, not code. That means **clear communication is just as important as clean code.**



---



## What You'll Do



- Build and maintain WooCommerce stores from scratch (theme setup, plugin configuration, checkout optimization)

- Customize themes and page builders (Elementor, or similar) so the team can update content without developer help

- Integrate payment gateways, shipping plugins, and third-party tools (CRM,
 marketing, supplier APIs)

- Optimize site speed, mobile responsiveness, and SEO basics

- Troubleshoot and fix issues quickly — without being asked twice

- Proactively suggest improvements when you see something that could work better



---



## What We're Looking For



### Must-Have

- **3+ years of hands-on WooCommerce experience** (not just WordPress — we need WooCommerce depth)

- Strong knowledge of **PHP, HTML, CSS, JavaScript**

- Experience with **Elementor** or other page builders

- Experience setting up **payment gateways, shipping, and product variations**

- Fluent English — written and spoken

- Reliable internet and a proper work setup



### What Sets You Apart

- You **ask questions** when a brief is unclear instead of guessing

- You communicate with **screenshots, Loom videos, or staging links** — not just "it's done"

- You've built stores that are **live and generating revenue** (share links, we'll check them)

- You understand **site speed optimization** (you know what a 90+ PageSpeed score looks like)

- You've worked with **dropshipping setups** (supplier integrations, auto-fulfillment, inventory sync)

- You can explain technical decisions in **simple language** a non-developer understands



---



## How We Work



- **Communication:** Daily async updates. We use chat (Slack/WhatsApp) + weekly video calls

- **Tools:** Git for version control, staging environments before going live

- **Mindset:** We value initiative. If you see a problem, flag it. If you have a better idea, share it. "Yes sir" without thinking is not what we need.

- **Hours:** Full-time (40 hrs/week), flexible schedule with overlap in European timezone (CET) for calls



---



## To Apply — Read This Carefully



**Do NOT send a generic "I am a WordPress expert" message.** Applications that don't follow these steps will be ignored.



### Step 1: Subject Line

Use this exact subject line: **"WooCom Builder — [Your Name]"**



### Step 2: Portfolio

Share **3 live WooCommerce stores** you built or significantly contributed to. For each one, tell us:

- What was your role?

- What was the biggest technical challenge?

- What's the current PageSpeed score? (Google PageSpeed Insights — check it now)



### Step 3: Mini Test

Look at this scenario and tell us how you'd approach it:



> *"We're launching a new dropshipping store. The supplier provides a product feed via CSV that updates daily. We need products to auto-sync (price, stock, images) into WooCommerce without manual work. The store needs to look premium, load fast on mobile, and have a smooth checkout. What's your approach? What tools/plugins would you use? What questions would you ask before starting?"*



Write your answer in **max 200 words.** We're looking for clarity, not length.



### Step 4: Availability

- When can you start?

- What are your working hours?

- Do you have other ongoing clients? (Honesty is valued — we just need to know)



---



## Why This Role



- **Above-market salary** with room to grow as we scale

- **Long-term position** — not a revolving door of freelance gigs

- **Direct access to the founder** — no middle management, no bureaucracy

- **Real impact** — you're not maintaining someone else's mess, you're building from the ground up

- **Growth potential** — as we add more stores, your role (and compensation) grows with us



---



*We review applications within 5 business days. If we like what we see, we'll start with a small paid test project before committing to the full role.*

title: Ai Automation Expert
description:
No-Code Expert Needed: Build & Deploy 3-Channel Medical AI Suite (Voice, WhatsApp, Web)



Job Description:

We work for premium clinics looking for an elite No-Code Automation Specialist / Conversational AI Integrator for a focused, high-priority project.



We require a sophisticated, secure, and commercially compliant AI system deployed across three channels: Voice AI (Phone), WhatsApp, and an Interactive Web Bot.



The core requirement of this 'gig' is to build a high-converting system that handles all logistics, payments, and standard FAQs without ever attempting to provide medical advice.



Your Responsibilities for this Gig (The Scope):



3-Channel Setup: Build and configure a single, unified AI logic "brain" that engages patients seamlessly across Voice, WhatsApp, and Web.



Clinical FAQ & Website Training: Train the AI using our provided clinical FAQs, treatment guides, and website data.



Strict Clinical Safety Compliance: You must configure the AI (using system prompts and 
 logic) to answer administrative and treatment-related FAQs, but it must perfectly detect and escalate any medical or triage questions to our human staff. (Zero medical advice allowed).



Transaction Management (The Commercial Stack): Build secure, multi-outcome automations for:



Taking Deposits & Payments via Stripe.



Processing Automated Refunds based on our specific cancellation policy.



Handling Cancellations and complex rescheduling logic.



Multi-Platform Integration: Build error-free 
 scenarios that connect the AI channels (Voice, WhatsApp, Web) to our clinic software stack: Zenoti, Stripe, and Calendly / GoHighLevel. The end-state is a patient who can self-book and pay for an appointment via AI, which is instantly reflected in Zenoti.



Required No-Code Skills & Tools:

You must be an established expert (not a beginner) in the following or equivalent stacks:



Conversational AI: Vapi.ai / Bland.ai (for Voice), Retell AI, or similar.



Workflow Automation: 
 (formerly Integromat) is preferred over Zapier for this complexity. (Expert level with error-handling).



Messaging Platforms: ManyChat / WATI (for WhatsApp Business API).



Essential Clinic Stack: Must have direct experience integrating Zenoti, Stripe, Calendly / GoHighLevel.



Compensation & Timeline:



This is a fixed-price build project and will turn into a job for the right applicants.



We require a 30-working-day turnaround for the full build, rigorous testing, and final deployment.



How to Apply (Crucial – Applications will be deleted if this is missed):



To filter out generic applications, we will only consider candidates who reply with:



A link to a specific portfolio or video demo of a complex conversational AI automation you have personally built (this must involve a transaction/booking, not just basic chat).



The exact no-code tech stack you propose to use to meet these specific integration requirements.

title: AI Integrator (Training + Client Pairing Opportunity)
description:

AI Integraterz is a fast-growing company that helps businesses leverage artificial intelligence and automation to scale their operations.

????

title: Executive Assistant to CEO (Remote)
description:
I'm hiring an Executive Assistant. Here's the honest version of what that means.



I'm a CEO building a personal brand company — two revenue lines, a growing team, and a content machine that doesn't stop. I help accomplished professionals become known for their expertise through LinkedIn ghostwriting and a cohort-based personal branding program called Brick by Brick.



I'm also still the person who sometimes spends 45 minutes on a Tuesday doing things that have nothing to do with why I started this company. That ends now.



I need an EA who doesn't wait to be told what to do. Someone who sees what needs to happen, makes it happen, and checks it off before I even knew it was on my list. If you've worked with a founder before and loved being the person who holds it all together — this is for you.



What You'll Actually Own:



Inbox + Communications



Triage my inbox daily — flag what matters, draft routine responses, keep it moving. Draft first-response templates for common inquiries. Track active partnerships, vendor relationships, and follow-ups



Calendar + Scheduling



Own my calendar — schedule with intention, protect deep work blocks, no unnecessary meetings. Coordinate logistics around travel, events, and external meetings. Make sure I can actually unplug when I'm out and hit the ground running when I'm back



Administrative + Operations



Track invoices, contracts, and time-sensitive action items across both business lines. Send a daily morning priority brief — top 3-5 things that need my attention today. Handle the miscellaneous tasks that steal CEO hours: OOO setup, looping people in, chasing signatures, sending links. Build and maintain light tracking systems so nothing falls through the cracks





You're the Right Person If



? You've supported a founder or operator before and loved being the person in the background who makes everything run

? You move fast and communicate faster — you don't sit on things

? You're organized in a way that feels natural, not performative

? You notice what's about to fall through the cracks before it does

? You don't need hand-holding and don't ask permission for things within your lane

? You use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) as a natural part of how you work — not because you were told to, but because you're always looking for a smarter way to get things done



Bonus: you're experimenting with AI agents and automation — we reward people who bring better ways of doing things





You're Not the Right Fit If



X You need a detailed playbook to get started on anything

X You treat this as a 9-5 inbox check

X You've never worked in a fast-moving small company and you're not sure you want to





The Details



Remote, async-first

Full-time position

$1,500-2,000/month depending on experience

Tools we use: Slack, Gmail, Google Workspace, Kit (ConvertKit), Typeform, ClickUp, Fathom 





How to Apply

Don't just send your resume. Do this instead.

Submit the following assignments 



Include the following:



1. The Morning Brief

Based on what you know about this role and this company, write me a sample morning priority message. Pretend it's a Tuesday and you've already reviewed my calendar and inbox. Show me what I'd wake up to if you were my EA.



2. Your "Catch" Story

Tell me about a time you caught something falling through the cracks before it became a problem — what was it, what did you do?



3. Your AI Toolkit

List the AI tools you use regularly and give one specific example of how you've used AI to make your work faster or smarter.



4. Your Resume or LinkedIn

Applications that don't follow this format will not be reviewed. We're looking for people who read carefully, follow through, and can think on their feet — this is your first test.



One more thing before you apply:

We're receiving a high volume of applications. To make sure yours gets seen, record a 2-minute Loom (
 — free to use) and include the link in your
.

In the video:



Introduce yourself briefly — who you are, what you've done, where you are right now

Walk me through the morning brief you wrote — talk me through your thinking

Tell me one thing you'd want me to know about how you work that didn't come through in writing



Keep it to 2 minutes. Concise and clear beats long and thorough every time — that's also a preview of how this role works.

No Loom = application will not be reviewed.
