title: Customer Service Representative (CSR) – HVAC, Plumbing & Electrical Company
description:
We are seeking a highly organized, detail-oriented, and customer-focused Virtual Customer Service Representative (CSR) to join our fast-growing home services team. This role is responsible for delivering exceptional service to our customers while supporting daily operations for our HVAC, plumbing, and electrical divisions. The ideal candidate is tech-savvy, proactive, empathetic, and able to thrive in a fast-paced environment.



Key Responsibilities

1. Inbound Call Handling



-Answer incoming calls promptly and professionally while following guided call prompts in ServiceTitan.



-Greet customers with warmth, empathy, and professionalism.



-Use active listening to fully understand customer concerns and service requests.



-Ask qualifying questions regarding service type, urgency, location, and referral source.



-Confirm the customer’s issue falls within our service offerings and service area.



2. Service Qualification & Intake



-Collect and confirm essential customer details: name, address, phone,
, and preferred contact method.



-Identify the type of service needed (AC repair, plumbing leak, drain clog, electrical panel issue, etc.).



-Determine urgency level (emergency, routine, or maintenance).



-Check customer profiles for service history, membership status, warranty info, and important account notes.



-Verify whether the issue is related to a previous job or system we serviced.



3. Pricing & Service Information



-Provide preliminary estimates for common diagnostics and services (e.g., $99 diagnostic fee).



-Set expectations for the service visit, including technician process and upfront pricing after diagnosis.



-Inform customers about current promotions, rebates, memberships, and savings opportunities.



4. Scheduling & Dispatch Coordination



-Book appointments according to availability using ServiceTitan scheduling modules.



-Offer scheduling options based on the 3-day call board, same-day availability (if down), or estimate availability.



-Coordinate with dispatch for same-day bookings or priority situations.



-Communicate cancellation policies and provide accurate service expectations.



5. Outbound Calls & Follow-Up



-Return missed calls and respond to voi
s within 30 minutes (1 hour max).



-Confirm, reschedule, or follow up on upcoming appointments.



-Conduct outbound campaigns for:



-Tune-ups



-Plumbing inspections



-Electrical inspections



-Meet minimum outbound calling goals set by management.



-Contact customers on “hold” status and bring them back on the schedule.



-Create and verify outbound calling lists.



6. Home Depot Lead Management



-Accept and process incoming Home Depot leads inside ServiceTitan’s booking tab.



-Enter leads into tracking spreadsheets and create profiles ensuring the F-number and tags are accurate.



-Immediately call the lead—if no answer, leave voi
 and send a text.



-Update lead tracking sheets and the Home Depot Service Center with correct outcomes.



-Schedule jobs for customers who convert and ensure both systems are updated.



-Complete a structured follow-up process (Day 2, 4, 6, 7) before dismissing unresponsive leads.



-Record every contact attempt in both the tracker and Home Depot Service Center.



7. CRM & Documentation



-Log all customer interactions accurately in ServiceTitan and/or Slack.



-Maintain up-to-date records including service notes, history, equipment, and contact information.



-Tag opportunities, flag priority issues, and escalate leads for management review.



8. Customer Issue Resolution



-Address customer concerns, service delays, or complaints with empathy and professionalism.



-Document issues and updates in Slack and ServiceTitan.



-Escalate concerns when needed to managers or service leadership.



-Track ongoing issues and provide customers with timely follow-ups.



9. Internal Communication



-Communicate job updates, cancellations, urgent customer needs, or scheduling issues to dispatch and office staff in Slack.



-Participate in morning huddles or team briefings when required.



-Share technical issues, customer feedback, or system concerns promptly with management.



10. General Administrative Support



-Assist with
ing invoices, estimates, receipts, or documentation to customers.



-Monitor and respond to support inbox inquiries (Yelp, Thumbtack, Chiirp, Contractor Commerce, FPL, BBB, Brita Pro, and others) within 30 minutes–1 hour.



-Support marketing campaigns by completing outbound call lists or follow-up tasks.



-Assist in managing customer reviews (Google,
, etc.) and reputation initiatives.



11. End-of-Day Wrap-Up



-Review daily call logs and ensure all documentation is complete and accurate.



-Flag unresolved issues or follow-ups for next-day attention.



-Communicate urgent matters to the on-call or after-hours team.



12. Data Entry & System Updates (ServiceTitan)



-Add and update customer equipment details (brand, model, serial number, age).



-Apply appropriate job, customer, and location tags throughout the CRM.



-Ensure all data is accurate, consistent, and properly categorized.



Qualifications



-Previous experience in customer service, HVAC/plumbing/electrical scheduling, or call center preferred.



-Strong communication and active listening skills.



-Ability to remain calm and empathetic in high-volume or emergency situations.



-Proficiency with CRM software (ServiceTitan preferred but not required).



-Strong multitasking and organizational abilities.



-Reliable internet connection, quiet workspace, and ability to work remote full-time.



-Detail-oriented and comfortable following structured workflows and call scripts.



To get started with our interview process please follow the link below!

, explaining your relevant experience. If you don't follow the above 3-step instructions in how to apply, your application will not be reviewed.

title: Lead Generation/Social Media Video Editor VA
description:
***Lead generation experience required (cold outreach via Linkedin, cold
, etc.)



***Social media management experience required (don't apply if you don't have)



***Video editing experience (for social media) required (don't apply if you don't have)

title: Video & Graphic Editor
description:
# Job Posting: Video & Graphic Editor — Meta Ads (Full-Time, Remote)



---



## Job Title

**Video & Graphic Editor — Meta Ads Creative (Full-Time Remote, Long-Term)**



---



## Salary

?50,000 – ?52,000/month (~$900 USD, based on experience and output quality)



---



## Job Description



We run multiple e-commerce brands and we need one thing from you: **ads that stop the scroll and make people buy.**



You'll be our full-time creative weapon — producing high-volume Meta ad creatives daily. Static images, carousels, short-form video ads, UGC-style edits, and rapid-fire variations for split testing. We move fast, test constantly, and scale what works.



This is NOT a "make it pretty" role. This is a **performance creative** role. Every asset you create has one job: convert. You'll work directly with the founder — briefs come as voice notes, competitor screenshots, or "make something like this but better." You turn rough ideas into scroll-stopping creatives without hand-holding.



---



## What You'll Do



**Daily creative production:**

- Create static ad images (single image + carousel) optimized for Meta Ads — product-focused, lifestyle, before/after, offer-based, comparison, listicle-style

- Edit short-form video ads (15-60 sec) — hook-driven, fast-paced, built for Reels/Stories

- Produce UGC-style edits — take raw footage or clips and turn them into native-feeling content with text overlays, captions, trending audio, and sharp pacing

- Build ad variations at scale using Canva Bulk Create — swap hooks, CTAs, backgrounds, product images across templates



**Creative strategy support:**

- Study the Meta Ad Library and competitor ads daily — know what's working right now

- Suggest new angles, hooks, and formats based on trends you spot

- Resize and adapt creatives for all Meta placements (Feed, Stories, Reels, right column)

- Maintain brand consistency across creatives per store

- Organize and name asset files properly so nothing gets lost



---



## What We're Looking For



### Must-Have

- **2+ years creating ad content specifically for Meta/Facebook/Instagram Ads** — not just social media posts, actual paid ad creatives

- **Expert-level Canva** — including Bulk Create for mass ad variations. You can build from scratch, not just swap template text

- **Expert-level CapCut** — smooth cuts, transitions, text animations, sound sync, auto-captions, trending formats

- **Understanding of direct response advertising** — you know the difference between "nice design" and "ad that sells." Hooks, visual hierarchy, CTAs, urgency triggers, social proof placement

- Able to produce **10-15+ creatives per day** (mix of static, carousel, and video) once fully onboarded

- Fluent English — you'll write and place ad copy, headlines, and CTAs on creatives

- Reliable internet and a proper work setup



### What Sets You Apart

- You use **Canva Bulk Create + CSV data** to produce 50-100 ad variations from one base template in under an hour

- You actively **study the Meta Ad Library** — you can name 3 ad trends that are working right now

- You can take **one product and create 5+ completely different ad angles** without being told each one (feature focus, problem/solution, social proof, lifestyle, comparison, unboxing)

- You've worked with **e-commerce / dropshipping brands** and understand that aesthetic — clean, premium, conversion-focused

- You understand **Meta ad placements** and how aspect ratios, safe zones, and text limits affect performance

- You have a **swipe file** of your own work — ads you created that actually ran and performed

- You suggest ideas proactively: "Hey, I saw this format trending on TikTok, should I test it as an ad?"



---



## Tools We Use



- **Canva** (Pro) — primary design tool, including Bulk Create for variations

- **CapCut** — video editing, auto-captions, transitions

- **Meta Ad Library** — competitor research and trend spotting

- **Google Drive / Dropbox** — asset organization

- **Slack or WhatsApp** — daily communication



If you also know Photoshop, Premiere Pro, or After Effects — great, but not required. Speed and output quality in Canva + CapCut is what matters.



---



## How We Work



- **Communication:** Daily async updates via chat. Weekly creative review call (video).

- **Briefs:** Sometimes detailed, sometimes a voice note + reference link + "make it better." You need to run with both.

- **Volume:** We test aggressively. Some days you'll produce 5 polished creatives. Other days you'll crank out 50 variations of a winning template. Both matter.

- **Feedback:** Direct and fast. No ego. If a creative doesn't convert, we learn and iterate — not argue.

- **Hours:** Full-time (40 hrs/week), flexible schedule with some CET overlap for calls.



---



## To Apply — Read This Carefully



**Generic "I am a graphic designer" applications will be deleted.** Follow these steps exactly:



### Step 1: Subject Line

Use this exact subject line: **"Meta Ads Creative — [Your Name]"**



### Step 2: Portfolio (REQUIRED)

Share **6 ad creatives you've made** that ran on Meta. Must include:

- At least 2 static images or carousels

- At least 2 video ads (share links to Google Drive, YouTube, or Vimeo)

- At least 1 set of bulk variations (3+ versions of the same template with different hooks/visuals)

- For each: What was the product? Who was the audience? Did it perform?



**No portfolio from real campaigns?** Then create samples right now:

? Go to AliExpress, pick any product under $30

? Create: 1 static ad, 1 carousel (3 slides), and 1 video ad (15-20 sec)

? Show us you can sell, not just design



### Step 3: Speed & Strategy Test

Read this scenario and answer:



> *"We just got a new product in — a portable mini projector, target audience: men 20-35 who love movies and gadgets. We already have 5 product photos and one 30-second raw unboxing clip. The boss wants 3 completely different ad angles ready by end of day, plus 20 Bulk Create variations of the best one for A/B testing. Walk us through: What 3 angles do you choose and why? How do you set up the Bulk Create variations — what variables do you change?"*



Answer in **max 200 words.** We're testing how you think, not how much you write.



### Step 4: Availability

- When can you start?

- Do you have other ongoing clients? (Be honest — we just need to plan)

- What's your realistic daily output? (Don't exaggerate. We'll find out in week 1.)



---



## Why This Role



- **Above-market salary** with room to grow as we scale more stores

- **Long-term position** — no more chasing freelance gigs

- **Creative ownership** — we give direction, you own the execution

- **Performance bonuses** — when your ads crush, you'll know about it

- **Direct founder access** — no middle management, no 14-day approval chains

- **Growth** — more brands launching = more creative challenges = bigger role



---



*We review applications within 5 business days. Strong applicants get a paid test assignment (2-3 hours of work) before we commit to full-time.*

title: HR Generalist
description:
Note: APPLICATIONS WITHOUT CV ATTACHED WILL NOT BE ENTERTAINED



Join Our Remote Accounting Team!

We are a fast-growing, boutique outsourced accounting firm supporting high-growth e-commerce and service-based businesses. We’ve been behind the scenes helping some of the most exciting DTC brands scale with confidence through expert bookkeeping, financial systems, and strategic insights.



We are a remote-first company with a collaborative, client-first culture — and we’re looking for exceptional talent to grow with us.



About the Role

We are looking for a hands-on HR Generalist who thrives in a startup environment and is excited to help build the HR function from the ground up. This role goes beyond day-to-day HR support — you will play a key role in setting up foundational HR processes, shaping people practices, and supporting the growth of our teams as the company scales.



As a young and fast-growing company, growth opportunities are significant. You will have the chance to help build teams, influence culture, and design systems that will evolve alongside the business. While the team currently operates in a distributed setup, the role is designed to support both remote and future on-site tea
mbers.



You will work closely with the HR and Talent Acquisition Manager and the COO to establish strong HR frameworks, ensure compliance, and deliver a positive tea
mber experience across the U.S. and the Philippines.



Your Responsibilities

** Recruitment & Talent Acquisition

- Manage full-cycle recruitment especially for finance and accounting roles, including Bookkeepers, Senior Bookkeepers, Accountants, and related positions.

- Source, screen, and interview candidates across the U.S. and the Philippines.

- Partner with hiring managers to clarify role needs and support workforce planning as teams grow.

- Build and continuously improve recruitment processes suitable for a startup environment.

- Coordinate interviews, reference checks, and offer processes.

- Maintain the applicant tracking system and ensure a smooth, professional candidate experience.



**HR Setup, Processes & Administration

- Help build and formalize HR processes, policies, and documentation from the ground up.

- Manage onboarding and offboarding processes, ensuring accuracy, compliance, and a strong first and last experience for tea
mbers.

- Maintain and update HR records, templates, and internal guidelines as the company scales.

- Handle HR-related requests, documentation, and internal communications.



**Tea
mber Relations & Benefits Management

- Serve as the primary point of contact for tea
mber questions, concerns, and support.

- Administer benefits programs, including paid time off, leave requests, and other people-related benefits.

- Support a positive, respectful, and compliant work environment for both remote and on-site tea
mbers.



**Performance, Growth & Talent Development

- Coordinate performance review cycles and support the rollout of feedback and development frameworks.

- Partner with leaders to provide guidance on coaching, performance conversations, and growth planning.

- Support career development and internal mobility initiatives as teams expand.



**Process Improvement & HR Partnership

- Identify opportunities to streamline, automate, and improve HR workflows.

- Support HR system implementation and enhancements.

- Act as a strategic HR partner to leadership, offering people insights and recommendations as the organization grows.



Your Skills & Qualifications

- 3+ years of experience as an HR Generalist or in a similar HR role.

- Proven experience managing both contractor and employee relationships, particularly within the U.S.

- Hands-on experience in full-cycle recruitment across the U.S. and the Philippines.

- Proven success in recruiting for finance and accounting roles.

- Solid understanding of U.S. labor laws and HR compliance, including contractor-based models.

- Comfortable working in a startup or fast-growth environment where processes are being built and refined.

- Strong communication, problem-solving, and stakeholder management skills.

- Ability to manage multiple priorities in a dynamic and evolving environment.



What’s in it for You?

- 100% Remote Work – Support teams from anywhere in the Philippines

- Career Growth – Be part of a growing company with opportunities to help build teams and advance your HR career

- Competitive Pay – $8/hour + benefits as an independent contractor

- Paid Time Off – 7 days of PTO per year + paid holidays (100% extra pay if worked)

- Medical Aid Bonus – Monthly medical stipend

- Supportive Culture – Work closely with leaders in a collaborative, growth-oriented environment



If you’re excited about building, scaling, and shaping HR in a startup setting, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Amazon Brand Manager
description:
We’re looking for a performance-driven Amazon Brand Manager to own and grow our presence across multiple Amazon storefronts. If you thrive in fast-paced e-commerce environments, know Amazon inside and out, and can juggle strategy, execution, and analysis across several brands simultaneously, this role is for you.



Responsibilities:



Multistorefront Management: Own and scale 5+ Amazon storefronts, ensuring consistent brand voice, high-quality visuals, and fully optimized listings.

Launch & Promo Strategy: Plan and execute product launches, promotions, and seasonal campaigns to maximize visibility and sales.

Performance Monitoring: Track storefront KPIs (sales, traffic, conversion, advertising ROI), customer feedback, and competitor moves—turn insights into actionable strategies.

Cross-Functional Collaboration: Coordinate with creative, PPC, inventory, and logistics teams to align messaging, stock, and advertising.

Compliance & Trends: Stay up-to-date with Amazon algorithm updates, policies, and marketplace trends to maintain optimal visibility and compliance.

Listing Optimization: Implement Amazon SEO best practices—optimize titles, bullets, descriptions, keywords, and A+ content.

UX & Conversion: Lead storefront UX improvements, A/B tests, and creative updates to boost conversion and engagement.

Reporting: Produce regular dashboards and reports summarizing performance and recommending next steps for growth.



Requirements:



Proven experience managing 5+ Amazon storefronts simultaneously.

3+ years in Amazon brand management, e-commerce, or digital marketing.

Deep knowledge of Amazon Seller Central, Brand Registry, A+ / Premium A+ content, and Amazon SEO.

Analytical mindset with demonstrated success in improving sales, conversion rates, and advertising ROI.

Comfortable using keyword research and listing-optimization tools; adept at data interpretation and strategic planning.

Strong project-management, communication, and cross-functional collaboration skills.

Highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive in problem-solving.

Experience with Helium 10, Jungle Scout, DataHawk, or similar analytics suites is a plus.

Familiarity with Amazon DSP or external traffic/acquisition strategies is a plus.

Graphic-design chops or oversight experience for creative production is a plus.

Knowledge of international Amazon marketplaces (UK, EU, CA, etc.) is a plus.

title: Amazon Catalog Manager
description:
Job Summary:



We’re seeking an experienced Amazon Catalog Manager to own end-to-end listing health and performance for a large SKU portfolio. You’ll manage backend attributes and compliance, optimize front-end content, and analyze key metrics to improve rankings, conversion, and revenue. Ideal for a data-driven operator with deep Seller Central expertise and a track record scaling large catalogs.



Responsibilities:



Catalog Management



Maintain and optimize 500+ SKUs in Seller Central, ensuring accurate categories, browse nodes, variations, and buy box–relevant settings.



Execute monthly content audits (titles, bullets, images, A+), fix suppressions/stranded inventory, and uphold Amazon TOS and compliance.



Manage backend attributes (search terms, item type keywords, intended use, target audience) and ensure listing data integrity.



Sales & Ranking Optimization



Track keyword rankings, CVR, pricing, and subcategory BSR; set weekly sales targets and target BSR per ASIN.



Identify underperforming listings and implement remediation plans (content, offers, pricing/ coupons, deals, images, reviews strategy inputs).



Monitor profitability and contribution margins, coordinating with ads and pricing to hit goals.



Insights & Collaboration



Partner with internal teams on pricing, promotions, creative, and inventory to align levers with growth targets.



Run competitive audits (content, offers, reviews, price moves) and recommend tactical adjustments.



Build and deliver actionable, data-driven performance reports and dashboards.



Requirements:



4+ years hands-on experience in Amazon Seller Central (required).



Proven success managing large catalogs (500+ SKUs) with complex variations.



Advanced Excel/Google Sheets (lookups, pivots, data cleaning).

title: TikTok Shop Content Strategist
description:
We are seeking a TikTok Shop Content Strategist who is deeply TikTok-native and experienced in both creative strategy and hands-on content creation. This role sits at the intersection of trend forecasting, performance analysis, and short-form video production, with a clear focus on driving engagement, discovery, and revenue through TikTok. You will own the TikTok content roadmap end-to-end, translating insights and trends into scroll-stopping, conversion-driven content while collaborating closely with Growth, Creative, Influencer, and Paid teams.



Responsibilities:



Own and execute the TikTok content strategy aligned with brand, growth, and product priorities

Build and manage weekly and monthly content calendars tied to launches, campaigns, and cultural 
nts

Translate performance insights into actionable creative briefs, concepts, and content themes

Identify whitespace opportunities across formats such as UGC-style content, trends, education, POVs, and product demos

Concept, script, film, and edit TikTok content optimized for platform-native performance

Create authentic, non-overproduced videos that resonate with TikTok audiences

Test multiple hooks, angles, and storytelling structures per concept and iterate rapidly based on results

Monitor TikTok trends, sounds, formats, and creator behavior, adapting them in a brand-safe and commercially relevant way

Track and analyze content performance including views, engagement, saves, CTR, and conversions

Partner with growth and paid teams to identify high-performing organic content for amplification

Collaborate with influencer, affiliate, creative, and brand teams to ensure consistency in voice, tone, and visual identity

Support product launches with high-impact TikTok storytelling



Requirements:



1–2+ years of experience creating and/or strategizing TikTok content for a brand or creator account

Deep understanding of TikTok trends, algorithms, and creator culture

Proven ability to produce content that drives both engagement and conversion

Strong storytelling instincts with a clear focus on hooks and retention

Comfortable being on camera and directing others on camera when needed

Highly organized, fast-moving, and comfortable testing, learning, and iterating quickly

Data-informed creative mindset with a focus on performance over vanity metrics

Use tools like Asana and Klaviyo to manage workflows, ensuring efficient campaign planning and execution.

nts, and evolving consumer behavior

title: Influencer Coordinator
description:
Job Summary:



We are seeking an Influencer Coordinator / Affiliate Outreach Coordinator to support and scale a fast-growing brand’s affiliate and creator partnerships. This role focuses on building strong relationships with creators, managing ongoing campaigns, tracking performance, and ensuring timely execution across deliverables, payments, and content documentation. You will work closely with cross-functional teams to help grow a high-performing influencer and affiliate ecosystem aligned with broader marketing and growth objectives.



Responsibilities:

- Manage and optimize relationships with existing and prospective affiliate and influencer partners

- Maintain regular communication with assigned creators to ensure deliverables are met, contracts are followed, and content quality standards are upheld

- Monitor trends and patterns across social and digital marketing efforts to identify new opportunities

- Coordinate with internal teams on payment terms, schedules, and delivery to ensure creators are paid accurately and on time

- Track and document all content produced by creators in designated folders and internal systems

- Log creator posts daily, including publish dates, performance metrics, and post links

- Contract a targeted number of creators on a weekly basis to meet campaign and business goals

- Source, evaluate, and engage new influencer and affiliate partners across platforms such as Instagram, TikTok, YouTube,
, and

- Negotiate and manage influencer partnerships while maintaining strong, ongoing relationships

- Review influencer content to ensure compliance with brand guidelines, tone, and messaging prior to posting

- Assist in creating influencer briefs, one-pagers, and campaign documentation aligned with marketing objectives

- Collaborate with design and content teams to support the creation of high-quality social and creator-led content



Requirements:

- Minimum of 3 years of experience in influencer coordination, affiliate outreach, or a related role

- Strong expertise across major social media platforms, particularly Instagram and TikTok

- Solid understanding of marketing metrics and the ability to analyze performance data and KPIs

- Experience with editorial and social media content development, with a foundational understanding of digital design and user experience principles

- Proven track record of successfully managing and scaling influencer or affiliate programs

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills with strong attention to detail

- Strong organizational and time management skills, with the ability to manage multiple creators and deadlines simultaneously

- Experience working in a high-growth or startup environment; SaaS or B2B experience is a strong plus

title: TikTok Shop Operations Manager
description:
Own end-to-end TikTok Shop operations for creator storefronts. You will set up shops, manage product catalogs, coordinate fulfillment, ensure policy compliance, and build scalable processes so creators can sell without friction. This role suits a highly organized, proactive operator who loves turning moving parts into clean, reliable systems.



Responsibilities:



Lead onboarding and configuration of new TikTok Shops for creators, ensuring fast, accurate setup.

Manage the full product listing lifecycle: uploads, keywords, creatives, pricing updates, inventory sync, and listing health.

Coordinate order flow between internal fulfillment systems and TikTok Shop; monitor SLAs, troubleshoot shipping and OMS issues, and resolve exceptions.

Maintain platform compliance by mastering TikTok Shop policies, guidelines, rating standards, and best practices.

Partner with Creator Management and DTC Strategy on promos and campaigns; provide operational readiness plans and post-mortems.

Build and maintain SOPs, checklists, and documentation; design scalable processes and automations to reduce errors and manual work.

Track operational KPIs such as listing accuracy, order cycle times, cancellation rate, on-time ship rate, and store rating; surface insights and corrective actions.



Requirements:



2+ years in e-commerce operations, marketplace management, or similar operational role. Direct TikTok Shop experience is a strong plus.

Proven organizational rigor and attention to detail across multi-step workflows and cross-team dependencies.

Strong problem solving skills with the ability to anticipate risks, triage issues, and drive resolutions quickly.

Process builder who documents clearly and improves systems over time.

Excellent written and verbal communication for internal teams and creator partners.

Comfortable working in a fast-paced startup environment with shifting priorities.



Bonus: experience with Shopify, Amazon Seller Central, OMS tools, and basic logistics and fulfillment concepts; familiarity with SQL or workflow automation is helpful.

title: Amazon Sourcing Specialist
description:
We’re seeking a detail-oriented and cost-conscious Purchasing/Sourcing Specialist to manage and optimize supplier relationships for our Amazon private-label and marketplace operations. You will lead supplier sourcing and negotiation, build landed cost models, and manage execution across samples, POs, freight, and replenishment. The ideal candidate combines sharp cost analysis with operational rigor — ensuring supply chain flows smoothly to FBA/3PL while hitting margin and targets.



Responsibilities:



Source, vet, and onboard manufacturers; run RFQs and negotiate pricing, MOQ, lead times, and payment terms

Build and maintain accurate landed cost models, factoring in duties, freight, and FBA fees to achieve margin goals

Coordinate product samples, specs, labeling, packaging, and regulatory compliance for Amazon and category standards

Create and track POs from production through delivery; ensure on-time, in-full (OTIF) performance from suppliers and carriers

Track vendor performance on cost, quality, lead time, and defect rate; lead corrective actions as needed

Conduct supplier audits and risk assessments, including geopolitical, compliance, and capacity considerations

Drive cost-saving initiatives through negotiation, packaging optimization, freight consolidation, or alternate sourcing

Support continuous improvement in sourcing processes and supplier performance



Requirements:



3+ years in purchasing, sourcing, or supply chain — ideally for Amazon FBA or e-commerce businesses

Proven experience negotiating with overseas factories, including MOQs, pricing, and payment terms

Solid understanding of landed cost analysis, profit margins, and Amazon’s fee structures

Working knowledge of quality control checkpoints and regulatory product compliance

Advanced Excel or Google Sheets skills; familiarity with PO systems

Strong organization, documentation, and multi-SKU project management ability

Proactive problem-solver who can work autonomously in a fast-paced, remote environment

Familiarity with sourcing and market tools like Helium 10 or Keepa is preferred

Experience with EDI, inventory planning, or demand forecasting is preferred

Category experience in regulated goods such as home improvement products or replacement parts is a plus

Exposure to total cost of ownership (TCO) analysis in sourcing decisions is a plus

title: Shopify Virtual Assistant / Store Manager – Ecommerce Product Pages (Full-Time | $500–$800/month)
description:
Shopify Virtual Assistant / Store Manager

This company runs a direct-to-consumer ecommerce brand that frequently launches and tests new products, and they are looking to bring on a Shopify Virtual Assistant to help manage the store and prepare product landing pages for launch.

Upload and organize product images and media

Generate simple AI images for product visuals or testimonials when needed

Review pages before launch to ensure everything works

Test buttons, links, checkout flow, and page functionality

Ensure pricing, variants, and inventory are correct

Maintain organization of products and templates inside Shopify

Tools You Will Be Using:

Shopify

Your internet speed

Your expected monthly salary

title: General Program Manager
description:
To be considered, you must fill out the application form below:


/ansiblehealth/4b610b44-ac59-43da-a514-ca69e2cce9c3



We are seeking a dynamic and talented General Program Manager to join our team. This role is perfect for a highly intelligent, motivated individual who is passionate about leveraging technology to make a difference in healthcare.



What is Ansible Health?

Ansible Health unites physicians, nurses, respiratory therapists, and tech experts from Columbia, Johns Hopkins, Google, Amazon, and other top institutions to revolutionize care for chronic disease patients. We combine elite clinical expertise with cutting-edge technology to deliver personalized, efficient care at scale. Our team's groundbreaking research, published in leading journals like Nature and PLOS, demonstrates our commitment to innovation. Backed by Bessemer, First Round Capital, AlleyCorp, Breyer Capital, and Inflect Capital, we're a Series A startup partnering with leading healthcare systems nationwide. Our mission is to genuinely improve patient outcomes, not just optimize metrics. If you're passionate about transforming healthcare through technology, join our diverse team in making a real impact.



The Job at a Glance

We're seeking a super smart, hungry, and resilient individual who is passionate about technology and healthcare to join us as a Program Manager. The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced, ambiguous environment and brings a strong organizational mindset to complex projects. You will be responsible for overseeing multiple complex programs across various departments to ensure successful delivery within scope, timeline, and budget. This role requires a self-motivated individual who can work independently and adapt to the dynamic nature of a growing startup in the healthcare technology space.



Responsibilities

- Impact the strategy and execution for AnsibleHealth's general operations, clinical operations, and technology initiatives, working closely with cross-functional teams.

- Work independently on projects through the full life cycle, overseeing clinical, operational, and technology aspects.

- Develop and manage program plans, schedules, budgets, and resource allocation to ensure successful delivery.

- Define program scope, objectives, and success criteria in collaboration with stakeholders and cross-functional teams.

- Establish program governance structures and processes, including risk management, issue management, and change management.

- Monitor and report on program progress, status, and performance to stakeholders and executive leadership.

- Ensure effective communication and alignment with stakeholders at all levels.

- Continuously identify and mitigate program risks and issues.

- Facilitate program-related meetings and workshops.

- Develop and maintain strong relationships with stakeholders to drive program success and identify growth opportunities.

- Bring a continuous improvement mindset to our operations to ensure we're ready to scale.

- Anticipate issues, propose solutions, manage dependencies, and identify areas for tool/process improvement.

- Collaborate with and steer internal teams, including Marketing, Engineering, Program Management, and Clinical Operations.



The ideal candidate should be comfortable to be in a constantly changing role with a high level of ambiguity - as we are a fast-moving startup operating in an ever-evolving environment. He or she should have excellent analytical, communication and management skills to succeed in this role.



Education

Bachelor's degree from one of the top five universities in the Philippines.



Required Qualifications and competencies

- Fresh graduates are welcome to apply; 0-5 years of relevant work experience is an advantage but not required.

- Demonstrated passion for technology and ability to quickly adapt to new digital tools and platforms.

- Exceptional organizational skills.

- Resilient mindset with the ability to bounce back from challenges and thrive in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.

- Keen interest in healthcare and improving patient outcomes; prior healthcare experience is a plus but not mandatory.

- High intellectual curiosity and a hunger for personal and professional development.

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to think critically and creatively.

- Proficiency in Google Workspace and willingness to learn new software tools as needed.

- Self-motivated with the ability to work independently and as part of a team.

- Adaptable and comfortable with ambiguity in a startup environment.

- Eagerness to take on leadership roles and initiative to drive projects forward.

- Ability to influence and collaborate with stakeholders at all levels.

- Strong attention to detail and commitment to delivering high-quality work.

- Enthusiasm for continuous learning and process improvement.



The ideal candidate is a highly intelligent, motivated individual who is passionate about leveraging technology to make a difference in healthcare. We're looking for someone who can bring fresh perspectives, adapt quickly to new challenges, and contribute to our innovative and fast-paced work environment.



Job Details

Full-time: Full-time: 40 hours a week

Benefits: Flexible PTO and HMO coverage

Location: Remote (offshore, and willing to work US hours - EST/EDT)

title: E-Commerce Sales & Operations Manager (Full-Time, Remote)
description:
E-Commerce Sales & Operations Manager — Home Improvement (Full-Time, Remote)



$4.00/hour + Commission (top performers earn $1,000+/month)



————————————————————————



ABOUT THE ROLE



We are The Trade Table (
), a growing home improvement e-commerce company selling premium brands like Victory, Sauna Life, Kamado Joe, Masterbuilt, ILVE, Capital, Sandia, and more. We are looking for a driven, sales-focused operations manager to help us scale to $30K–$50K+ in monthly revenue.



This is not a virtual assistant role. This is a sales-first operations role where your #1 job is converting leads into orders. We generate high-quality inbound leads through Google Ads — your job is to follow up, build relationships, and close deals on high-ticket home improvement products ($500–$6,000+ per order, $17K being the highest all time).



We have the leads. We have the brands. We have the ad engine. We need someone who can close.



————————————————————————



THIS ROLE IS FOR YOU IF:



- You have real e-commerce experience (Shopify preferred)

- You are confident on the phone and can close sales

- You thrive under pressure and want to earn based on performance

- You want to grow with a company, not just fill a seat



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF:



- You prefer quiet backend work over sales calls

- You need hand-holding and constant direction

- You shy away from targets and accountability

- You see this as "just a VA job"



————————————————————————



WHAT YOU'LL DO (In Priority Order)



Your #1 job is SALES. Everything else is secondary.



1. Order Processing (Highest Priority) — When an order comes in, you process it immediately. Submit to distributor, confirm with manufacturer, verify lead time, update customer. Orders are revenue. Nothing delays this.



2. Lead Follow-Up — Every open lead gets worked until they buy, decline, or are disqualified. Phone, text,
. Leads never sit idle. You follow up relentlessly.



3. Cold Outreach — Minimum 20 business-to-business calls per day. The goal is conversations that generate new sales opportunities.



4. Brand Outreach — Minimum 5 brand/dealer calls per day. We are constantly adding new brands to our catalog. Find the brand, call them, secure dealer access.



5. Secondary (only after sales work is done) — Shipping and order tracking, YouTube channel management, supplier research for future product lines, hiring support.



What you will NOT do: Product uploads, catalog management, collection work. We have a separate tea
mber for that.



————————————————————————



COMPENSATION



Base Pay: $4.00/hour USD



Commission (per order — this is where it gets exciting):



We want you to earn well. Our commission structure rewards closers, especially on big orders.



Each order gets a $100 Google Ads cost allocation. Your commission is based on Real Profit (Revenue minus Product Cost minus Shipping minus Fees minus $100). The more profitable the order, the more you earn ($100 minimum profit):



Under $100 Real Profit = $5 flat

$100 – $300 Real Profit = 7% of Real Profit

Over $300 Real Profit = 10% of Real Profit



Important: The company keeps a minimum of $100 profit on every order. If the commission would bring profit below $100, it gets capped. This only affects mid-range orders — on big orders you always get the full percentage.



Real examples from our order history:



$839 Range Hood — Real Profit $77 — Your Commission: $5.00

$1,424 Range Hood — Real Profit $129 — Your Commission: $9.01

$2,199 Range Hood — Real Profit $214 — Your Commission: $14.95

$2,919 Sauna Stove — Real Profit $235 — Your Commission: $16.46

$5,473 Sauna/Heater — Real Profit $742 — Your Commission: $74.22

$6,140 Hot Tub — Real Profit $867 — Your Commission: $86.72



One big order can pay $75–$90+ in commission. We get these opportunities regularly — we need someone who can close them.



Weekly Performance Bonus (weekly revenue target: $7,500):



Hit $7,500+ = +$10

Every $1,000 over $7,500 = +$10 more

$5,000 – $7,500 = No deduction

$2,500 – $5,000 = -$2.50

Under $2,500 = -$5.00



What your total monthly earnings look like:



$15,000 in monthly revenue = ~$835/month total pay

$20,000 in monthly revenue = ~$886/month total pay

$25,000 in monthly revenue = ~$928/month total pay

$30,000 in monthly revenue = ~$1,010/month total pay

$35,000 in monthly revenue = ~$1,052/month total pay

$50,000 in monthly revenue = ~$1,192/month total pay



At $30K+ in monthly revenue, you are earning $5.75+/hour effective rate with room to grow as the business scales. Our goal is $50K–$100K+/month, and your earnings grow with us.



————————————————————————



REQUIREMENTS



Must have:



- E-commerce experience (Shopify strongly preferred)

- Sales experience — you have closed deals before, not just processed orders

- Strong English communication (written and verbal — you will be on the phone with US customers)

- Reliable internet and quiet workspace for phone calls

- Available 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Central US Time (CST), Monday – Friday

- Self-motivated — you will be the only person on sales daily



Strongly preferred:



- Experience with home improvement, appliance, or high-ticket product sales

- Familiarity with Google Ads lead funnels

- Experience with CRM or lead tracking systems

- Comfortable making outbound cold calls



————————————————————————



ABOUT US



The Trade Table is a home improvement e-commerce company with dealer relationships with 100+ brands. We have been in business for 4 years, generated $334K+ in lifetime revenue, and are growing fast — revenue was up 65% year-to-date.



We run highly efficient Google Ads campaigns (25x+ ROAS) that generate a strong pipeline of inbound leads. Our biggest gap is converting those leads into closed orders. That is exactly what this role is built to solve.



We are a small, fast-moving team. You will work directly with the owner and have a real impact on the company's growth. This is not a corporate job — this is a ground-floor opportunity with a company that is scaling.



Our brands include: Victory, Sauna Life, Kamado Joe, Masterbuilt, ILVE, Capital, Sandia, HUUM, Hooga, Sports Attack, and many more.



————————————————————————



HOW TO APPLY



 
 with subject line "$100K/month Ecom Closer"



1. A brief message about your e-commerce and sales experience

2. Resume

3. Your IQ test result from: 
/take-the-test/ (free version is
ed to you)

4. voice recording



Bonus: If you have examples of sales results you've driven (revenue numbers, conversion rates, etc.), include them. We value results over resumes.



————————————————————————



INTERVIEW PROCESS



1. Application review

2. Initial interview (video call)

3. Final interview (video call)

4. Trial period (paid)



We move fast. If you're the right fit, you could be starting within days.

title: Patient Care Coordinator
description:
Job Title: Bookkeeper (US-Based Operations)



We are seeking a sharp, proactive, and highly experienced Bookkeeper to take full ownership of our financial records. This isn't just a data entry role; we need a "numbers architect" who catches what others miss, operates with total autonomy, and treats our ledger like a high-stakes puzzle they are determined to solve.



If you are a QuickBooks expert who thrives in a fast-paced environment and prides yourself on presenting insights before they are even requested, you’re exactly who we’re looking for.



Key Responsibilities



Full-Cycle Bookkeeping: Complete oversight of QuickBooks, including sophisticated AP/AR management, complex journal entries, and meticulous ledger maintenance.

Proactive Reporting: Prepare and present monthly P&L, Balance Sheets, and Cash Flow statements with executive-level clarity.

Process Optimization: Audit current workflows to identify "bottlenecks" and implement streamlined, automated processes for maximum efficiency.

Advanced Reconciliation: Handle high-volume bank and credit card reconciliations with 100?curacy, investigating and resolving discrepancies independently.

US Compliance: Manage financial records in accordance with US standards, ensuring readiness for year-end tax preparation and audits.

Platform Integration: Quickly master and integrate secondary platforms (payroll, time-tracking, or inventory) with QuickBooks.



What We’re Looking For:



Experience: Proven track record (3+ years preferred) as a Bookkeeper or Accountant, specifically working with US-based companies.

QuickBooks Expert: You are a power user. You know the shortcuts, the advanced reporting features, and how to troubleshoot the software's quirks.

High Autonomy: You don't need a task list. You see what needs to be done, you do it, and you report the results.

Analytical Mindset: You don’t just move numbers; you understand what they mean for the business and can explain "the why" to leadership.



Tech-Agile: You learn new software at lightning speed and are always looking for tools to make bookkeeping faster and more accurate.



To Qualify – Complete the Assessment and Application Form:

1. Assessment: 
/o/JB-E0PIHSF1P/landing?u=
. Application Form: wkf.ms/45nfpCJ



Note: Both the assessment and the application form must be completed to be considered for this role.

title: Patient Care Coordinator
description:
We are looking for a highly motivated and experienced Remote Patient Services Representative based in the Philippines. The ideal candidate will manage inbound and outbound calls, assist patients with scheduling appointments, address inquiries, and perform other related tasks to ensure a seamless patient experience.



Key Responsibilities:

• Answer incoming calls promptly and professionally.

• Schedule, reschedule, and confirm patient appointments using our electronic health record (EHR) system.

• Provide accurate information regarding services, insurance, and payment options.

• Address patient inquiries and concerns with empathy and efficiency.

• Maintain and update patient records with a high degree of accuracy.

• Collaborate with the optometry team to ensure optimal patient care.



Performance Metrics:

To ensure excellence in patient service, the following performance metrics will be used to evaluate success in this role:

• Average Handle Time (AHT): The average duration of a patient interaction, including talk time, hold time, and after-call work. Efficiently managing AHT ensures timely assistance to patients while maintaining service quality. ?

• Quality Score: Assessment of call quality based on adherence to protocols, accuracy of information provided, and overall patient interaction effectiveness. High-quality scores reflect a commitment to excellence in patient care.

• Patient Satisfaction Score: A measure of patient contentment with the service provided, often gathered through post-interaction surveys. High scores indicate successful patient engagement and issue resolution.

• Service Level: The percentage of calls answered within a specified timeframe, reflecting the ability to meet patient demand promptly. Maintaining a high service level ensures patient satisfaction and loyalty. ?

• Appointment Scheduling Rate: The efficiency and accuracy in scheduling patient appointments, ensuring optimal utilization of clinic time and resources.



Qualifications:

• Proven experience in a customer service role, preferably in a medical or optometry setting.

• Exceptional verbal and written English communication skills.

• Familiarity with EHR systems and medical scheduling software is a plus.

• Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

• Ability to work independently and manage time effectively.

• Stable internet connection and a quiet workspace conducive to professional phone conversations.



Work Schedule:

• Full-time position.

• Must be available to work U.S. business hours, including potential evening shifts to accommodate different time zones.



To Qualify, please complete the Assessment below:



1. Application form: wkf.ms/45nfpCJ

2. Complete this assessment: 
/link/index/JB-BYUGHNDRC?u=

title: Remote HOA Admin / Operations Specialist (CINC Systems)
description:
**About the Role**



We’re hiring a Remote HOA Admin / Operations Specialist with CINC Systems experience to support a consulting team that works with HOA management companies across the U.S.



This is not a traditional HOA admin role. You will not be managing homeowners or communities directly.

Instead, you’ll operate as a generalist supporting consultants, helping execute work inside CINC, manage recruiting workflows, and keep client projects organized behind the scenes.



If you’ve worked in HOA/property management and enjoy being the person who keeps everything running smoothly, this role is a strong fit.



**What You’ll Do**



1. CINC Systems Support (Primary Focus)

  - Work inside CINC Systems to support consulting projects

  - Enter, clean up, and maintain data (owners, associations, ledgers, notes)

  - Run reports, exports, and audits as requested

  - Complete follow-up work after client or training calls

  - Document workflows and updates as processes evolve

  - Support consultants in improving how clients use CINC



2. Recruiting & Pipeline Support

  - Manage candidates inside our ATS (update stages, track progress)

  - Prepare organized candidate packets (resumes, notes, video links)

  - Coordinate and manage video interview links and files

  - Keep pipelines accurate and up to date

  - Assist with post-project summaries and debrief notes



3. Client & Candidate Coordination (Back-End)

  - Draft and send
s, schedule calls, and manage follow-ups

  - Track deadlines and next steps across multiple projects

  - Ensure client-facing materials are clean, accurate, and professional

  - Keep internal systems organized so nothing falls through the cracks



4. Process Improvement & Documentation

  - Turn one-off fixes into repeatable systems

  - Document SOPs as workflows are refined

  - Participate in team debriefs and suggest improvements

  - Look for ways to improve speed, clarity, and consistency



**Requirements (Must-Have)**



  - Hands-on CINC Systems experience (required)

  - 1–2+ years in HOA, property management, or similar admin role

  - Strong attention to detail and organization

  - Excellent written English communication

  - Comfortable using multiple tools (ATS, Google Workspace, video tools, etc.)

  - Ability to manage multiple projects at once



**Nice to Have**

 

 - Experience supporting recruiting or hiring workflows

  - Experience working across multiple systems or tools

  - Familiarity with SOP creation or process documentation

  - Experience working with U.S.-based teams



**Who This Role is a Fit For**



You’ll do well here if you:

  - Take ownership and follow through without being chased

  - Stay organized across multiple moving pieces

  - Think in systems, not just tasks

  - Catch mistakes before they become problems

  - Want to grow into higher-level operations or consulting support



**This Role is NOT a Fit If**

   - You need constant direction to stay on task

   - You struggle to manage multiple priorities at once

   - You’re uncomfortable learning new systems quickly

   - You prefer purely repetitive work without problem-solving



**How to Apply (Required)**



Submit ALL of the following:

1. PDF Resume

 2. 2–3 minute video intro (Loom or Drive link)

 3. Answers to:

    - What specific tasks have you performed in CINC?

    - Describe a time you managed multiple projects at once



???? Include the word “Operator” in your subject line.

Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.

title: Real Estate ISA (Appointment Setter)
description:
This is not a typical VA role.



We’re a high-performance real estate team in California looking for a results-driven Inside Sales Agent (ISA) who knows how to turn conversations into appointments and opportunities into closings.



If you are competitive, disciplined, and love being on the phone, you will thrive here.



What Makes This Different



• You are not just calling, you are helping drive real estate deals

• You will work directly with a top-producing U.S. team

• Clear KPIs, coaching, and daily structure

• Opportunity to grow into leadership or higher-paid roles

• Bonuses tied directly to performance and appointments set



Your Role (Daily Impact)



• Call and follow up with buyer and seller leads (FSBO, expired, inbound, database)

• Convert conversations into qualified appointments

• Build rapport and uncover motivation, timeline, and urgency

• Track all activity inside CRM

• Follow up relentlessly until the deal is set



What Winning Looks Like



• 50–100 dials per day

• Consistent conversations and follow-up

• 2–5 qualified appointments per week

• Clean, organized CRM

• Strong communication and confidence on the phone



Who This Is For



You will do well if you:

• Love talking to people and building trust

• Are competitive and goal-driven

• Take ownership of your numbers

• Are consistent, disciplined, and coachable



Requirements



• Real estate or ISA experience required

• Strong English and natural phone presence

• CRM experience (Follow Up Boss is a plus)

• Reliable internet and quiet workspace



Compensation



• $5–$9/hour (based on experience)

• Performance bonuses based on appointments set

• Long-term growth opportunity

title: Executive Virtual Assistant to CEO
description:
Do you LOVE being the right hand Rock Star to Executives?



Are you SUPER ORGANIZED and Detail Oriented? 



Are you a LEADER in your own right and enjoy keeping your CEO on track?  



If so, CONGRATS you may have just found your DREAM CAREER POSITION…



The Executive Virtual Assistant to the CEO role is a key position for the Company. 



We’re not so much into temporary hookups, nor we’ll treat you as a remedy to this “gap” (position) that we’re trying to fill. We’re in this together for the long run! So if you’re someone looking for a LONG TERM CAREER, here’s the benefits you can earn: 



HMO

PTO

Internet allowance

Generator 

Performance Reviews

...and a LOT more!



If you don’t want a long-term career with growth potential **please do NOT apply**



This is a FULL TIME 40 hours/ week position.  



This is a long term career opportunity, with 13th month and benefits after 90 days of successful performance.  In exchange we require an exclusive commitment, no outside project, clients, freelancing or P/T jobs.  



Must be willing to work US hours.  You have at least 2 years experience working US hours.



We want a long-term relationship with benefits that not many can give - Performance reviews, HMO, PTO, Internet allowance, etc. If you don’t want this **please do NOT apply**





RESPONSIBILITIES FOR THIS JOB INCLUDE:



Calendar Management- create, manage and streamline CEO’s time and scheduling systems, prioritizing appointments and working directly with executives, customers, and other partners & tea
mbers as necessary

Support meeting preparation and follow up including allocating appropriate time slots, ensuring awareness/preparation, and following up on staff actions

Coordinates onsite & offsite meetings and logistics

Reviews and answers mail,
 and other inquiries and determines when executive action is required.

Interfaces with various levels of management and customers. Directs inquiries and problems to staff members for response and resolution as necessary.

Independently prepare/ edit PowerPoint presentations from rough drafts. Experience with sales presentations and webinars is a plus.

Recognizes and effectively handles confidential, proprietary information on a routine basis

Executive Assistant establishes, develops, maintains and updates the filing system for the executive team. Retrieves information from files when needed.

Work independently and within a team on ongoing projects.

Ability to multitask, and work effectively under pressure and deadlines

Executive Virtual Assistant to the CEO must have the ability to take initiative, organize and complete projects with minimal direction and micromanaging

EXPERT Project Management skills - prioritizing tasks & projects

Filing & organizing financial paperwork

Create, manage and streamline organizational systems

File & organize intellectual property, electronic files, syncing files, etc

Arrange domestic and international travel schedules, reservations and logistics that optimize executive's time. Upon completion of travel, prepare expense reports and ensure submission in a timely fashion.

Able to show up & execute, anticipate our needs – ability to think 10 steps ahead vs wait for things to be delegated to you

Support CEO in content creation, transcription services, creating & managing intellectual property, etc

Run weekly, monthly & quarterly reports for CEO to make strategic decisions

Personal tasks as assigned by the CEO



THE IDEAL CANDIDATE:



Excellent time management & project management skills

You have an Executive Assisting SYSTEM that you've developed over the years

Tech-savvy and proficient in all major platforms

You enjoy leading in a supportive, “behind the scenes” kind of way

Clear, focused, super organized, grounded, efficient, achieve outcomes FAST

Intuitive- ability to anticipate people’s needs before they ask

High level of professionalism, grace and business etiquette. Due to the confidential and sensitive nature of information, discretion is a MUST

Resourceful, proactive & takes initiative

Quick learner & flexibility- ability to engage in a number of detailed tasks at once and handle the demands from the CEO

Excellent communication skills - ability to work cohesively with different tea
mbers and personality types



Experience with technology & tools:

EXPERT Level with Project Management (ex: Asana, Trello, Monday, Clickup)

Time Doctor (or other time tracking systems)

EXPERT Level with Gdrive and Gsuite tools 

Slack 



NEXT STEPS:



If this position sounds like YOU and you’re jumping for JOY at this opportunity, follow these instructions very carefully:



Send your updated resume/CV and cover letter answering the following questions to 



What attracts YOU to this position & why are you the BEST candidate?

What QUALITIES make you a great Executive Virtual Assistant to the CEO?

How many YEARS of experience do you have as an Executive Assistant?

How many YEARS of experience do you have working US hours?  



**This is no time to be bashful… put your best foot forward and really sell yourself... if you don’t, no one else will ;)



Thanks and GOOD LUCK!

title: Customer Success Manager
description:
Are you passionate about mentoring and coaching students to achieve their cloud career goals?

Are you proactive, highly organized, and motivated to create new initiatives that drive student success?

Do you enjoy creating an exceptional student experience, helping learners stay on track, overcome challenges, and achieve their career milestones?



If so, you could be the perfect fit for our virtual team at Digital Cloud Training.



Please note: This role is fully remote and requires availability during US Eastern Time (ET) business hours.



About us:



Digital Cloud Training is a leading provider of cloud computing education, trusted by over 1,000,000 learners worldwide. Our Cloud Mastery Bootcamp delivers hands-on AWS training, expert-led live sessions, and personalized career coaching to help students gain job-ready skills and land their dream cloud roles.



Role Overview:



As our Customer Success Manager, you’ll drive student success in the Cloud Mastery Bootcamp by building strong relationships, creating an engaging learning environment, and keeping students motivated, accountable, and progressing toward their career goals.



Your mission is to deliver an exceptional onboarding experience, provide 1:1 mentorship and check-ins, lead group coaching sessions, and coordinate live events with guest speakers. 



You’ll also collect feedback, highlight student wins, collaborate with instructors, and work closely with our support team to resolve questions quickly and effectively.



This is a high-touch, student-facing role that calls for outstanding communication, excellent organizational skills, and a proactive, self-driven mindset to launch new initiatives that continually improve the student experience and help learners achieve their career goals.



Key Responsibilities:



• Onboarding & Guidance: Deliver an exceptional welcome experience that sets students up for success, set clear expectations, and provide ongoing guidance.

• Student Support & Communication: Act as the main point of contact, respond promptly to questions, resolve issues, and ensure students stay informed about training sessions, deadlines, and program updates.

• Mentorship & coaching: Provide 1:1 mentorship, regular accountability check-ins, and career guidance including resume reviews, LinkedIn optimization, and interview prep in collaboration with our professional career coach.

• Engagement and Motivation: Build an active and supportive learning community through Slack, lead group coaching sessions, and coordinate guest speaker events.

• Progress Monitoring: Track student progress, provide encouragement, and step in to help learners stay on track.

• Feedback and success stories: Collect and share feedback to improve the program and highlight student career wins through testimonials and success stories.

• Advocacy & Collaboration: Act as the voice of the customer within the company, advocating for their needs and working closely with other departments to deliver an exceptional learning experience.

• Retention & Upselling: Drive long-term student success by encouraging continued enrollment and identifying opportunities to recommend additional programs or resources that add value. 

• Reporting & innovation – Monitor and report on success metrics (e.g. satisfaction, progress, completion, renewals) and create new initiatives to continually improve outcomes.



Experience: 



• 3+ years in customer success, student engagement, career coaching or a related role, preferably in education or technology.

• Exceptional written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to coach, inspire and guide students toward their career goals. 

• Highly organized and proactive, able to manage multiple priorities, meet deadlines, and drive new initiatives.

• Proficient with digital tools like Slack, virtual meeting software and CRM systems (HubSpot experience strongly preferred).

• Collaborative team player, able to work effectively with instructors, guest speakers, and support team, with a proactive approach to problem-solving.

• Positive, student-focused mindset with the ability to foster engagement, motivation, and community.



Key traits and characteristics for a successful candidate:



Motivational: Positive attitude that motivates, inspires and engages students throughout their journey.

Student-Centric: Deeply committed to student success, with a proactive and supportive approach.

Growth Mindset: Eager to learn and grow in a dynamic environment.

Proactive Attitude: A "can do" spirit that tackles challenges head-on.

Resilience: Confidence to take initiative and humility to learn from setbacks.

Outcome-Oriented: Deliver results that others may consider impossible.

Problem Solver: Create clarity and direction out of ambiguity, with a proactive approach to problem-solving.

Collaborative: Build strong connections and trust across the organization to get things done.

Positive Energy: Brings enthusiasm to daily interactions and inspire others along the way.



To apply, follow the steps below:

1: Send your resume to 

2: Submit your one-way video interview here: 

3: If your application is successful, we’ll invite you to the next stage of the interview process
salary: Varies depending on experience and role

title: Real estate legal & admin assistant — curative title (distressed properties)
description:
We acquire deeply distressed properties in Texas — primarily from tax delinquent lists with deceased owners, missing heirs, and unresolved title defects. We cure those defects (affidavits of heirship, tax liens, probate issues, missing deeds) and resell. This is not typical real estate admin. Every file has a problem. Your job is to help solve them and push them toward closing.



What you'll actually do

1. File management & deal tracking - Maintain deal files from lead stage through closing. Know the status of every open file without being asked. Flag stalled files and recommend next action.

2. Closing package prep - Prepare promissory notes, purchase agreements, affidavits of heirship, special warranty deeds, and other curative documents using templates. Coordinate with title companies and attorneys on document requirements.

3. Title defect triage - Review title work, tax records, and ownership chains. Identify what's blocking a file — missing probate, unknown heirs, liens, judgments — and say clearly what needs to happen next. "We need a genealogist." "We need a demand letter." "This needs a curative attorney."

4. Heir & vendor coordination - Draft and send correspondence to heirs, title companies, attorneys, county offices, and third-party vendors. Follow up without being prompted.

5. Research support - Pull county records, tax history, deed chains, and obituary/heir data to support file analysis. Build organized summaries the team can act on.



You're the right person if

1. You have a background in legal support, paralegal work, or real estate document processing — especially anything touching title, probate, estates, or liens.

2. You understand what an affidavit of heirship is, why it matters, and when it's not enough on its own.

3. You are a self-starter who flags problems before being asked and proposes solutions rather than waiting for instructions.

4. You write clear, professional English —
s, letters, and document notes that don't need to be rewritten before sending.

5. You are comfortable working in Google Drive, CRM tools, and county appraisal/tax portals — and can figure out tools you haven't used before.

6. You keep meticulous records. Every action, every correspondence, every status update is logged.





Bonus (not required)

1. Familiarity with Texas property law, Texas county appraisal districts (CAD), or Texas title practices.

2. Experience with probate, estate administration, or heirship research.

3. Prior work at a title company, law firm, or real estate investment company.

4. Familiarity with AI tools for document research or drafting



To apply

Send a Loom video (5 minutes or less) covering the following:



1. Walk us through your background in legal or real estate document work — specifically what kinds of documents and files you've handled.



2. Describe a time you identified a problem in a file or process and took action to resolve it without being asked.



3. Tell us what you know about affidavits of heirship, title defects, or probate — even if it's basic. Honesty matters more than a perfect answer.



Applications without a Loom video will not be considered. Written cover letters will be skipped.

title: Part-Time PHP Developer (Wordpress & Laravel) With Flutter Experience (plus)
description:
Job Description:



We are a fast-growing digital agency based in the UK, looking for a skilled and detail-oriented WordPress Developer with strong PHP skills and experience in Laravel. This is a full-time remote position for someone who is proactive, reliable, and follows instructions carefully.



As our WordPress Developer, you will be responsible for building, customizing, and maintaining websites and web applications, ensuring high-quality output that meets client requirements.



Having skills and experience in Flutter (Dart) is a big plus! 





Key Responsibilities:



Develop, customize, and maintain WordPress websites using PHP



Work with Laravel on custom projects and web applications



Implement clean, efficient, and scalable code



Debug, test, and troubleshoot issues across different browsers and devices



Collaborate with our project managers and design team to deliver on time



Follow detailed briefs and instructions precisely to avoid rework and delays





Qualifications:



Solid experience with WordPress (themes, plugins, custom post types, hooks, etc.)



Strong proficiency in PHP (essential)



Experience in Laravel framework



Knowledge of MySQL, HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript/jQuery



Familiarity with Git version control is a plus



Proven skills and experience in Flutter (Dart) is a big plus



Keen attention to detail and ability to follow instructions thoroughly



Good communication skills and reliable internet connection



Ability to work independently and meet deadlines







Work Setup:



Part Time but a strong potential to be on Full Time



Remote work (Philippines-based applicants only)



Working hours: UK timezone overlap preferred (flexible for the right candidate)





Salary & Benefits:



Competitive salary (based on experience and skill level)



Opportunity for career growth and skill development



Stable, long-term role with a supportive team





How to Apply:



If you believe you are the right fit, please send us:





Your updated resume/CV



Portfolio of WordPress/Laravel projects you’ve worked on (links/screenshots)

title: Manager of Content and Marketing

This position is perfect for someone who can effectively manage systems, run marketing campaigns, produce high-quality content, and ensure operations stay organized and efficient. The ideal candidate is both strategic and execution-focused — able to plan initiatives while also bringing them to life.



You should have a strong understanding of what makes content successful, why it resonates, and how to scale it across multiple platforms while maintaining smooth backend operations.



This is a fast-paced role best suited for someone who thrives in a dynamic environment, is highly organized, and is comfortable navigating multiple tools and platforms.



Key Responsibilities



Marketing Campaign Management



Oversee and execute marketing campaigns across platforms such as Meta 
 & Instagram), Google, YouTube, and others



Develop, launch, and optimize paid advertising campaigns

Operations & Systems Management

Work closely with leadership and tea
mbers on marketing initiatives

Platforms

Excellent written and verbal communication skills

title: Appointment Setter (Part-Time > Full-Time Opportunity)
description:
$10/hr + $5 Per Show + $1,200–$2,000/mo OTE (part-time)

Square 1 Group | Remote | Growth Role



Square 1 Group is a systems and marketing company helping service providers build predictable client acquisition.

We’re hiring a confident, coachable, reliable communicator to join us part-time as an Appointment Setter.

This role is ideal for someone who wants to break into sales, develop real skills, and eventually grow into a full-time role as they hit KPIs.



What You’ll Be Doing



You’ll be the first point of contact for warm leads who have already requested info from us.

Your job is to call warm leads, have real conversations, follow a proven script, book them for a 15-minute call with an advisor (closer), and get them excited enough to actually show up.

You are not selling anything on the call. Your only goal is to build rapport and schedule the appointment.



Compensation



Starting pay is $10/hr (part-time).

You earn a $5 bonus for every appointment that shows up.

You only get the bonus when the prospect attends the meeting you booked.

No show means no bonus.

OTE ranges from $1,200–$2,000 per month with part-time hours. Higher earnings and more hours become available once KPIs are consistently hit.



Who Succeeds in This Role



You speak clearly and confidently.

You are comfortable on the phone.

You want a long-term role that can grow into something bigger.

You take feedback seriously.

You are reliable, consistent, and professional.

You can work US hours.

You’re hungry enough to follow instructions and improve quickly.



What Counts as a Paid Appointment



You earn the $5 bonus only when

• you set the appointment

• the lead attends the meeting live

• Advisor meets with them on the call



Growth Opportunities



If you consistently hit metrics, you’ll have opportunities to move into

full-time appointment setting,

higher bonus tiers,

additional responsibilities in sales or operations, and

junior closer training

We promote based on performance, not seniority.



How to Apply (Follow These Instructions Exactly)



We only review applications that follow all steps.



Step 1: Send an
 to 



Subject line: MANGO – [Your Name]



Step 2: Attach a one to two minute Loom video introducing yourself.

Tell us why you want the role, your availability, and give an example of how you’ve handled a difficult conversation.

We want to hear your natural tone. If you sound good, you get an interview.



Step 3: Attach your resume.



Final Note



If you’re reliable, enthusiastic, coachable, and looking for a real shot at a career in sales, we want to hear from you.

If following simple instructions is difficult for you, this isn’t the right fit.
