title: GHL Virtual Assistant and Appointment Setter for Revenue Recovery Company
description:
Job Type: Part-Time | Long-Term | Remote



Pay: $3 to $4 per hour base + $25 commission per audit that shows up + $50 commission per client you source yourself that closes



About the Company



Odyssey Apex is a revenue recovery company based in Florida. We help home service contractors (HVAC, plumbing, electrical, roofing) recover $5K to $15K per month in missed call revenue using a done-for-you system built inside GoHighLevel. We are growing and need a reliable VA to handle client account management and cold call local contractors to set audit appointments for the owner.



What You Will Do



You will have two responsibilities.



First, account management inside GHL. This includes updating 5 numeric fields on client contact records weekly (calls captured, leads qualified, jobs booked, average ticket, revenue recovered), tagging new clients with the active-client tag at onboarding, confirming Monday ROI report
s sent correctly, and running a basic QA checklist per client to confirm the system is working. Flag anything broken to Adam directly via WhatsApp.



Second, appointment setting. We provide you with call lists of home service business owners in Florida. Your job is one thing: book a free 20-minute audit call with Adam. You do not sell anything. You ask one question, handle basic objections using the script we give you, and set the appointment in GHL. Every audit appointment that shows up earns you $25 on top of your hourly pay.



If you find your own companies outside of the lists we provide and that business becomes a paying client, you earn a $50 commission on top of everything else. There is no cap on commissions.



What We Need From You



You must have experience inside GoHighLevel or be willing to learn it fast using our SOPs. You must have clear confident spoken English. You must be available during US Eastern Time business hours (9AM to 5PM EST). You must have a stable internet connection and WhatsApp for daily communication. You must be comfortable making outbound calls and handling brush-offs calmly.



Hours



Starting at 15 to 20 hours per week. Grows as the client base grows. This is a long-term role. A VA booking 3 to 4 closed appointments per week earns an extra $300 to $400 per month on top of base pay. With growth to find and close your own leads on top of that and your earnings grow with no ceiling.



How to Apply



Send a short voice memo or video (2 minutes max) via WhatsApp to 
introducing yourself and telling me about a time you made outbound calls or handled a rejection on the phone. Applications without a voice memo will not be reviewed.

title: Insurance Credentialing
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a detail-oriented and highly organized Insurance Credentialing Associate to join our growing healthcare team. This role plays a key part in ensuring providers are properly credentialed and enrolled with Medicare, Medicaid, and commercial insurance payers.



The ideal candidate has hands-on experience in healthcare credentialing, understands payer requirements, and is committed to maintaining compliance with HIPAA, CMS, and Florida healthcare regulations.



Key Responsibilities



Provider Credentialing & Enrollment

-Manage initial credentialing, recredentialing, and payer enrollments

-Process applications for:

-Medicare (PECOS)

-Florida Medicaid

-Commercial insurance carriers

-Maintain and update CAQH profiles

-Track application status and follow up with payers as needed



Regulatory & Compliance

Ensure all processes comply with:

-HIPAA

-CMS regulations

-Florida AHCA requirements

-NCQA and payer standards

-Monitor provider licenses, certifications, DEA, and malpractice insurance



Documentation & Data Management

-Maintain accurate and secure credentialing records

-Ensure consistency of provider data across systems

-Protect sensitive information in compliance with privacy regulations



Payer & Internal Coordination

-Communicate with insurance carriers regarding credentialing

-Respond to document requests and application updates

-Coordinate with billing and compliance teams to avoid claim issues



Reporting & Support

-Prepare credentialing status reports

-Assist with audits and internal reviews

-Recommend improvements to streamline processes



Required Qualifications

-1-2 years of healthcare credentialing experience

-Strong knowledge of:

*Medicare & Medicaid enrollment

*Commercial insurance credentialing

*CAQH, PECOS, and payer portals

-Proficient in Microsoft Office and credentialing systems

-Strong English communication skills (written and verbal)



Preferred Qualifications

-Background in wound care, outpatient clinics, or specialty practices

-Familiarity with Florida healthcare regulations and AHCA standards

-Credentialing certification (a plus, not required)



Skills & Competencies

-Strong attention to detail and organization

-Ability to manage multiple tasks and deadlines

-High level of professionalism and confidentiality

-Ability to work independently and within a team



Compliance & Confidentiality

This role requires strict adherence to HIPAA and all applicable U.S. healthcare regulations. Maintaining confidentiality is a condition of employment.



Why Join Us?

Work remotely with a US-based healthcare team

Be part of a growing and specialized practice

Support patient care through compliance and accuracy

Collaborative and supportive work environment



How to Apply

Please submit your application through OnlineJobs.ph and include your updated resume.

Applications without a resume will not be reviewed.

title: German Customer Service Specialist
description:
We are a fast-growing 7-figure DTC health & wellness brand on a mission to help people live pain-free, healthier lives – through smart, science-backed products and a world-class customer experience.



We’re looking for a Customer Support Specialist who doesn’t just answer tickets – but owns the customer relationship. Someone who understands that behind every
 or message is a real person who wants to feel heard, helped, and supported – not just “handled.”



This is not a boring support job. You’ll be shaping the way our brand is perceived, improving processes, and making sure our customers feel cared for, confident, and loyal.



What You’ll Be Doing

- Respond to customer messages 
, social, chat) with speed, clarity, and genuine empathy

- Solve common issues like order tracking, returns, usage questions, and payment support

- Collaborate with our operations and creative team to improve self-service tools, FAQs, and automation flows

- Flag patterns and insights that could improve conversion, retention, or product quality

- Help us deliver a premium, human brand experience – even in high ticket volume

- Occasionally support with Trustpilot/Google Reviews, comment replies, or product feedback



You Are

- Native or fluent in German (C1/C2 level is mandatory – our customers are 100% German-speaking)

- Deep familiarity with Shopify and helpdesk platforms is required – ideally with Freshdesk. You should be confident navigating orders, refunds, customer profiles, and ticket workflows without guidance.

- Empathetic, fast-thinking, and customer-obsessed

- Emotionally intelligent: you know when to reassure, when to delight, when to be direct

- Proactive and solution-oriented: if something’s broken, you either fix it or improve it

- Bonus: Experience in DTC, wellness, e-commerce or medical-related support



?? To Apply

- Send us a short message about why you’re a great fit

- Include your hourly rate or desired salary



???? Note: Shortlisted candidates will be asked to complete a small test task (approx. 10 min) to simulate a real support situation (tone, clarity, helpfulness, escalation logic, etc.).



Let’s build something better than “support.” Let’s build a brand people love to come back to.



– Michael

Founder

title: Direct Response Video Editor
description:
We are Germany’s fastest growing 7-figure DTC health brand looking for a Direct Response Video Editor who can turn raw content into scroll-stopping, high-converting creatives, without being told what to do at every step.



You’ll be working directly with the founder, gaining deep insight into high-converting video scripts and what makes people click, watch, and buy. This is a performance-driven role, we’re not looking for a “video cutter”, but someone who understands direct response marketing psychology and takes full ownership of the creative output.



You’ll receive raw footage from creators and will be responsible for everything: editing, captions, B-roll selection, punchy sound design, overlays, text effects, and pacing. You must know what good B-roll looks like and which clips increase retention, emotional impact, and conversions.



We can deliver raw material for 3-5 creative concepts (á 3-5 hooks each) per week, mostly long-form VSLs. Speed, clarity, and results matter.



Your Responsibilities:

– Turn raw content into performance-optimized ads

– Add captions, hooks, SFX, overlays, emojis 

– Choose B-roll that adds conversion power (no boring stock footage)

– Understands conversion psychology

– Implement best practices from Direct Response Advertising

– Work directly with the founder and learn what truly makes an ad convert

- Continuously improve based on ad performance & feedback



Requirements:

– Proven experience editing Direct Response Ads (Strong Portfolio REQUIRED)

– Full stack AI knowledge (Sora, Kling AI, Nano Banana, Elevenlabs etc.)

– Understanding of performance psychology & funnel structure

– Strong motion graphics skills (After Effects, CapCut, or similar)

– Fast turnaround time

– Fluent in English (even better if German)

– Proactive, independent, hungry to grow



Bonus requirements:

– Experience in health, wellness or DTC products

- Medical knowledge



Ready to apply?

- Send us 2–3 of your best ad edits + your hourly rate

- Optional: Include 1 creative you wish you had edited (with a link)



Note: DON’T apply if you’re looking for a “regular video cutting job”. This is a performance driven role, where you’ll work side-by-side with the founder.

title: Lead Bookkeeper & Operations Partner (50/50 Profit Share)
description:
Hello! My name is Kurtis. I am starting a new bookkeeping agency specifically designed for U.S. Home Service businesses (plumbers, roofers, HVAC, etc.). We provide high-quality, day-to-day bookkeeping at a more affordable rate than standard U.S. accounting firms.



I am not looking to hire an hourly employee. I am looking to hire a true Business Partner.



If you are a highly skilled QuickBooks Online (QBO) expert who wants to build a business from the ground up and share the profits, please read below.



The Opportunity: 50/50 Profit Split



This is not an hourly job. This is a high-commission partnership. We will split the net profits of the business 50/50. Because of our pricing structure and low overhead, your 50% share will scale quickly and be much higher than a standard hourly wage from a U.S. firm.



Requirements to Apply:

1. You must have at least 4 years of experience doing bookkeeping for U.S.-based businesses or accounting firms.

2. You must be an expert in QuickBooks Online (QBO). (Experience with trade software like Jobber or ServiceTitan is a massive bonus).

3. You must have excellent, fluent English communication skills (both written and spoken).

4. You must be comfortable working/overlapping with U.S. Pacific Standard Time (PST) to take sales calls with contractors and CPAs.



You must be an entrepreneur at heart—comfortable with outbound outreach and building systems.



How We Will Divide the Work:

My Responsibilities (Kurtis - The U.S. Founder):



1. I will set up the U.S.-based Corporation and handle all legal/tax compliance.

2. I will set up the U.S. business bank accounts and payment processing (Stripe).

3. I will pay for all startup expenses, software subscriptions (CRM,
 scrapers), and lead-generation tools.

4. I will act as the "face" of the U.S. company in trade groups and help you close deals on Zoom.



Your Responsibilities (Lead Operator & Partner):



1. Marketing & Outreach: You will execute our outbound marketing strategy (sending cold
s to U.S. CPAs, recording short Loom video audits for prospects, and managing our CRM).

2. Sales: You will handle inbound leads and book discovery calls.

3. Fulfillment: You will handle the day-to-day categorization, reconciliation, and month-end P&L generation for the clients we sign.



Our Pricing Strategy (Your Earning Potential):

To give you a clear idea of how much money you can make with your 50% split, here is what we charge our clients. (Notice this is much more affordable than the U.S. industry average, making it an easy sell!)



[ Starter Plan ] - $97 / month

Up to 100 Transactions

(U.S. Industry Avg: $250 - $400/mo)



[ Growth Plan ] - $197 / month (Most Popular)

101 to 250 Transactions

(U.S. Industry Avg: $450 - $650/mo)



[ Pro Plan ] - $297 / month

251 to 500 Transactions

(U.S. Industry Avg: $750 - $1,000+/mo)



If you are tired of working for a fixed hourly rate and want to build a real business where you get paid half of the profits for your hard work, this is the perfect opportunity.



How to Apply:

Please reply with the phrase "50/50 Partner" at the top of your message. Include a brief summary of your U.S. bookkeeping experience, your familiarity with QuickBooks Online, and why you are interested in a profit-share model instead of an hourly wage. Remember, you do need at least 4 years of experience working for a US bookkeeping/ accounting firm.

title: YouTube Setup & Growth Virtual Assistant (AI Niche)
description:
Overview:

My client is launching a brand new YouTube channel in the AI space and is seeking an experienced YouTube Virtual Assistant who can take the lead in setting up and growing the channel from scratch.



This role is ideal for someone who understands YouTube deeply and can confidently execute without constant direction.



Must be able to work during some EST hours for meetings with client.



Role Summary:

You will be responsible for building, optimizing, and supporting the growth of my client’s YouTube channel. You should be able to guide strategy, implement best practices, and help position the channel for growth in the AI niche.



Key Responsibilities



Channel Setup:

- Create and fully set up my client’s YouTube channel, including branding, layout, and sections

- Optimize channel description using SEO best practices

- Set up playlists and organize channel structure

- Ensure all backend settings are properly configured



Content Upload & Optimization:

- Edit videos as needed

- Upload and schedule videos

- Write high-performing titles, descriptions, and tags

- Apply YouTube SEO strategies to improve discoverability

- Add end screens, cards, and captions



YouTube Strategy & Growth:

- Identify keyword opportunities within the AI niche

- Suggest posting schedule and growth strategies

- Continuously improve channel performance



Thumbnail & CTR Support:

- Create or guide thumbnail design

- Optimize titles and thumbnails to improve click-through rate



Analytics & Reporting

- Monitor performance using YouTube Analytics

- Track key metrics such as watch time and audience retention

- Provide clear insights and recommendations



Community Engagement

- Respond to comments and manage engagement

- Help build an active and engaged audience



How to apply:

To be considered, please submit your resume, a portfolio with prior work, references if available, and an introduction video. For a higher chance of selection, include a screen recording that introduces you while you walk through your YouTube process. Must use at least 8 apply points. Correspond only via OLJ platform.

title: Expert Clothing Product Designer (Tech Packs + Design Development)
description:
Job Description:



We are looking for an experienced clothing product designer to work with our brand on developing technical performance garments and detailed factory-ready tech packs.



This role requires someone who understands technical apparel, garment construction, materials, and performance-focused design. We are not looking for someone who only creates illustrations — we need a designer who can contribute to the development of functional products and provide input on construction, materials, and performance features.



You will work closely with our team to turn product concepts into detailed tech packs ready for manufacturing.



Responsibilities:



• Develop detailed, factory-ready tech packs for apparel products

• Create technical sketches (front, back, and detailed construction views)

• Specify measurements, fabrics, trims, and garment construction

• Help design garments that prioritize technical performance, comfort, and functionality

• Recommend improvements to fabric choices, construction methods, and performance features

• Ensure tech packs are clear and ready for factory production



Requirements:



• Proven experience as an apparel product designer

• Strong understanding of technical performance apparel and garment construction

• Experience designing sportswear, activewear, or technical garments

• Ability to create professional, production-ready tech packs

• High proficiency in Adobe Illustrator or similar design software

• Strong attention to detail and understanding of manufacturing processes



Important:

Please only apply if you have real experience designing garments and creating factory-ready tech packs.



When applying, please include:

• Examples of tech packs you have created

• Examples of technical or performance garments you have designed



This will be an ongoing role for the right designer as we continue developing new products.

title: Operations Manager
description:
We are hiring an Operations Manager to oversee internal execution and manage communication across multiple external sources. This is one of the most important roles in our organization.



You will help create, manage, and close deal flow. This role is part origination operator and part transaction quarterback. You will call business owners, CPAs, attorneys, and other referral sources, figure out whether there is a real seller with real intent, set appointments, and keep live deals moving so they do not die from drift. You will be communicating with everyone internally to make sure the communication is smooth, and tasks are done by the due date.



What makes this role different: This is not a passive analyst role and it is not a pure admin role. The right person is comfortable on the phone, commercially sharp, organized under pressure, and relentless about follow-up.



Responsibilities

• Generate and maintain a steady flow of owner and intermediary conversations.

• Qualify whether owners are serious, qualified, and worth the principal's time.

• Book meetings, prepare summaries, and keep every next step clear.

• Manage multiple live transactions at once, including follow-ups, diligence coordination, and closing checklists.

• Push processes forward so good opportunities do not stall because nobody owned the middle.

title: Content Editor (Final Cut Pro)
description:
Based in Canada, Ground2Air Media is a premier full-service branding and marketing agency dedicated to empowering Realtors® and small businesses. We specialize in crafting exceptional, high-quality visual media—from real estate listing tours to dynamic social media content and brand storytelling. Our mission is to elevate our clients' brand presence and foster growth in a fast-paced digital landscape. We operate with a highly collaborative, innovative team, combining our on-the-ground Canadian production crew with a talented roster of remote overseas editors to deliver outstanding results



The Role:

We are seeking a passionate and talented Storytelling Video Editor to join our growing content creation division. If you believe that a video's true power lies in its ability to drive emotion and tell a compelling story rather than just showing off flashy effects, this is the role for you.



Currently, this is a pay-per-project role, however, we have a consistent, heavy flow of work that will easily keep you busy for 20 to 40 hours per week. As our content creation division continues to scale rapidly, our ultimate goal is to transition the right candidate into a full-time position, where you will eventually help us build and lead a larger team of editors.



Key Responsibilities:



Story-First Editing: Craft engaging, emotion-driven videos that tell a clear and compelling narrative for our diverse roster of clients (trades, health, finance, real estate, etc.).



Sound Design & Audio: Implement high-quality sound design, audio mixing, and music selection that perfectly matches the mood, pacing, and emotional tone of the video.



Captioning: Create dynamic, trendy, and highly accurate text/captions for short-form social media content (Instagram Reels, TikToks, talking-head videos, etc.).



Collaboration & Efficiency: Work seamlessly with our lead editors, production team, and project managers (using tools like 
, Dropbox, Slack and 
) to meet deadlines and maintain the recognizable Ground2Air Media standard of quality.



Our Style & Examples:

We have a distinct standard of quality and pacing. You must be able to match (or exceed) the style of editing shown in the examples below. If you can feel you can match this, we'd love to chat.



f.io/q3GHc5HC



f.io/KY6gM3hv



Requirements:



Software Proficiency: You MUST use Final Cut Pro as your primary editing software to align with our team's workflow.



Storytelling Mindset: You prioritize narrative flow, pacing, and emotional impact over over-the-top transitions and heavy VFX. You know how to keep a viewer hooked from the first second, regardless of whether you are editing a video for a roofing company or a financial advisor.



Technical Skills: Expert-level skills in sound design, captioning and colour grading.



Reliability & Communication: You must have a fast, reliable internet connection for downloading/uploading large files daily. Strong English communication skills are required—we value transparency, responsiveness, and a collaborative attitude.



Why Join Us?



Consistent Workload: 20-40 hours of steady, per-project work per week right out of the gate.



Massive Growth Potential: A clear pathway to a full-time salaried role and future leadership opportunities as we expand our editing team.



Great Culture: Join a supportive, collaborative, and highly organized team that values your creative input, provides ongoing mentorship, and invests in your development.



How to Apply:



Please apply directly through onlinejobs.ph by responding to this ad with the following:



A Relevant Portfolio: We want to see story-driven content. Please do not just send us a folder full of basic talking-head videos. Show us examples where you crafted a narrative, built emotion, and utilized excellent sound design and colour grading.



Confirmation of Software: Tell us how long you have been using Final Cut Pro. Please note: If you are a Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or CapCut editor, please do not apply. We are strictly looking for Final Cut Pro editors to match our internal workflow and are not interested in hiring outside of this ecosystem.

title: Business Development Representative
description:
Business Development Representative 

*Please submit your application at: 





Reports to:

Vice President of Growth



Headquarters:

Savannah, GA



Job Location:

Remote - Philippines 



What we do at Dental Claim Support:



Dental Claim Support (DCS) improves the lives of dentists and their teams through expertise plus technology to maximize revenue and support patient care.



Quanta Suite is dedicated to building the future of healthcare operations by uniting automation, analytics, and modern payment solutions into one seamless platform that empowers practices to thrive.



As part of this mission, Dental Claim Support maintains a strategic partnership with Quanta Suite, an AI-powered, enterprise-grade dental practice management platform.



Position Summary:

The Business Development Representative (BDR) is responsible for generating qualified sales opportunities through high-volume outbound outreach and booking meetings for Key Account Managers (KAMs).

This role is not responsible for closing deals. Instead, the BDR focuses on top-of-funnel pipeline creation, ensuring that each scheduled meeting is with a qualified, sales-ready prospect.

When opportunities related to Quanta Pay are identified, they will be routed to the Quanta sales team.

The ideal candidate is highly persistent, disciplined in outreach, and confident in initiating conversations with decision-makers.



How the Business Development Representative adds value:



The BDR is a pipeline generator by:

Creating qualified meetings for KAMs through outbound activity.

Identifying and qualifying operational pain points within dental practices.

Ensuring efficient routing of opportunities between DCS and Quanta.

Maintaining accurate CRM data to support pipeline visibility.

This role directly impacts pipeline volume, sales efficiency, and conversion outcomes.



In this role, you will:

Outbound Prospecting & Lead Generation

Conduct high-volume outbound cold calls to dental practices and multi-location groups.

Achieve an average of 50 successful outbound calls per day.

Engage office managers, dentists, and practice decision-makers.

Use approved scripts, messaging, and objection-handling frameworks.

Qualification & Appointment Setting

Identify key pain points related to:

Revenue cycle inefficiencies

Practice management systems

Operational bottlenecks

Qualify prospects based on defined criteria (size, need, readiness, decision-maker).

Schedule qualified meetings for Key Account Managers (KAMs).

Clearly document discovery insights to support effective handoff.

Pipeline Management & Follow-Up

Manage early-stage pipeline activities in HubSpot, including:

Consult No-Show follow-ups

Discovery Call follow-ups

Manual follow-ups and rescheduling

Maintain consistent follow-up cadence to maximize meeting conversion.

Opportunity Routing

Identify Quanta Pay opportunities and route them to the Quanta sales team.

Ensure proper tagging and ownership assignment in CRM.



Success Criteria:

Activity & Pipeline Generation

Average 50+ successful outbound calls per day.

Consistent meeting volume aligned with pipeline targets.



Meeting Quality

High-quality, qualified meetings that convert downstream.

Alignment with KAM expectations on deal readiness.



CRM Accuracy

?98% CRM data accuracy.

100% same-day activity logging.



Conversion Impact (Indirect)

Support achievement of team-level meeting-to-close conversion goals.

Requirements:



Must be available to work between the hours of 8:00am - 5:00 pm EST, Monday - Friday. 

1–2 years of experience in outbound sales, business development, cold calling, or lead generation (B2B preferred).

Experience selling into healthcare, dental; strongly preferred but not required.

Familiarity with CRM systems (Hubspot and Zoho preferred).

Strong verbal communication skills with confidence in initiating conversations with prospects.

Comfortable with participating in live Zoo
etings.

Excellent time management, prioritization, and organizational skills.

Resilience, coachability, and comfort working in a high-activity environment.

Ability to work independently and meet established goals in a remote setting.

Our Company Values:



Customer Success

Transparency

Reliability

Professional Excellence

Alignment



*Please submit your application at this link:

title: UK Corporate Immigration – Demand & Authority Lead
description:
(Marcus Sheridan's Endless Customers | Compliance & Sponsor Licence Focus).



Immtell is a UK-based immigration consultancy specialising in:



- Sponsor licence applications

- Sponsor licence compliance & mock audits

- Skilled Worker visa strategy

- UK market entry & company formation support



We are intentionally narrowing our focus to UK corporate immigration and compliance risk, moving away from broad global mobility services.



We are looking for one senior, commercially minded operator to help lead this repositioning and build high-quality corporate demand.



This is not a social media role.

This is not a virtual assistant role.

This is not a blog production role.



This is a strategic growth role.



----



The Objective:



Increase the quality of corporate enquiries, particularly for:



- Sponsor licence applications

- Compliance reviews / mock audits

- Governance & allocation strategy



Reduce low-value, piecemeal work.



---



What You Will Own:



You will work directly with the founder and take responsibility for:



Positioning & Strategy -



- Refining Immtell’s UK-focused corporate positioning

- Defining and sharpening ideal client profiles

- Building compliance-risk narratives that resonate with corporate decision-makers



Authority-Led Content (You Create It)- 



- Writing and structuring all strategic content (blogs, landing pages, pricing content, LinkedIn drafts, etc.)

- Applying Endless Customers principles (important): Pricing transparency, Problems & objections, Comparisons, Industry disruption, and Assignment selling.

- Structuring content so it supports AI search visibility naturally (no gimmicks)



Demand & Lead Quality - 



- Aligning content with sales conversations

- Improving enquiry quality, not just increasing traffic

- Supporting targeted outreach or strategic visibility initiatives



Tools & Execution - 



You will actively use:



- priceguide.ai (pricing transparency)

- Ubersuggest (keyword research & structure)

- AI tools for workflow efficiency

- Hubspot CRM thinking aligned with sales



You must be comfortable owning both strategy and execution.



---



Leadership & Ownership (Important):



This is not a task-based role. You are expected to:



- Propose positioning changes

- Challenge assumptions constructively

- Bring strategic ideas, not wait for instructions

- Identify opportunities proactively

- Take ownership of outcomes, not just deliverables



You will not receive daily step-by-step tasks.



If you prefer clear instructions over strategic ownership, this role is not a fit.



---



The Type of Person This Suits:



You may have experience as:



- Demand Generation Manager (B2B)

- Marketing Manager (Professional Services)

- Growth Lead

- Inbound Marketing Lead

- Sales-Aligned Marketing Strategist



You think in terms of - 



- Pipeline quality

- ICP discipline

- Revenue impact

- Buyer psychology in regulated industries

- Long-term authority building



If your focus is primarily on social engagement, followers, or traffic metrics, this role is not suitable.



---



What Success Looks Like (6–12 Months):



- Clear UK corporate positioning

- Improved quality of sponsor licence & compliance enquiries

- Content actively used in sales conversations

- Greater visibility among UK corporate decision-makers

- Reduced low-value enquiries



This role directly supports revenue.



---



Requirements:



- Strong written and verbal English

- Experience owning B2B demand or marketing strategy end-to-end

- Ability to create structured, authority-led content independently

- Comfortable working directly with a founder

- Commercial mindset

- Experience in professional services, SaaS, legal, compliance, or consulting environments is preferred.



---



Working Arrangement:



- Remote 

- Full-time

- Long-term contractor role

- Monthly compensation: $2,000 – $2,500 USD depending on experience

- 90-day review period



---



To Apply:



Please include:



- How would you reposition a UK immigration firm to attract higher-quality corporate clients?

- How would you improve lead quality without simply increasing traffic?

- Provide one example of content you would create to support a sponsor licence compliance audit service.



Applications focused only on social media growth or traffic metrics will not be considered.

title: YouTube Video Editor – Faceless Documentary Channels
description:

title: Healthcare Technical Support
description:
To be considered, you must fill out the application form below:


/ansiblehealth/17b2a6df-a72d-480e-8c91-daa3830ac000



What is Ansible Health?

Ansible Health unites physicians, nurses, respiratory therapists, and tech experts from Columbia, Johns Hopkins, Google, Amazon, and other top institutions to revolutionize care for chronic disease patients. We combine elite clinical expertise with cutting-edge technology to deliver personalized, efficient care at scale. Our team's groundbreaking research, published in leading journals like Nature and PLOS, demonstrates our commitment to innovation. Backed by Bessemer, First Round Capital, AlleyCorp, Breyer Capital, and Inflect Capital, we're a Series A startup partnering with leading healthcare systems nationwide. Our mission is to genuinely improve patient outcomes, not just optimize metrics. If you're passionate about transforming healthcare through technology, join our diverse team in making a real impact.



The Job at a Glance

As a Technical Product Support Specialist, your primary responsibility is to provide patients with exceptional technical support for our products and services. You will daily engage non-tech-savvy patients on technical phone calls. Most of our patients are older adults located in the USA. These calls involve guiding patients through using their Android tablet and verifying it in the backend through Samsung Knox, ensuring that RPM devices are connected and transmitting accurate data, and assisting them in joining their appointments through our tablet via Zoom. Occasionally, patients may require additional help during their time in our program. In some instances, verifying data through Azure (Device Analytics and CosmosDB) may be necessary.



Furthermore, you will provide technical support to our clinical team, and ensure they are prepared for their virtual appointments. They may also require assistance using Athenahealth, such as modifying visits and checking in/out. You will handle general general technical support duties, which demand a solid understanding of our tech stack and products (i.e., Android Tablet, Zoo
etings and phone, Google Workspace). You should be capable of providing basic troubleshooting steps and assistance to remove obstacles for clinicians/support staff in their work, and are expected to be able to have on-call availability for urgent situations where patient care is affected.



Collaborating closely with our Engineering Team is also an essential aspect of your role to effectively escalate issues requiring broader coordination and resolution. GitLab and Azure DevOps are the primary ticketing systems used for filing issues and requests. Continuous follow-ups and monitoring are expected until the issue is resolved end-to-end. In addition, you are expected to be able to present and take notes on meetings about issues encountered in Tech.



The ideal candidate should be comfortable navigating ambiguity due to the ever-evolving nature of our startup. To excel in this role, excellent problem-solving, communication, and organizational skills are essential.



A Technical Product Support Specialist is expected to:

• Maintain a reliable, high-speed internet connection

• Handle Tech Support requests filed by clinicians or patients from end to end

• Manage and organize various project tools (e.g., GitLab, AzureDevOps, spreadsheets, bug trackers, documents)

• Conduct Tech Calls for non-tech-savvy patients (mainly older adults) in the USA

• Guide patients through Android tablet usage and confirm settings through Samsung Knox

• Work with RPM devices to ensure they are connected and transmitting accurate data

• Collaborate with Engineering Team and Program Managers to escalate and resolve issues

• Assist clinicians and company support staff with technical issues

• Run queries and check analytics using Azure’s CosmosDB or Device Analytics

• Become extremely familiar with our proprietary app, tablets, RPM devices, and backend systems.

• Support clinical team with equipment setup and checking applied security policies

• Present and take notes on Technical meetings, specifically on issues encountered and plans to resolve them.



Qualifications and Experience

• Prior experience in a customer support role, such as Technical Support Specialist or Support Engineer

• Expertise in Android Tablets, Samsung Knox Suite, and Knox Manage

• Proficiency in managing Zoo
etings and Zoom Phone

• Familiarity with medical devices (e.g., Blood Pressure monitor, Pulse Oximeter)

• Knowledge of Athenahealth preferred

• Experience using issue tracking software and remote support tools (e.g., Gitlab, Azure DevOps) is a plus

• Understanding of technology systems, particularly Google Workspace

• Positive, enthusiastic attitude and excellent English language skills (C2 level)

• Skilled in technical debugging techniques (e.g., analyzing metrics and logs on Azure)

• Strong written and verbal communication, problem-solving skills, and detail-oriented

• Ability to manage multiple priorities effectively

• Healthcare setting experience advantageous



Type of Role

Full-time: 40 hours a week (with a possible shifting schedule including weekends)

Benefits: Flexible PTO and HMO coverage.

Level: Mid-Career, 3-5 years relevant work experience

Location: Remote

title: GHL/ Automation Expert
description:
Job Title: GoHighLevel (GHL) Automation & Funnel Specialist

About Voracious Mind

Voracious Mind is a dynamic and forward-thinking company. We are passionate about helping our clients achieve their goals through innovative strategies and cutting-edge technology. Our team is a collective of creative thinkers, strategists, and digital experts who are committed to excellence and continuous learning. We are looking for a like-minded individual to join our team and help us continue to grow and succeed.

Role Summary

We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced GoHighLevel (GHL) Automation & Funnel Specialist to join our team. The ideal candidate will be a true GHL expert as well as competent with AI, with a deep understanding of its capabilities and a proven track record of building and managing sophisticated automations, high-converting sales funnels, and engaging membership areas. This role is central to our marketing and client service operations, and you will be responsible for the end-to-end management of our GHL platform.

Key Responsibilities

GHL Platform Management: Take full ownership of our GoHighLevel account, including setup, customization, and ongoing maintenance to ensure optimal performance.

Automation & Workflow Development: Design, build, and manage complex automation workflows, triggers, and smart campaigns for lead nurturing, client onboarding, and follow-up sequences.

Funnel & Landing Page Creation: Develop and optimize high-converting sales funnels, landing pages, forms, and surveys within GHL to support our marketing campaigns and client acquisition efforts.

Membership Area Management: Create, manage, and maintain our membership areas, ensuring a seamless and engaging experience for our members, including content delivery, access control, and community management.

Integration Management: Integrate GoHighLevel with third-party platforms such as Payment Processors, Make, Google Calendar, and other marketing and sales tools to create a unified and efficient tech stack.

Performance Monitoring & Optimization: Continuously monitor the performance of funnels, campaigns, and automations, using data and analytics to identify areas for improvement and implement optimization strategies.

Technical Support & Training: Provide technical support to our team and clients on GHL-related matters, and create documentation and training materials to ensure best practices are followed.

Qualifications & Skills

Proven GHL Expertise: A minimum of 2-3 years of hands-on experience with GoHighLevel is required. You must be able to demonstrate a deep understanding of the platform's features and capabilities including utilization of AI (bonus points for knowing Manus and other AI platforms for automation).

Well Versed in A2P application and approval 

Automation & Funnel Building Mastery: A strong portfolio of successful automation workflows, sales funnels, and membership sites built in GoHighLevel.

Technical Proficiency: Familiarity with AI, API integrations, webhooks, and other technical aspects of connecting GHL with other systems.

Problem-Solving Skills: The ability to troubleshoot technical issues, identify and resolve problems in funnels and automations, and think critically to find effective solutions.

Communication & Collaboration: Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to work effectively in a remote team environment.

Preferred Qualifications

Experience working in a digital marketing agency or online education company.

A portfolio that includes case studies or metrics demonstrating the success of your previous GHL projects.

How to Apply

If you are a GoHighLevel expert who is passionate about automation, funnels, and creating exceptional online experiences, we would love to hear from you. Interested candidates are invited to fill out our phase 1 application form HERE: 
 and choose the subject line “VORACIOUS MIND; GHL Rockstar.” If you are selected to move forward, you can expect to hear from our team by
 at 
 your introduction video, please tell us a little bit about yourself & tell us how we could best utilize GHL to build a membership area.



Equal Opportunity Employer: Voracious Mind is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.

title: Medical Virtual Assistant
description:
To be considered, you must fill out the application form below:


/ansiblehealth/2475d4d7-7ed7-449e-a350-75eb5484b5db





What is Ansible Health?

Ansible Health unites physicians, nurses, respiratory therapists, and tech experts from Columbia, Johns Hopkins, Google, Amazon, and other top institutions to revolutionize care for chronic disease patients. We combine elite clinical expertise with cutting-edge technology to deliver personalized, efficient care at scale. Our team's groundbreaking research, published in leading journals like Nature and PLOS, demonstrates our commitment to innovation. Backed by Bessemer, First Round Capital, AlleyCorp, Breyer Capital, and Inflect Capital, we're a Series A startup partnering with leading healthcare systems nationwide. Our mission is to genuinely improve patient outcomes, not just optimize metrics. If you're passionate about transforming healthcare through technology, join our diverse team in making a real impact.



The Job at a Glance

We are looking for a top-tier Patient Care Coordinator to become an integral part of our expanding team. This role is vital in delivering the best care possible to our patients, handling patient communications, and providing essential support to our clinical staff in their mission to offer exceptional care. The ideal candidate will demonstrate exemplary professionalism, excellent English language communication skills, and outstanding organizational abilities with meticulous attention to detail. This position offers an exciting opportunity to contribute significantly to our patient-centric approach in healthcare delivery.



Responsibilities

• Customize initial discussions based on patient needs, ensuring they understand how the program can address their specific health conditions, providing personalized benefits rather than general services.

• Manage inquiries through multiple communication channels (phone,
, etc.), including voi
 inbox management and message routing, providing prompt and accurate responses.

• Process and manage referrals, working towards efficient conversion within a 7-10 day timeframe while managing multiple referral loop processes for a large patient panel.

• Perform comprehensive data entry including clinical survey scores/results, diagnostic tests, remote physiologic monitoring (RPM), and remote therapeutic monitoring (RTM) data streams.

• Schedule and coordinate patient appointments while maintaining communication with patients regarding their care schedule.

• Manage and process inbound and outbound medical records, ensuring proper documentation and organization.

• Maintain accurate EMR records by updating care notes, face sheets, and ensuring the integrity of patient information.

• Attend clinical meetings, take detailed notes, and follow up on action items and project timelines.

• Collaborate with a multidisciplinary team of physicians, engineers, designers, and care tea
mbers to continuously improve patient care delivery.

• Resolve patient issues and complaints, identifying problems and finding appropriate solutions to ensure patient satisfaction while maintaining professional communication throughout the process.



The ideal candidate for this role at Ansible Health is a dynamic professional who thrives in a fast-paced, ever-changing startup environment. They should also possess exceptional English communication skills, both written and verbal, coupled with meticulous attention to detail and strong organizational abilities. They should be adept at managing multiple priorities, from patient onboarding to referral management.



Required Qualifications and Competencies

• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field, such as Nursing, Physical Therapy, or other healthcare-related fields.

• 2+ years of professional experience in a customer service or healthcare setting, demonstrating a deep understanding of patient care and care coordination.

• Solid grasp of the US healthcare system and its intricacies.

• Exceptional written and verbal English communication skills.

• Strong attention to detail, organizational skills, and ability to multitask in a fast-paced environment.

• Proficiency with CRM systems, EMR software, and standard office applications (e.g., Google Suite)

• Training or experience in clinical medicine, such as a nursing degree, nursing assistant, or clinical scribe.

• Typing speed of at least 60 words per minute.

• Reliable internet connection (at least 30 Mbps) and a quiet home environment for work

• Ability to work in US time zones (EST)

• Achieve daily call quotas of 75-100 interactions.

• Adhere to established performance metrics to qualify for incentive plans tied to performance.



Nice to have

• Experience in the healthcare industry or with medical terminology.

• Proven track record in sales.

• Familiarity with remote patient monitoring systems.

• Knowledge of HIPAA regulations and healthcare privacy practices.



Job Details

Full-time: Full-time: 40 hours a week (with a possible shifting schedule including weekends)

Benefits: Flexible PTO and HMO coverage

Location: Remote (offshore, and willing to work US hours - EST/EDT)

title: Brand Partnerships & Onboarding Intern
description:
About BLK + GRN

BLK + GRN is a curated marketplace of non-toxic, Black woman-owned brands committed to helping women live healthier lives. Our mission is to connect women to safer products while building economic power within the Black community.



Role Overview

We’re seeking a highly organized, relationship-driven Brand Partnerships & Onboarding Manager to identify, recruit, interview, and successfully launch new brands onto the BLK + GRN platform. This person will manage the full lifecycle of brand onboarding — from outreach through affiliate setup, Shopify page builds, and ongoing sales tracking and invoicing.

This is a remote, part-time contractor role ideal for someone who enjoys relationship-building, systems, and supporting small business growth.



Key Responsibilities:

- Brand Sourcing & Outreach: Identify aligned Black woman-owned brands that meet BLK + GRN’s non-toxic standards

- Conduct outreach and manage follow-ups: Lead brand interviews and assess alignment with platform values and requirements

- Brand Onboarding & Launch: Guide accepted brands through onboarding process

- Set up affiliate links and tracking systems: Build and publish Shopify product/brand pages

- Operations & Reporting: Track monthly affiliate sales performance

- Prepare and send monthly invoices to brands: Maintain accurate records of brand status, performance, and payments



Qualifications:

- Strong organizational and project management skills

- Comfortable conducting interviews and managing external relationships

- Experience with Shopify, affiliate platforms, or e-commerce preferred

- Detail-oriented with strong follow-through

- Aligned with BLK + GRN’s mission of non-toxic living and economic equity

title: Real Estate Data Research VA
description:
Please review this job post completely before applying.



Job Title: Real Estate Research & Data Analyst (Virtual Assistant)

Type: Full-Time, Long-Term

Hours: 40 hrs/week (EST)

Location: Remote

Start Date: Immediate (within 7 days)



About the Role



We are a U.S.-based real estate investment company actively acquiring off-market properties. We are looking for a Data Research Specialist to support our acquisitions team by cleaning, organizing, and preparing property data.



This is not a cold calling, marketing, or underwriting role. You will be working with data only — following instructions to identify qualified leads, maintain clean records, and provide accurate updates inside our systems.



If you’re detail-oriented, comfortable with large datasets, and confident in Excel and CRM work, this is a great long-term role for you.



What You’ll Do



? Organize and clean property records inside our CRM (REISift)

? Review and filter property data based on criteria we provide

? Upload/download lists from sources such as Zillow, PropStream, PropWire, and MLS (Jacksonville, FL)

? Use Excel/Google Sheets to clean and format bulk data sets

? Convert property reports from PDF to Excel using Tabula

? Flag qualified leads for the acquisitions team according to instructions

? Maintain accurate, consistent records and prepare weekly summaries of work completed



Must-Have Skills



? 2+ years working in real estate data research, list management, or related role

? Strong working knowledge of Zillow, MLS, REISift, PropStream, and PropWire

? Advanced Excel/Google Sheets skills (downloading, uploading, cleaning datasets, using formulas)

? Experience with PDF-to-Excel conversion tools (Tabula or similar)

? Detail-oriented and consistent — accuracy in data cleaning is critical

? Reliable computer and high-speed internet setup for daily full-time work

? Good written English for reporting and notes



Bonus Points



? Experience supporting U.S. real estate investment teams

? Familiarity with skip tracing workflows

? CRM experience (REISift preferred)

? Ability to handle large data sets without errors



Why Work With Us



? Stable, long-term role with consistent hours

? Professional U.S. real estate investment team

? Clear systems and instructions to follow

? Opportunity to grow into higher-level roles as the company expands



How to Apply (Read Carefully)



We do not accept direct applications on OnlineJobs.ph.



Apply only using this link:







Only applications submitted via the above form will be reviewed.

About the Role



We are a U.S.-based real estate investment company, but this role is focused on operations, research, and task support. You do not need real estate experience to succeed here.



We’re looking for a proactive, detail-oriented professional who can manage

? Highly detail-oriented, organized, and dependable without direct supervision

? Strong workstation setup: desk, chair, reliable desktop/laptop, 1–2 monitors, headset, and camera

Nice to Have



? Experience preparing structured presentations (Google Slides, PowerPoint)

Why Work With Us



? Long-term, stable position with consistent hours

title: Admin Support
description:
We’re looking for an Administrative Agent to help support our sales and recruiting teams. This is an entry-level position that is eligible for promotion after 12 months of tenure.



***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********



You will fail the application process if you don't read the entire job description.



***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********





About Us



Started in 2017, and we're growing like crazy.

We expect to hire at least 4 salespeople, 3 admins, and 3 marketers in 2026.

Growing FAST - We sold 2663 lessons in 2025, and we're on pace to sell 3328 lessons in 2026

A small team of 1 American and 10 Filipinos.

We sell manual transmission driving lessons in the United States. Yes, really.

100% inbound leads from Organic Search (SEO). We don’t do cold calling.

No competition - in 90% of the markets we serve, we have no competitors. Because of this, our sale is pretty easy to make.





Compensation and Benefits

Competitive commission package - $3.50 per hour

Paid 5 Sick Days - Effective on day 1

Paid 10 days vacation - Prorated

Paid 14 Bank holidays - (Legal and religious Holidays are country-specific)

Paid Birthday Off - you pick a day off

Business Continuity Plan - In cases of calamity $40 hotel accommodations are permitted to ensure work will continue



Type of Employment

Full Time

40 hours per week

Schedule - 9 AM to 5 PM EST



Benefits to be provided after completion of 3 months:

Health Insurance

Office equipment, home office furniture, and anything else you need for work

Learning books, courses, training, or coaching that you want



Benefits to be provided after completion of one year:

Paid two weeks off for the Christmas Season



Entry Level Details

Note that this is an entry-level job.

We do NOT expect you to have any prior sales experience.

If you’re looking to switch careers and get your foot in the door, this could be great for you.

This is a great opportunity for anyone with a background in any of the following areas: Customer Service, VA Admin, Admin Data Processing, Clerk,
 Communications, General VA, Admin Support, Sales and Admin Specialist, Administrative Support, Operations Admin, Executive Admin Assistant, Sales Assistant.





Duties and Responsibilities

New Orders - Processing Product Order (Gift Certificate)

New Orders - Initial Order Confirmation (Level 3)

Instructor Onboarding, Offboarding and Reonboarding

Reactivate Unavailable Instructor

Secret Message: When you apply, under the section that says "Is there anything else you'd like to write or include?", write the word PINK ELEPHANT. This will show us that you read the entire job description.

Duplicate Record Check

Updating the "Daily Tracking" Process

CTM Prospect Staging





Qualifications

At least 2-3 years of minimum work experience in a relevant or equivalent role

Comprehensive background in Customer and Administrative support

High level of accuracy and attention to detail

Excellent English communication and comprehension

Proficiency in using and managing Google applications - Gmail, Calendar, Documents, Drive

Preferably with knowledge in using cloud-based CRM

Organized and has careful attention to detail

Ability to multitask, prioritize, and manage time effectively

Strong Problem-Solving skills

Customer Service Oriented and the ability to adapt/respond properly to different types of scenarios

Equipped with good skills in office/admin management, and can suggest process improvements

Must have your own computer, reliable high-speed internet, and a good quality headset and microphone.





What's Hard About This Job

Working Remotely - We're a remote-first company, and we never want to have an office. This is great if you like working by yourself in the quiet, but it can be terribly painful if you need the energy of coworkers nearby.

Our Cultural Values - We're an American company with an incredibly unusual culture. Even by American standards, our 7 cultural values are highly unusual. Our culture is challenging for people accustomed to corporate culture and especially difficult for people who grew up in Confucian cultures. It's a great culture for people who speak directly and have a great deal of self-confidence and ownership. If you identify as a misfit, you'll do well.

Multiple Software Systems - You're going to need to learn how to use 12 different software systems. This is great if you want to get exposed to and experience lots of technology, but it can be tough if you have a hard time learning technology. Secret Message - When you apply, you'll see a box that asks if you want to add anything else. Type in PINK ELEPHANT in all capital letters exactly as we've shown it here.





Cheat Code for getting a job with us:

1) Our application comprises the majority of our recruiting process. Because of that, we suggest that you give us thoughtful responses and rich stories. We typically only interview applicants who give rich and detailed answers to our questions. If you write short responses so that you can hurry up and finish the application, you will not get interviewed.

2) Tell us stories about how your actions match your beliefs and values. For example, if I say I value health and fitness, you don't know if I'm telling you the truth or if I'm just telling you what sounds good. But, if I tell you things I've done, I can illustrate my values of health and fitness with proof. For example, I go to the gym 4 days per week, I've done 6 triathlons, including an Ironman, and I can swim 3000 meters in one hour. My examples of things I've done prove that my actions match my values system.

3) Be vulnerable and honest. We take very detailed notes during the interview process, and we conduct extensive background checks. If the stories you tell about yourself don't match what your references say, we will not hire you. We'd rather hire a C student who is honest about being a C student than someone who is a C student but tries to pass themselves off as an A student. Remember, this is an entry-level job. We're not looking for perfect. We're looking for an excellent cultural fit.





How to apply: Please click on the link: 
/work-opportunities/administration-agent

title: 2D Animator for YouTube Trading Shorts (?11,000/month | Long-Term Work)
description:
I’m looking for a talented 2D animator/video editor from the Philippines to help me create YouTube Shorts (30–60 seconds) explaining trading and finance concepts — similar to this style:



?? Example Video - 



You’ll work closely with me to turn my voiceovers and trading breakdowns into engaging animated explainers with smooth motion, strong pacing, and clear storytelling.



Responsibilities



Create 10 YouTube Shorts per week (30–60 seconds each) using my provided script/VoiceOver.



Animate charts, text, and simple 2D visuals to explain trading concepts.



Match animation with the voiceover rhythm for maximum viewer retention.



Maintain a consistent, clean style across all videos.



Communicate regularly for revisions and feedback.



Requirements:



Skilled in After Effects, Premiere Pro, or similar animation software.



Experience in creating animated explainers or short-form YouTube content.



Strong sense of timing, pacing, and visual storytelling.



Reliable, fast turnaround, and open to long-term work.



(Bonus) Knowledge or interest in trading or finance.

Offer



?11,000/month (equivalent to £150)



Consistent workload: 10 videos per week



Long-term opportunity with potential for pay increases as the channel grows.



Flexible schedule — just deliver on deadlines.



All voiceovers and scripts provided.



To Apply 



Send me:

A short intro about yourself

2–3 samples of your animation work (YouTube Shorts or explainers)

Your current setup (software + computer specs)

Your availability per week

title: Meta Ads Video Editor for a 7+ Figure E-Commerce Brand
description:
We're looking for an experienced Video Editor for a long-term collaboration — with growing compensation and more responsibility as you prove yourself.

About us:

We're a 7-figure e-commerce brand selling in the German, Austrian, and Swiss market via Meta Ads. We're scaling aggressively and need a reliable editor who can keep up with our creative output.

What's in it for you:

This isn't just an editing gig. You'll get exclusive behind-the-scenes access to how a 7-figure e-com brand runs its creative strategy. You'll learn professional editing workflows built for performance marketing, and you'll become a core part of our team — not a freelancer we forget about. If you're serious about growing your skills in direct response and e-commerce, this is the environment to do it.

What you need to bring:



Proven experience editing Direct Response ads (UGC-style ads AND VSLs)

Strong understanding of performance marketing creative (Meta Ads)

Proficiency in Adobe Premiere and/or CapCut

Experience with AI tools: Higgsfield, HeyGen, Sora, Veo3 for AI UGC generation

Strong ability to independently source B-roll content from social media (TikTok, Instagram, YouTube) — this is a core part of the role, not a side task

Independent, fast workflow — minimum 2 finished videos per day

Quick implementation of feedback without back and forth



Your responsibilities:



Editing UGC-style ads (30–90 seconds) and VSLs (3–7 minutes)

Creating variants and iterations based on creative briefings and feedback

Sourcing relevant B-roll and footage from social media platforms on your own

Generating and prompting AI UGC creators (Higgsfield, HeyGen, Sora, Veo3)



Compensation:

$800/month fixed. Compensation increases with proven quality, speed, and reliability. We reward performance, not just availability.

Please don't apply if you:



Have no experience with Direct Response video ads

Are a beginner in video editing

Have never worked on performance creative for Meta Ads

Have no e-commerce work in your portfolio — applicants without e-commerce experience will be ignored



We start with a paid test task — no free trial work.

Interested? Send me:



Your portfolio (ideally with KPIs or performance results)

Your average editing speed per video

Examples of your AI prompting work

Any performance ads you've already edited

Your experience: which brands or projects you've worked with in this space



To confirm you've read this post: include the word "Tree" in your message, and in one sentence tell me which of the listed responsibilities you're strongest at and why. Anyone who is not doing this will be ignored.

title: Virtual Assistant
description: Hi! This is primarily a research and data entry role. Please apply here:

title: CRM / Database Specialist
description:
Hours: 10 hrs/week

Working time: Flexible schedule 

Start Date: ASAP



Summary – We are looking for a CRM / Database Specialist who can design, organize, and maintain a clean, scalable CRM system. This role requires someone experienced in database architecture, data hygiene, and workflow automation focused on backend data integrity (not marketing campaigns).



You will be responsible for structuring the CRM, standardizing data, maintaining clean records, and ensuring the system supports long-term growth and reporting.



The client is currently using ActiveCampaign and may migrate to GoHighLevel, so experience with both platforms is highly preferred.



Please read all REQUIRED conditions below before applying 



REQUIRED: Proven experience managing CRM systems and database structures

REQUIRED: Experience with data cleanup, deduplication, and merging records

REQUIRED: Strong understanding of CRM architecture (fields, tags, custom objects, relationships)

REQUIRED: Experience building workflows/automations for database updates and hygiene (not
 marketing)

REQUIRED: Experience with ActiveCampaign and/or GoHighLevel

REQUIRED: Comfortable using a time-tracking system

REQUIRED: Ability to work 10 hours per week consistently



1. When you message us to apply, you MUST include the sentence below in the subject line or first sentence of your message. Applications that do not include this will be automatically discarded:



“I can work 10 hours per week, I’m comfortable using a time-tracking system, and I can attend the stand-up call. I am reliable, proactive, and detail-oriented. My experience includes CRM systems (list platforms such as ActiveCampaign, GoHighLevel, etc.), and I have experience with database management including deduplication, standardization, workflows, and CRM structuring.”



2. A link to your CV, resume, or portfolio showing relevant CRM/database work (required) 



Responsibilities:

• Design and maintain CRM database structure (fields, tags, pipelines, relationships)

• Standardize data setup, naming conventions, and system organization

• Perform ongoing database cleanup including deduplication and record merging

• Build and maintain account/contact hierarchies

• Create workflows and automations for database hygiene (e.g., tagging, field updates, lifecycle stages)

• Audit CRM data regularly to ensure accuracy and consistency

• Support CRM migration (if applicable) from ActiveCampaign to GoHighLevel

• Document processes and maintain an organized system structure



Preferred Experience & Skills:

• Strong experience in CRM database design and architecture

• Experience with BOTH ActiveCampaign and GoHighLevel

• Experience handling CRM migrations and data mapping

• Familiarity with Zapier, Make, APIs, or other integration tools

• Understanding of reporting structures and segmentation strategies

• High attention to detail and strong problem-solving skills



Stretch Goals/responsibilities

• Recommend improvements to CRM structure and data flow

• Build scalable systems to support marketing and sales teams

• Assist with integrations between CRM and other tools

• Conduct periodic CRM audits and optimization reviews

title: Appointment Setter (Phone-Based) – Dance Studio
description:
We are a premium ballroom dance studio based in Richmond, Virginia. We help adults build confidence, connection, and joy through dance.



We are hiring a phone-based appointment setter to follow up with leads and book intro lessons.



This is not a general VA role — this is a phone + people + light sales role.



What You’ll Do:

Call and text new leads who won a free dance lesson through a contest

Follow up with no-shows and past leads

Guide conversations and turn interest into commitment

Book intro lessons into our schedule

Confirm appointments and reduce cancellations

Update notes clearly in our CRM

Important Context:



Most leads come from a contest giveaway, so:



Some are excited

Some are unsure

Some are distracted



Your role is to build excitement, create comfort, and help them d
 to come in.



What Success Looks Like:

Leads are contacted quickly (5–10 minutes when possible)

Conversations feel natural and professional (not scripted)

You confidently guide people to a scheduled time

Booked students show up for their lesson

30 leads booked in each week (270 by the beginning of July)



This Role Requires:

Excellent spoken English (clear, confident, natural)

Strong phone presence (this is the main job)

Ability to guide conversations (not just answer questions)

Confidence handling hesitation:

“I’m busy”

“I’ll think about it”

“Maybe later”

Friendly, warm, and persistent personality

Ability to work U.S. business hours (EST)

Reliable internet + quiet workspace

Pay:

$10/hour

20 hours per week

Opportunity for increased hours + bonuses based on performance (booked + attended lessons)

IMPORTANT – TO APPLY:

Send a 1-minute voice recording as if you are calling someone who:

Won a free dance lesson

Sounds a little unsure

title: PV (pharmacovigilance) Clinical Trial case processing experience (need 25 VA's)
description:
The Pharmacovigilance Associate is a fully WFH role and is responsible for the intake, processing, and management of safety cases arising from clinical trials. This role focuses on accurate documentation, evaluation, and reporting of adverse events in compliance with global pharmacovigilance regulations, study protocols, and company procedures.



Essential Functions:

• Perform case intake, triage, and data entry of adverse events, serious adverse events, and SUSARs from clinical trial sources

• Process safety cases in accordance with regulatory guidelines, study protocols, and internal standard operating procedures

• Review and interpret source documents including CIOMS forms, MedWatch reports, investigator communications, and clinical trial documentation

• Conduct medical review of cases and perform causality and expectedness assessments based on investigator reports and protocol requirements

• Perform case follow up with investigators or study teams to obtain missing information and ensure data completeness

• Manage safety queries and ensure timely resolution of case discrepancies

• Prepare and submit expedited safety reports to regulatory authorities, ethics committees, and investigators within required timelines

• Maintain accurate documentation and ensure compliance with global pharmacovigilance standards and reporting regulations





Knowledge, Skills, and Abilities:

• Experience in pharmacovigilance case processing within clinical trials

• Strong understanding of adverse event reporting, serious adverse events, and SUSAR reporting requirements

• Familiarity with global safety reporting regulations and clinical trial safety procedures

• Experience reviewing clinical safety documentation such as CIOMS and MedWatch forms

• Strong attention to detail and ability to meet strict regulatory timelines



Safety Database Experience:

• Argus Safety

• ARISg

• PV Edge

• Preferred experience with Veeva Vault Safety and EDC databases



Education:

• Bachelor’s degree in Life Sciences, Pharmacy, Nursing, or related field preferred.



If you qualify and are interested in the job, please send your intro video and updated CV to 
 and we will get in touch with you for a quick interview.

title: [URGENT] Customer Success Manager / Product Specialist - EST TIMEZONE
description:
We are looking for a highly customer-focused Customer Success Manager / Product Specialist who will serve as the primary product expert for our platform. This role requires someone who deeply understands the product and can confidently guide customers through onboarding, product usage, troubleshooting, and best practices.



The ideal candidate is experienced in handling client relationships, answering product-related questions, conducting product demonstrations, and ensuring customers maximize the value of the platform. You will act as a trusted partner to customers by helping them successfully adopt the product while providing timely support and strategic guidance.



This role requires strong communication skills, product expertise, and the ability to manage customer concerns with professionalism and empathy.



Key Responsibilities



Customer Onboarding & Adoption

• Guide new customers through the onboarding process, ensuring a smooth and successful setup.

• Help clients understand product capabilities and best practices to accelerate adoption.

• Provide clear walkthroughs and training sessions to ensure customers can effectively use the platform.



Product Expertise & Customer Support

• Serve as the primary product expert and point of contact for customer questions.

• Provide timely support by diagnosing issues, answering inquiries, and guiding customers toward solutions.

• Maintain a strong understanding of product features, updates, and workflows to assist customers effectively.



Client Relationship Management

• Build strong, long-term relationships with customers and key stakeholders.

• Act as a trusted advisor by proactively identifying opportunities to improve the customer experience.

• Ensure customers feel supported and confident using the platform.



Product Demonstrations & Training

• Conduct product demos for new and existing clients.

• Provide guidance and recommendations based on client needs and use cases.

• Help customers understand how to best leverage the product for their workflows.



Customer Retention & Success

• Monitor customer health, engagement, and satisfaction.

• Proactively identify risks or potential issues and address them before they impact customer experience.

• Work closely with internal teams to ensure customer feedback is communicated and addressed.



Key Qualifications & Skills

Experience

• 3–5+ years of experience in Customer Success, Account Management, Client Support, or similar customer-facing roles.

• Proven experience managing and supporting clients in a SaaS or technology-driven environment is highly preferred.



Customer Handling Expertise

• Strong background in managing customer relationships and handling inquiries professionally.

• Ability to remain calm, solution-oriented, and empathetic when resolving customer concerns.



Communication Skills

• Excellent verbal and written communication skills.

• Comfortable presenting product features, running demos, and explaining technical concepts to non-technical users.



Product & Technical Aptitude

• Ability to quickly become an expert in the platform and confidently support users.

• Comfortable troubleshooting workflows, product features, and user issues.



Problem-Solving & Empathy

• Strong analytical and critical thinking skills.

• Ability to understand customer pain points and provide practical, customer-focused solutions.



Typical Success Metrics (KPIs)

• Customer Satisfaction Score (CSAT)

• Net Promoter Score (NPS)

• Customer Retention Rate

• Product Adoption and Engagement

• Response and Resolution Time for Customer Support
