title: Product Operations Manager (Post-Purchase & Documentation)
description:
PS: Google Docs version (same content, easier to read): 

----------------------



PRODUCT OPERATIONS MANAGER (POST-PURCHASE & DOCUMENTATION)

Own install success, documentation, and SKU health (Green/Yellow/Red)



ABOUT MERGE SCREENS????

At Merge Screens, we help truck owners upgrade their driving experience with Tesla?style screens and advanced infotainment systems. Our products are highly technical, installed by real people in real driveways and shops. When installation goes well, customers love us. When it doesn’t, returns and support explode.



We’re looking for a Product Manager who will own that gap.



ROLE OVERVIEW???????????

Your north star:

"You own post-purchase product success after launch. Your job is to turn every SKU into a low?return, low?support, high?review product we can confidently market and scale."



This is not a “feature roadmap” PM role. It’s a hands?dirty, post?purchase, fix?what’s?broken role. You’ll live between our customers, our support team, and our manufacturers to make sure our products actually work in the real world and are safe to scale.



products actually work in the real world and are safe to scale.

This is documentation-heavy. Expect 70–90% of your output to be installation + troubleshooting content and product-page truth alignment across SKUs.



You ensure alignment between product page claims ? what’s in the box ? manufacturer specs ? install steps ? troubleshooting flows.



Most problems you’ll solve are mismatches, missing steps/assets, or unclear expectations — not “new features.”





KEY RESPONSIBILITIES????

1) Fix & standardise documentation + product truth (execution-first | first 30 days)

• Add “What’s in the box” page to every installation guide

• Align product pages with shipped accessories (example: dashcam mismatch)

• Build a manufacturer truth table (amp support, harness differences, etc.)

• Fix key SKU instruction gaps (missing videos/steps)

• Standardize required product page assets (back-of-screen photos)

Output: shipped doc/page updates every week. No “research-only” weeks.



2) Run the post-purchase improvement loop (reduce support + returns)

• Use support tickets/calls + WhatsApp tech groups + return reasons to find patterns

• Write short root-cause summaries for problem SKUs (what’s happening + why)

• Convert recurring problems into documentation upgrades:

   - troubleshooting flows, “do not do this” warnings, checklists, rescue guides

• Close the loop with manufacturers:

   - escalate issues, request fixes/parts, track known issues until resolved

• Improve expectation-setting on product pages:

   - limitations, fitment notes, difficulty/skill level, aligned claims

Output: fewer repeat issues because the answer is now in the docs and on the page.



3) Keep SKUs in a clear “status system” the company trusts

• Maintain a simple SKU status board:

   - Green = safe, Yellow = monitor, Red = fix/pause

• Recommend actions for Red SKUs:

   - pause ads, deactivate SKU, replace variant/manufacturer

• Support “field test before scaling” for risky SKUs (small batch ? document friction ? update ? Green)

Output: clear decisions, fewer “silent bad SKUs,” and predictable scaling.





TOOLS YOU'LL USE????

You’ll work with Shopify, Google Sheets/Docs/Drive, WhatsApp support groups, our support inbox/CRM, and direct manufacturer comms.





WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR????????

You’re a fit if you are:

• Outcome-obsessed owner: You take extreme ownership of post-purchase results for your SKUs (return rate, support volume, customer satisfaction).



• Analytical (80/20): You can turn support tickets, return reasons, and WhatsApp chats into clear patterns, priorities, and next actions.



• Strong problem solver: You can separate doc gaps vs product defects vs compatibility vs wrong expectations, and run a plan until it’s fixed.



• Documentation killer (with polish): You create clear, foolproof install guides, checklists, warnings, troubleshooting flows, and versioned updates — with clean formatting and consistent structure. You don’t need to be a designer, but you can brief/collaborate with one to produce high-quality docs.



• Customer-empathic communicator: You think like a DIY installer with low tech knowledge and write in simple, step-by-step language.



• Technically comfortable & assertive: Not an engineer, but confident with hardware basics (wiring, harnesses, connectors, firmware, vehicle basics). You can push suppliers for fixes and keep Customer Support + Marketing aligned on what’s true and safe to promise.



• Fast, organized, and decisive: You ship v1 improvements quickly, track SKU status (Green/Yellow/Red), keep work visible, and have the judgment to recommend pausing/discontinuing a product if it can’t be fixed properly.



Nice to have (not required):

• Aftermarket automotive electronics experience

• E-commerce returns reduction experience

• Knowledge base / SOP building

• Ability to record quick troubleshooting videos





BENEFITS????

• 40h/week full-time long-term position within Merge Screens

• Base salary of USD 1.200/month

• Performance bonus: 15% of additional profit saved from reduced returns and support load (baseline vs current) after base is covered. Paid quarterly, capped at $200/month.

• 15 paid vacation days per year

• Remote?friendly work environment with flexibility to set fixed working hours

• Direct access to founders and fast decision?making (no corporate BS)

• Opportunity to own a mission?critical function and see your work directly impact revenue, customer happiness, and brand reputation



If you’re the kind of person who can’t stand seeing customers struggle, loves fixing real?world product issues, and wants full ownership of the outcome, we’d love to hear from you.



HOW TO APPLY????

1. Short intro (max 200 words)

• Start your intro with the word “BULLSEYE” at the very top to show you read the full job post.

• Applications without this keyword won’t be reviewed.

• Tell us: who you are, where you’re based, and why this role (post-purchase + documentation) fits you.



2) 1-minute voice note (required)

• Record a ~60 second voice message.

• Explain how you think you would help Merge Screens in this role (what you’d improve, how you’d approach it, and what outcomes you’d drive).



3) Screening questions

• Please answer the screening questions below.

• Please answer in your own words. Generic or copy-pasted answers won’t be considered.



A. First 30 days (prioritization): If you joined tomorrow, what are the first 3 things you would fix in the first 30 days — and why? (Bullets only)

B. Truth alignment scenario: The dashcam shown on the website isn’t the same as what’s being shipped. Walk us through exactly how you would resolve this end-to-end (what you verify, who you talk to, and what you update across site/docs/internal notes).

C. Root-cause method: When a SKU has high returns/support, how do you determine whether it’s a documentation issue vs product defect vs compatibility vs wrong expectations? Describe your method.

D. Writing clarity test (DIY installer): Rewrite this for a non-technical customer in 2–4 short steps: “If there is no sound after installation, check the amplifier setting and make sure the correct harness is connected.”

E. Documentation system: How would you ensure installation + troubleshooting documentation stays updated and consistent across many SKUs as new issues appear? (Process/cadence/versioning/templates)

title: Short-Form Video Editor / Clipper (Instagram Reels & TikTok)
description:
We are looking for a short-form video editor / clipper to create vertical content for Instagram Reels and TikTok.



This role is focused on clipping, pacing, and clean edits on a regular basis. It will start with part time but if you fit in the team this can become a full time role.



You will work with provided raw footage and turn it into engaging, platform-native short-form videos.



RESPONSIBILITIES

• Edit short-form vertical videos (Reels / TikToks/Youtube Shorts/Snapchat Spotlight)

• Create multiple videos from the same raw footage

• Apply clean cuts, pacing, and basic subtitles when needed

• Ensure videos feel native to Instagram and TikTok

• add different edits for different content-formats ( interviews/aestetic videos/ Text to speech videos/ transitions/skits and more)



CONTENT & TREND AWARENESS (IMPORTANT)

• You must be an active consumer of Instagram Reels and TikTok

• You understand modern short-form pacing and flow

• You can apply trends instinctively, without detailed creative instructions

• You find ways to make the the most of a single video without losing focus on quality



REQUIREMENTS

• expert level experience editing short-form content

• Strong understanding of Reels/TikTok pacing

• fluent in english

• Reliable internet and availability

• Attention to detail and consistency

• proactive and responsive



HOW TO APPLY



Please include:

1. Your experience editing short-form videos

2. examples of videos you created for other clients in the past

3. our standard application process includes that all applicants edit 3 different video examples (you can watermark them )

-> IF YOU'RE NOT OKAY WITH THAT PLEASE DONT APPLY



Applications without these details will not be considered.

Looking forward to hearing from you!

title: Digital Marketer - Creatives & Website Management (Remote)
description:
Please follow the application instructions below.



About PropFix.ie



PropFix.ie is Ireland's trusted property maintenance specialist, offering comprehensive solutions with years of expertise across the construction and renovation sectors. We transform spaces through our diverse range of services, from handyman solutions and office fit-outs to complete renovations, house extensions, and specialized installations including doors, floors, and partitions.



Our commitment to delivering the best value property maintenance has established us as a reliable partner for residential and commercial clients nationwide. With decades of experience, including 50 years of expertise in garage conversions, we pride ourselves on impeccable craftsmanship, turning our clients' visions into reality while ensuring their properties remain in top condition.



Role Overview

We are seeking a creative and results-driven Digital Marketing Specialist to join our dynamic team. This role focuses on enhancing our online presence, managing multi-platform social media campaigns, and driving lead generation through strategic digital marketing initiatives. The successful candidate will be responsible for improving website visibility, creating engaging content, and managing targeted advertising campaigns across various platforms to expand our reach and grow our client base.



Key Responsibilities

SEO & Website Optimization



Search Engine Optimization: Improve website ranking and visibility through strategic SEO implementation

Keyword Research: Identify and apply high-converting search terms to maximize organic reach

Content Optimization: Ensure all web content is optimized for search engines and user engagement



Social Media Management



Platform Management: Manage and optimize
, Instagram, and TikTok accounts for maximum engagement

Content Creation: Produce engaging posts, graphics, and short videos that align with brand messaging

Community Management: Respond to comments, inquiries, and messages across all social platforms in a timely and professional manner

Brand Consistency: Ensure consistent messaging and visual identity across all platforms



Digital Advertising & Campaign Management



Paid Advertising: Run targeted ads on Meta 
/Instagram), Google, and TikTok platforms

Campaign Development: Create and manage comprehensive digital marketing campaigns, with particular focus on fitness studio and related sectors

Performance Tracking: Monitor, analyze, and report on campaign performance and conversions

Budget Management: Optimize ad spend and ROI across all advertising platforms



Content Management & Brand Development



Content Upload: Upload creatives, blogs, and campaign updates across digital platforms

Visual Content: Design and produce graphics, videos, and other visual content for marketing campaigns

Brand Messaging: Maintain consistent brand voice and messaging across all marketing materials



Required Skills & Experience

Technical Requirements



Digital Marketing: Proven experience in digital marketing, social media management, and online advertising

Platform Expertise: Hands-on experience with
 Ads Manager, Google Ads, TikTok Ads, and social media management tools

SEO Knowledge: Strong understanding of SEO principles, keyword research, and website optimization techniques

Analytics: Proficiency with Google Analytics, social media insights, and performance tracking tools



Creative Skills



Content Creation: Experience in creating engaging social media content, graphics, and short-form videos

Design Software: Proficiency with design tools such as Canva, Adobe Creative Suite, or similar platforms

Video Editing: Basic video editing skills for social media content creation

Copywriting: Strong writing skills for creating compelling ad copy and social media posts



Professional Skills



Campaign Management: Experience managing multi-platform advertising campaigns and budgets

Communication: Excellent written and verbal communication skills for community management

Analytical Thinking: Strong analytical skills to interpret data and optimize campaign performance

Organization: Ability to manage multiple campaigns and projects simultaneously

Adaptability: Stay current with digital marketing trends and platform updates



What We Offer

Competitive salary package

Opportunity to shape the digital presence of Ireland's leading property maintenance company

Professional development and training opportunities in the latest digital marketing trends

Collaborative and supportive remote work environment

Career growth potential within an expanding company

Creative freedom to develop innovative marketing strategies

Involvement in diverse campaigns across multiple business sectors

Remote working flexibility with comprehensive marketing tools and support



Instruction:

Please complete the attached application form and submit it along with your CV:

title: Certified Public Accountant (CPA) - REMOTE
description:
We are a US-based custom manufacturing company, and we are looking for dedicated and loyal individuals that can contribute to our goals. We are looking for individuals who Embodies Our Core Values, Serve Others and Own It!



We are looking for Certified Public Accountants!



Key Responsibilities:

- Analyze, organize, update financial records.

- Perform regular, detailed audits to ensure accuracy in financial documents, expenditures, and investments.

- Perform daily reconciliation of credit card, bank accounts, cash accounts, spending accounts, etc.

- Setup financial accounts as needed.

- Oversee ledger reconciliation and manage accounts payable/receivables.

- Liaise with Tax Accountants to track tax payments and returns.

- Monitor bookkeeping activities regularly.

- Keep company financial information confidential.

- Ensure vendor accounts are kept up to date for the entire organization.

- Inventory Management

- China Purchase Management



Qualifications:

- Excellent FLUENT English verbal and written communication.

- Candidate must possess at least Bachelor’s/College Degree in relevant field.

- Proven work experience as a Certified Public Accountant (CPA).

- Understanding of Generally Accepted Accounting Principles (GAAP).

- Preferably experienced accounting/finance employees specializing in US Accounting System.

- Familiarity with accounting applications, modules, and financial statements.

- Motivation to exceed expectations while working independently

- Friendly, fast learner who can adapt to change and have a “can-do” attitude

- Proficient computer skills in Microsoft Office, Outlook, Google, Internet Explorer, Microsoft Teams, etc.



System Requirements:

- Computer Processor: Minimum 5th generation Intel i5 processor or equivalent

- Computer Memory/RAM: Minimum 4.00 GB

- Computer Operating System: Windows 10 or Mac OSX - No Linux, Unix, or any operating system other than what is required.

- Internet Speed: Running on a 5.0 MBPS plan or higher (Both primary and backup) - If your backup connection cannot serve as your primary connection, that does not qualify as a backup connection

- REQUIRED Headset: Noise-cancelling headset connected via USB port

- REQUIRED WebCam: At least 3 megapixels capable of 720p recording



***We’re picky. You must be smart, savvy, strategic, fun, and ready to learn fast and work hard. If you’re up for the challenge, we want to hear from you!

Ensure compliance with
 marketing best practices to avoid blacklisting, especially with healthcare servers.

Number of verified hospital contacts added monthly (target: 300+). 

Number of high-quality, engaged leads generated (target: 10–15 per month). 

 open rate (target: >35%) and reply rate (target: >8%). 

Number of
 campaigns executed per quarter (target: 2–3).

Timely reporting and insights provided weekly. 

Consistency in messaging and alignment with brand tone and values. 

 



???? Requirements: 



Proven experience in lead generation, sales development, or
 outreach (healthcare industry preferred). 

Strong research skills and attention to detail. 

Familiarity with tools like SendGrid, Odoo (or similar CRM) 

Clear, persuasive written communication skills. 

Ability to work independently and manage time effectively. 

Comfortable handling large data lists and segmenting based on target criteria. 

 



???? Preferred: 



Prior experience generating leads within hospitals or the healthcare industry. 

Experience integrating CRM data for outreach and reporting.

title: Academic Thesis Editor Needed – Final Submission Preparation
description:
We are looking for a meticulous academic editor or thesis specialist to prepare a completed Master’s thesis for final university submission.



This project is not a collaborative editing process or a long revision cycle. The thesis has already been written. The goal is to bring the document to a fully submission-ready standard with minimal input from the client.



If you are experienced with academic formatting, citation verification, and final manuscript polishing, this project may be a good fit.



Important Application Note:

All applicants must apply through the Google Sheet link provided below so we can properly track and review submissions.



Project Responsibilities

1. University Formatting Implementation

The editor will apply the official university formatting requirements exactly as outlined in the provided guidelines and sample documents.



This includes adjusting:

Page margins

Heading hierarchy

Page numbering and pagination

Table of Contents formatting

Citation formatting

Appendix formatting

Section structure and order



A detailed formatting guide will be provided and must be followed strictly.



2. Citation & Reference Review

Conduct a complete audit of citations and references throughout the thesis.



Tasks include:

Verifying citation accuracy

Ensuring all in-text citations appear in the reference list

Identifying missing or inconsistent sources

Correcting citation formatting errors

Ensuring full compliance with the required citation style



3. Final Document Refinement

Perform a final professional polish of the manuscript, including:

Grammar and sentence clarity improvements

Consistency in formatting across sections

Fixing alignment and spacing issues

Removing leftover formatting artifacts

Ensuring the thesis reads smoothly as a cohesive academic wor



4. Final Deliverables

The completed thesis must be delivered in:

Microsoft Word (.docx)

PDF format



The expectation is a fully submission-ready document that requires no additional editing.



Timeline

The project must be completed within 3 weeks from assignment.



Work Style

This role requires someone who can work independently and efficiently.



Communication will be minimal. The editor should only reach out if:

A critical clarification is needed

A structural issue impacts the final deliverable

Ideal Candidate



The ideal applicant will have:

Prior experience editing Master’s or PhD theses

Strong understanding of academic formatting standards

Familiarity with citation styles such as APA, MLA, or Chicago

Advanced Microsoft Word formatting skills

Exceptional attention to detail

Ability to work independently and deliver high-quality work



How to Apply

Please submit your application through the Google Sheet using the link below:







Qualified candidates will be contacted for the next step.

title: Client Support & Media Operations Specialist
description:
We are a rapidly expanding Florida-based media company specializing in premium visual marketing solutions for the real estate industry. title: Video Editor
description:
Remote Video Editor



We are a Dubai-based Real Estate company



We're looking for a self-driven video editor who doesn't need babysitting. You'll own post-production across YouTube and short-form (Instagram Reels + TikTok) for our team of real estate agents.



What you'll edit:

— YouTube: podcasts, vlogs, property tours, market commentary

— Short-form: Reels and TikToks repurposed from long-form + native vertical content

— Real estate / luxury lifestyle niche



What we need from you:

— Can work independently — you get a brief, you deliver, no hand-holding

— Creative eye — you bring ideas, not just execution

— Strong understanding of hooks, pacing, and retention

— Experience with AI editing tools (Opus Clip, Descript, Runway, etc.)

Bonus if you bring high level motion graphics skills (After Effects — animated titles, lower thirds, data visualizations).



 Full-time | English required

title: Virtual Assistant (Research, Email & Data Entry) – 20 Hours/Week to Start (Australian Business Hours)
description:
Virtual Assistant (Research, Email & Data Entry) – 20 Hours/Week to Start (Australian Business Hours)



About the Role

We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to assist with research, email  tasks, and general data entry.

The role will start at 20 hours per week and will initially involve simple administrative tasks. For the right candidate who performs well and shows initiative, there is clear opportunity to grow into a full-time role in client relations, with increased responsibility and higher pay.



We are looking for someone who wants to grow with the company long-term, not just a short-term project.

You must be available to work during Australian business hours.



Responsibilities

Your tasks will include:

• Online research and compiling information into spreadsheets or simple reports

•Email related tasks and written communication with clients

• Data entry and organizing information in documents or spreadsheets

• Following clear instructions and completing tasks accurately



Requirements

• Excellent written English (essential)

• Reliable internet connection

• Available during Australian business hours

• Strong attention to detail

• Ability to follow instructions carefully

• Reliable communication and responsiveness

Previous experience with research, data entry, or virtual assistant work is preferred but not essential.



Hours & Pay

Initially: 20 hours per week for 1–2 weeks

Paid weekly: Pay will be reviewed after the first month, with increases based on performance, output, and quality of work.



Growth Opportunity

This role starts with administrative support tasks, but we are looking for someone who wants to grow with the company.

A strong candidate may transition into a full-time client relations role, which includes:

• greater responsibility

• more client interaction

• higher pay



Interview Process

Shortlisted candidates will be invited to attend a short video interview before a final decision is made.



Application Instructions



Please introduce yourself in no more than 3 sentences and briefly describe your experience with research or data entry.



Please complete the short 3-part task below.



Part 1 – Comprehension

Read the paragraph below and answer the question.

"When completing online research tasks, it is important to verify information before recording it. Information found online can sometimes be outdated or incorrect, so checking multiple sources can help improve accuracy."



Question:

In one or two sentences, explain why it is important to verify information when doing online research.



Part 2 – Writing

Please rewrite the following sentence so it sounds more professional:

"hi john i checked the spreadsheet but some of the information is missing can you send the correct details thanks"



Part 3 – Simple Task

Imagine you were given a spreadsheet with 100 businesses and needed to find the website and contact email for each one.

Briefly explain the steps you would take to complete this task efficiently.



To confirm you have read this job description carefully, please begin your application with the word Harbour.

title: Social Media Marketing Assistant
description:
About the Role

We are a fast-growing influencer marketing agency based in the US working with major wellness brands on TikTok Shop creator campaigns. We are looking for a warm, organized, and proactive Full-Time Virtual Assistant to manage the onboarding and day-to-day community experience for our Wellness Partner creator program.

This is a people-first role. Your job is to make every new creator feel personally welcomed, fully set up, and excited to be part of our community. You will be the first point of contact for hundreds of creators joining our
 community, and your warmth and attention to detail will directly impact how engaged and successful they are.



What You Will Do

Welcome every new creator who joins our
 community with a personal message within 30 minutes of them joining

Send personalized 1-on-1 DMs to every new member within 24 hours of them joining

Follow up with new creators to make sure they are set up on TikTok Shop (collab invites, product showcase, content posting)

Post Zoom call links before our daily community calls (Monday to Friday, 7:00 PM EST) and replay links after each call

Monitor the community group throughout the day and respond to questions, comments, and messages

Track which new members have been welcomed and followed up with using a simple spreadsheet

Escalate any complaints, product issues, or sensitive situations to your manager immediately

Help maintain a positive, warm, and active community culture



What We Are Looking For

At least 1 year of experience in customer service, community management, or social media management

Excellent written English - you must be able to write warm, natural, conversational messages that do not sound copy-pasted or robotic

Familiarity with TikTok and TikTok Shop (experience with creator programs or affiliate marketing is a big plus)

Experience using
 (or ability to learn quickly)

Highly organized and reliable - this role requires showing up every day and following a checklist without being reminded

Available to work evenings Philippine time (7:00 PM EST = 7:00 AM PHT the following day) at least 5 days a week

Proactive communicator - you flag problems before they become issues and ask questions when unsure

Genuinely warm and people-oriented - you enjoy making others feel good



Nice to Have

Experience working with influencers, content creators, or UGC campaigns

Experience with TikTok Shop affiliate or creator programs

Experience managing
 groups or communities



Schedule

Full-time, 30 hours per week. Monday to Friday. Must be available for the daily 7:00 PM EST call window (posting links, monitoring chat during the call).

Why Work With Us

Fully remote, work from home

Long-term stable position with room to grow

Supportive team environment - you will have a direct manager (Bella) who is always available to guide you

You will be part of an exciting, fast-growing creator community in the wellness space

Competitive salary based on experience



How to Apply

Please send us a short voice or video message (1-2 minutes) introducing yourself and telling us why you would be great at this role. Written applications without a voice or video message will not be considered.



Send to my assistants 



Also include:

Your resume or work history

2-3 examples of customer service or community messages you have written in the past (screenshots are fine)

We are looking for someone who genuinely loves people and takes pride in making others feel welcome. If that sounds like you, we would love to hear from you.

title: Financial Analyst & HR Operations Specialist (US HR & Financial Experience Required)
description:
[This is a DIRECT hire]



We are seeking a detail-oriented, analytical, and service-driven Financial Analyst & HR Operations Specialist to support our clients across financial reporting & forecasting, HR operations, payroll, and compliance.



We are a management consulting company that supports small business owners who want to grow sustainably without taking on equity investors. We support growth strategy, finance, operations, human resources, and systems related to those areas, for a wide variety of business types. We typically start with businesses when they reach US$500,000 - $2 million in revenues and stay with them until they are ready to hire senior leaders, at $10-$15 million.



You’ll work directly with the company’s CEO and our small business owner clients, helping them understand their numbers, streamline back-office functions, and stay compliant with state and federal requirements. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys blending finance, HR, and operational problem-solving while collaborating closely with others.



Key Responsibilities



1. Finance Support & Reporting

- Using our forecasting methodology, build 1–2 year forecasts and pro forma models for US businesses (including payroll, debt, and operating expenses).

- Support the CEO in preparing agendas and reports for clients’ monthly business reviews.

- Review and interpret monthly financial statements; identify trends, variances, and actionable insights.

- Validate closed books prepared by accountants or bookkeeping teams.

- Use accounting software to pull reports, review transactions, and support analysis (closing is a plus, not required).

- Translate financial data into clear, practical explanations for clients.



2. HR & Payroll Operations

- Manage HR workflows in Gusto or Rippling: policies, employee documents, onboarding & offboarding.

- Run payroll cycles, bonus runs, and exit payroll accurately and on time.

- Manage quarterly and year-end tax reporting.

- Set up benefits and ensure deductions (including retirement plans) sync correctly.

- Monitor the HR support inbox and resolve client requests promptly.

- Maintain secure, organized digital HR files.



3. Compliance & Administrative Support

- Understand rules for US small business designations like sole proprietor, LLC, and S-corporation.

- Handle compliance registrations via CorpNet or state portals.

- Track notices, filings, and deadlines to keep clients compliant.

- Research employment requirements using the company’s paid SHRM account.



4. Client Partnership & Support

- Work closely with business owners to provide clarity on financial and HR processes.

- Respond to client questions promptly, accurately, and with a service-oriented approach.

- Offer insights that help clients run smoother, more compliant operations.

- And any other tasks or responsibilities assigned



Required Technical Skills



- Ability to read and interpret financial statements

- Experience building financial forecasts or pro formas

- Proficiency with cloud-based accounting software (QBO, Xero, etc.)

- Hands-on experience with Gusto or Rippling

- Familiarity with employer compliance workflows



Strong proficiency with:

- Google Workspace

- Airtable

- Excel/Sheets (modeling, formulas, cleanup)

- HR systems & secure file management



Nice to Have:

- Experience assisting with monthly book closings

- Multi-state employer compliance knowledge

- SHRM-based research experience



Experience & Background

- Proven extensive experience in finance operations (planning, analysis, reporting), HR operations, payroll, or business operations.

- Experience supporting small businesses or service-based companies

- Strong analytical ability and clear communication skills

- High accuracy in financial, payroll, and compliance work

- Trusted with sensitive data and confidential information



Working Style & Personality

- Curious, detail-driven, and analytical

- Warm, client-focused, and collaborative

- Organized, reliable, and thorough

- Strong follow-through; comfortable with process-heavy tasks

- Calm, professional, and proactive

- High integrity when handling financial and HR data



What this role includes

This is a full-time remote position. The role offers a weekly compensation rate, so you can focus on the work and not manage the clock. Includes provisioned access to our company’s cloud-based systems, a monthly technology stipend for use of your internet and computer, and a health insurance allowance.



Why This Role Matters

We believe in founders who want to make a change through their work. We partner with our small business owners to support the self-funded growth of their companies, without asking them to compromise the integrity of their strongly-held beliefs and principles. We do not apply a “program” to our clients, but work with them to design a business that builds their financial security and aligns with their purpose. We serve as a trusted operating partner across strategy, operations, human resources, finance, and systems, and a trusted personal partner in meeting their own goals. We support their growth as people and leaders.



We will be conducting a PAID trial test to ensure that we will be hiring someone who can be highly accurate (error-free), keen on details and will not require hand-holding.



Kindly complete the form below so we can process your application.






WE WILL NOT ENTERTAIN CANDIDATES WITHOUT THE COMPLETED APPLICATION FORM.

title: Cold Caller / Sales Caller (Outbound)
description:
Important – Read Before Applying



Serious applicants only.



A minimum of 20 application points is required to be considered for this role.



Please do not apply if you do not meet this requirement.



Applications that do not meet the minimum criteria will be automatically rejected.



We are only looking for candidates who meet the experience and performance standards outlined in this role.





-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Full-Time | Remote

Monday to Friday, 9:00am – 5:00pm (UK Time)

$705.00 - $865.00 per month

?



Role Overview



We are hiring a female Cold Caller / Sales Caller to handle high-volume outbound calls to businesses daily.



This role is 100% phone-based sales.



Your responsibility is to speak with decision-makers, generate interest, and book appointments or move deals forward.



This is not a basic role — you must be confident on the phone and comfortable handling rejection.



?



Key Responsibilities



• Make outbound sales calls daily (high volume)

• Speak directly with business owners and decision-makers

• Introduce services and generate interest

• Handle objections confidently

• Book appointments or move prospects to next stage

• Maintain accurate call notes and updates

• Follow up with leads when required



?



Requirements



• Minimum 3+ years experience (2022–2026) in cold calling or outbound sales

• Strong, confident speaking voice and communication skills

• Proven experience handling high call volumes daily

• Ability to handle rejection and stay consistent

• Strong objection handling skills

• Self-motivated and target-driven

• Ability to work independently without supervision

• Professional attitude when speaking with clients



?



Important



• This role is calls only – all day, every day

• No training will be provided

• Do not apply if you are not experienced in cold calling

• You must be fully available during working hours

• You must be comfortable speaking with businesses



?



Performance Expectations



• Consistent daily call activity

• Ability to generate conversations and interest

• Booking appointments or progressing leads

• Maintaining professional communication

• Hitting daily and weekly targets



?



Application Requirements

WHEN APPLY SUBJECT LINE MUST STATE :26CALLSALES

To be considered, you must include:

 1. Your current role and daily responsibilities

 2. Your experience with cold calling / outbound sales

 3. Average number of calls per day in previous roles

 4. Your conversion or booking results

 5. CRM or tools used

 6. Your WhatsApp contact number



?



Important – Read Before Applying



Serious applicants only.



Do not apply if you do not have real cold calling experience.



This is a performance-based role — you must be confident on the phone and able to deliver results.

title: 2D Animator (Short Comedy Animation)
description: We are looking for a talented 2D animator to create short funny animated videos similar to the Rico Animations style on YouTube. The animator will produce stick-figure or simplified character animations using tools like FlipaClip or similar apps. Content will include comedy sketches, meme-based videos, and trending social media content for YouTube Shorts, TikTok, and Instagram Reels. The animator must be able to deliver 3 videos per week (Tuesday, Friday, Sunday schedule). Videos should include character movement, lip sync or voice-over integration, sound effects, and basic video editing. Experience with viral/meme-style animation is a strong plus.

title: AMAZON PPC MANAGER
description:
Hiring: Amazon PPC Strategist 

We’re looking for a data-driven Amazon Ads specialist to manage and scale campaigns across multiple client accounts at Daybreak Growth Partners.



Location: Remote (EST working hours preferred)

Working Hours: 6:00 AM – 3:00 PM (EST)

Flexible by a few hours based on mutual agreement



Key Responsibilities

- Develop and execute PPC strategies across Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, and Sponsored Display

- Launch, structure, and manage campaigns for 15 client accounts (12 small + 3 large)

Perform daily optimizations:

*** What We’re Looking For

Strong experience with Amazon PPC (multi-account management preferred)

Analytical mindset with a focus on performance optimization

Ability to manage both detail-oriented tasks and big-picture strategy

Excellent communication skills for client-facing discussions

title: Lead Generation Specialist
description:
We are seeking for a proactive, detail-oriented Lead Generation Specialist to drive consistent and high-quality leads from hospitals across the United States. This in-house role will be responsible for

identifying, researching, and engaging decision-makers in the healthcare industry to support our sales and marketing goals. 



The ideal candidate has experience in
 outreach, understands hospital industry dynamics, and is capable of creating and executing campaigns that align with our brand voice while building trust and opening conversations with qualified prospects. 



 



???? Key Responsibilities: 



Identify and build lists of verified hospital contacts based on our target audience (specific roles, titles, and regions). 

Conduct manual research to validate contact information and relevance. 

Develop tailored outreach messaging based on pain points and campaign objectives. 

Execute
 campaigns using platforms like SendGrid (aligned with Odoo). 

Monitor, manage, and respond to lead replies to nurture them through the pipeline. 

Maintain a consistent tone and messaging aligned with the Cube Care brand. 

Track campaign performance and report on lead quality, objections, and interest. 

Collaborate with sales and marketing to refine messaging and target segments. 

Ensure compliance with
 marketing best practices to avoid blacklisting, especially with healthcare servers. 

 



???? Requirements: 



Proven experience in lead generation, sales development, or
 outreach (healthcare industry preferred). 

Strong research skills and attention to detail. 

Familiarity with tools like SendGrid, Odoo (or similar CRM) 

Clear, persuasive written communication skills. 

Ability to work independently and manage time effectively. 

Comfortable handling large data lists and segmenting based on target criteria. 

 



???? Preferred: 



Prior experience generating leads within hospitals or the healthcare industry. 

Experience integrating CRM data for outreach and reporting. 







System Requirements:



Computer Processor: Minimum 5th generation Intel i5 processor or equivalent

Computer Memory/RAM: Minimum 4.00 GB

Computer Operating System: Windows 10 or Mac OSX - No Linux, Unix, or any operating system other than what is required.

Internet Speed: Running on a 5.0 MBPS plan or higher (Both primary and backup) - If your backup connection cannot serve as your primary connection, that does not qualify as a backup connection

REQUIRED Headset: Noise-cancelling headset connected via USB port

REQUIRED WebCam: At least 3 megapixels capable of 720p recording

title: Transaction Coordinator (WFH)
description:
We are looking for a highly organized and detail-oriented Real Estate Admin / Transaction Coordinator to join our team. The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience coordinating real estate transactions in California, along with strong administrative skills and familiarity with real estate CRMs and platforms. This role is critical in ensuring smooth transactions from contract to closing.



Applicants must attach a RESUME LINK when applying. Incomplete applications will not be considered.



Key Responsibilities:



-Manage real estate transactions from contract to closing, ensuring all paperwork is completed accurately and on time.

-Coordinate with California-based realtors, buyers, sellers, lenders, escrow, and title companies to ensure smooth and compliant transactions.

-Maintain and update CRM tools such as Follow Up Boss, Zillow, and other real estate platforms to track leads, clients, and transaction status.

-Handle document management, compliance checks, and critical deadline tracking to avoid delays or issues.

-Provide timely client follow-ups, appointment scheduling, and professional
 correspondence.

-Assist with listing coordination, including uploading property details, marketing materials, and MLS updates.

-Generate transaction reports and maintain accurate records for auditing and reference purposes.



Qualifications:



-Proven experience as a Real Estate Transaction Coordinator or Admin, specifically handling California transactions.

-Strong knowledge of California real estate processes, timelines, and compliance requirements.

-Proficient in CRM tools such as Follow Up Boss, Zillow, and other real estate platforms.

-Must submit a resume and portfolio showcasing relevant real estate experience.

-Excellent organizational skills and strong attention to detail.

-Ability to work night shift (US time zone).

-Strong communication skills and ability to multitask in a fast-paced environment.

-Work from home setup with a reliable device and stable internet connection.

title: Social Media Manager/Admin Real Estate (WFH)
description:
Social Media Manager – Real Estate

title: Recruiter (Global Talent – High Volume Screening)
description:
Recruiter (Global Talent – High Volume Screening) 



Compensation

•	$
USD per month (base salary)

•	Performance bonus: up to $150 USD monthly (based on results)



Terms

•	Monday–Friday: 12:00 PM – 9:00 PM (CET)

•	Weekends off

•	13th Salary (after one year)

•	Paid holidays: Christmas, New Year, Easter

•	5 days PTO



About the Role 



•	We’re looking for a focused and reliable Recruiter to support our global hiring efforts.

•	 This is a high-volume screening role, where you’ll conduct short, structured interviews (up to 15 minutes) and maintain a steady pipeline of candidates. 

•	Your workday is 9 hours (including a 30-minute break), with approximately 8.5 hours dedicated to interviews and related tasks (calls and notes).

•	 Your role is to consistently fill your calendar with screening interviews, conduct them, and document outcomes. 

•	You will spend a large part of your day on back-to-back calls, speaking with candidates from different countries and backgrounds. 

•	You’ll work closely with the People & Talent Lead, who manages hiring decisions - your role is to ensure consistency, organization, and high-quality screening. 

•	Importantly, you will not be responsible for sourcing or reviewing applications - this part of the process is handled by a separate team, allowing you to fully focus on interviews and candidate screening.

•	 This is a highly structured, output-driven role, where consistency and daily volume are key to success. 



What You’ll Be Doing 



•	Conducting high-volume screening interviews (max. 15 minutes per call)

•	 Keeping your calendar consistently filled with scheduled interviews

•	 Handling back-to-back calls throughout the day

•	 Following a structured interview process

•	 Preparing clear and accurate notes after each interview

•	 Updating candidate information in internal systems

•	Working closely with the People & Talent Lead



Performance Expectations 



•	Conduct ~18–22 interviews per day

•	Maintain a consistently filled interview calendar during working hours

•	Stay focused and consistent during high call volumes

•	Provide clear and structured notes after each interview

•	Maintain accurate candidate tracking



Who This Role Is NOT For

 

This role may not be a good fit if you:

•	Prefer long, in-depth interviews

•	Struggle with repetitive tasks or high call volume

•	Need a highly flexible or unstructured workday

•	Prefer making final hiring decisions independently



Who We’re Looking For 



•	2–3+ years of recruitment or HR experience

•	 Comfortable with high-volume, structured work 

•	Able to handle multiple calls daily without losing focus

•	Organized, consistent, and reliable

•	Strong English communication skills

•	Self-driven with a strong sense of responsibility



Nice to have: 



•	Experience with international recruitment (APAC / Europe)

•	High-volume hiring experience



Why Join Us 



•	35+ years of stability - an established, trusted company

•	Structured, supportive team environment

•	Work with a globally recognized luxury brand (3,000+ 5-star reviews)

•	Clear expectations and performance-based bonuses

•	Real impact on company growth



About Us




 is a leading online jeweler based in Boynton Beach, Florida.

For over 35 years, we’ve helped customers worldwide find the perfect diamond, engagement ring, or fine jewelry piece - earning thousands of 5-star reviews along the way.



Important note: Please include a copy of your resume in your application.

title: Meta Ads Video Editor for a 7+ Figure E-Commerce Brand
description:
We're looking for an experienced Video Editor for a long-term collaboration — with growing compensation and more responsibility as you prove yourself.



About us:

We're a 7-figure e-commerce brand selling in the German, Austrian, and Swiss market via Meta Ads. We're scaling aggressively and need a reliable editor who can keep up with our creative output.



What's in it for you:

This isn't just an editing gig. You'll get exclusive behind-the-scenes access to how a 7-figure e-com brand runs its creative strategy. You'll learn professional editing workflows built for performance marketing, and you'll become a core part of our team — not a freelancer we forget about. If you're serious about growing your skills in direct response and e-commerce, this is the environment to do it.



What you need to bring:

- Proven experience editing Direct Response ads (UGC-style ads AND VSLs)

- Strong understanding of performance marketing creative (Meta Ads)

- Proficiency in Adobe Premiere and/or CapCut

- Experience with AI tools: Higgsfield, HeyGen, Sora, Veo3 for AI UGC generation

- Strong ability to independently source B-roll content from social media (TikTok, Instagram, YouTube) — this is a core part of the role, not a side task

- Independent, fast workflow — minimum 2 finished videos per day

- Quick implementation of feedback without back and forth



Your responsibilities:

- Editing UGC-style ads (30–90 seconds) and VSLs (3–7 minutes)

- Creating variants and iterations based on creative briefings and feedback

- Sourcing relevant B-roll and footage from social media platforms on your own

- Generating and prompting AI UGC creators (Higgsfield, HeyGen, Sora, Veo3)



Compensation:

$800/month fixed. Compensation increases with proven quality, speed, and reliability. We reward performance, not just availability.



Please don't apply if you:

- Have no experience with Direct Response video ads

- Are a beginner in video editing

- Have never worked on performance creative for Meta Ads

- Have no e-commerce work in your portfolio — applicants without e-commerce experience will be ignored



We start with a paid test task — no free trial work.



Interested? Send me:

- Your portfolio (ideally with KPIs or performance results)

- Your average editing speed per video

- Examples of your AI prompting work

- Any performance ads you've already edited

- Your experience: which brands or projects you've worked with in this space



To confirm you've read this post: include the word "Tree" in your message, and in one sentence tell me which of the listed responsibilities you're strongest at and why. Anyone who does not follow these two steps will be ignored.

title: Appraisal Virtual Assistant
description:
Real estate appraisal is one of the most precise, detail-driven professions there is. Every number matters. Every comp selection tells a story. Every report reflects the integrity of the appraiser whose name is on it.



We are looking for a Real Estate Appraisal VA who understands that — someone who brings genuine expertise, a commitment to accuracy, and the kind of consistency that makes a long-term partnership work. This is not a role for someone learning appraisal from scratch. This is a role for someone who already knows it.



Your Core Responsibilities

-    Take assignments from intake to near-complete draft using Total by À La Mode

-    Pull and evaluate comparable sales — with a true understanding of comp selection, not just comp pulling

-    Produce residential appraisal report forms (1004, 1073, and related types)

-    Support commercial appraisal production when assigned

-    Keep work files organized, accurate, and audit-ready

-    Track assignments and deadlines with consistency

-    Handle administrative support tasks as the role evolves

-    Treat all appraisal data with the confidentiality it requires — USPAP compliance is non-negotiable



We're Looking for Someone Who

-    Has real, hands-on experience inside Total by À La Mode — MUST

-    Understands the distinction between pulling comps and selecting comps — MUST

-    Has worked as an appraisal VA for a US-licensed appraiser — MUST

-    Knows what USPAP confidentiality means and applies it without being asked — MUST

-    Can work US Central Time hours from the Philippines — MUST

-    Communicates clearly and professionally in English — MUST

-    Takes ownership of their work and executes with precision and reliability — MUST

-    Is willing to sign an NDA before starting — MUST



Bonus Points For

-    Experience across both residential AND commercial appraisal forms — this is a significant differentiator

-    Experience supporting a solo or independent appraiser

-    Familiarity with US MLS platforms



Why This Role Matters

The appraiser you will support handles both residential and commercial assignments — a combination that demands a high level of adaptability and expertise. When the commercial market picks up 
ntum, the volume of work will grow significantly. The VA who comes on now will be positioned to grow alongside that.



Why You'll Love Working Here

-    A full-time, dedicated role built for the long term — not a contract, not a trial

-    Genuine investment in finding the right person and keeping them

-    Work that requires real expertise — your skills will be put to meaningful use

-    A collaborative working relationship built on trust and professional respect



If precision, expertise, and long-term stability matter to you — apply now. We are ready for the right partnership.

title: SDR
description:
ABOUT TRUBUILT AI

TruBuilt AI is a Canadian AI automation agency helping contractors, trades businesses, dental offices, and chiropractors automate their lead generation and follow-up systems. We build done-for-you workflows that find qualified leads, reach out automatically, and fill our clients' pipelines — without them lifting a finger.

We are growing fast and looking for a driven, personable sales representative to help us book discovery calls with business owners across Canada.

THE ROLE

This is a commission-based, remote sales position. Your primary job is to call Canadian business owners, introduce TruBuilt AI's services, and book 20-minute discovery/demo calls for our Founder.

You will be provided with:



A proven, tested call script

A lead list of targeted prospects

Full training on our services and workflow

Ongoing support and coaching



This role is perfect for someone who is hungry, self-motivated, and wants unlimited earning potential based on their own effort. Ultimately with the right candidate and some proven success this could work into a base salary + commission full-time position.

WHAT YOU'LL DO



Make outbound calls to Canadian business owners (contractors, electricians, dental offices, chiropractors, landscapers)

Follow a provided script — warm, conversational, not aggressive

Book 20-minute discovery/demo calls on behalf of the Founder

Log all call activity and outcomes in our CRM (HubSpot)

Provide daily call summaries and feedback on common objections

Communicate professionally via
 and messaging tools



COMPENSATION



$150 USD commission per closed/signed client (Founder closes all deals on demo calls)

Future structure being developed: bonus per booked demo once revenue targets are met

Unlimited earning potential — the more you book, the more you earn. WITH POTENTIAL to move into a base + commission after proven record of bookings. 1-2 weeks.

Top performers booking 8-10 demos per week with a 30% close rate could earn $1,200-$1,800 USD monthly — with structured bonuses being added as revenue targets are hit



REQUIREMENTS — MUST HAVE



Excellent spoken English — clear, professional, and confident on the phone

Previous call center, sales, or SDR experience — minimum 1 year

Strong technical computer knowledge — comfortable with CRMs, automation tools, AI-driven software

Familiarity with AI and automation concepts — you don't need to build workflows but you must understand and speak confidently about what automation does for businesses

Reliable internet connection and quality headset/microphone

Self-motivated and results-driven — this is commission based, your income reflects your effort

Available during Canadian business hours — primarily 9am-5pm CST (11pm-7am PHT) OR flexible morning PHT hours



NICE TO HAVE



Experience selling SaaS, tech, or digital marketing services

Familiarity with n8n, HubSpot, or similar tools

Experience calling Canadian or North American businesses specifically



WHAT MAKES THIS OPPORTUNITY GREAT



Work fully remote from home

Flexible schedule within Canadian business hours

Be part of a fast-growing AI company at ground level

Direct access to the Founder — you're not a number here

As the company scales, so does your compensation

Ground floor opportunity — top performers will be considered for expanded roles



HOW TO APPLY

Please send the following to 
 with subject line "SDR Application — [Your Name]":



A voice recording (60-90 seconds) introducing yourself and explaining why you're a great fit — this is mandatory, applications without voice recordings will not be considered

Your resume or work history — especially any sales or call center experience

A brief answer to this question: "How would you explain AI automation to a plumber who has never heard of it?"



A NOTE FROM THE FOUNDER

"I'm looking for someone who takes pride in their work, communicates honestly, and wants to grow with a company that's going somewhere. If you're the kind of person who shows up every day, follows through, and genuinely enjoys talking to people — we're going to get along great. This is a ground floor opportunity and I intend to reward the right person well as we grow."

— Greg Bates, Founder | TruBuilt AI

title: Digital Operations Specialist
description:
We are looking for someone with a proven track record of helping entrepreneurs grow their businesses through execution and measurable results. You are a strong thinker and problem-solver who can take ideas from A to Z and turn them into action independently.



This role requires high ownership, clear communication, and a proactive mindset. You don’t wait for instructions — you actively follow up on tasks, clarify priorities, and make sure nothing is delayed or left unclear.



You should be able to think ahead, work independently, and consistently move work forward with minimal supervision. This includes quickly understanding existing workflows and improving them where possible.



This role includes both recurring operational tasks and flexible project-based work depending on business priorities and active initiatives.



Position Details

• Employment Type: Full-Time

• Work Schedule: Monday – Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM ET

• Hours: 40 hours per week



Benefits

• $960 USD/month ($6 per hour)

• 13th-Month Pay

• Paid Time Off

• Weekends Off

• Benefits allowance after 6 months ($80/month)



Core Profile

• Demonstrated ability to support entrepreneurs in growing and scaling their businesses through execution and outcomes

• Self-starter with strong initiative and problem-solving ability

• Fast and reliable execution with strong follow-through

• Structured thinker who can build, improve, and manage systems independently

• Comfortable taking ownership from start to finish with minimal supervision

• Proactive communicator who provides clear and timely updates

• Strong ability to work with ambiguity while still moving tasks forward

• Able to take initiative in managing communication flow, including following up on priorities and ensuring clarity without needing reminders



AI & Digital Competency

• Proficient in AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Higgsfield, etc.)

• Able to turn AI outputs into clear, brand-aligned content

• Comfortable creating simple AI workflows and prompt templates



Operations & Systems

• Strong G-Suite skills (Sheets, Drive organization, Docs, workflow management)

• Good digital file organization and naming discipline

• Ability to create SOPs and improve workflows

• Comfortable managing multiple ongoing tasks and projects



Content & Marketing

• Strong video editing skills (short-form content, reels, clean edits, captions, consistent branding)

• Ability to support social media growth and content execution

• Understanding of branding and audience engagement

• Please include the word “SONDER” in the subject line



Additionally:

• Preferably has some design ability and understands aesthetic consistency. Can look at older content and pieces we have created and evolve that so the new piece feels on-brand and fits seamlessly with the aesthetic.



Required Qualifications

• Strong organizational and communication skills

• Experience in operations, administration, or workflow support

• Self-directed and able to work with minimal supervision

• Reliable device and internet connection



Technical Requirement

• Access to a reliable Apple device



Preferred

• Background in digital operations or system building



To Apply

• Send your resume and portfolio

• Screenshot showing your computer specs and internet speed.

• Answer: “Why are you a good fit for this role?”

title: Junior Backend Engineer (Node.js or Python)
description:
Junior Backend Engineer (Node.js / Python)



Location: Remote (Company based in Taiwan)



? About Us - DI Strategy Group?

Based in Taiwan, we are a digital growth and technology team dedicated to integrating branding, web traffic, and sales conversions into scalable digital systems. Our team consists of experts in marketing strategy, UX design, web development, and AI Workflows.



Our core members have driven significant growth for startups and scaling businesses—including scaling organic traffic from 0 to 40,000/month and building automated sales systems that generate million-level revenues.



We offer comprehensive services ranging from Web Development and SEO Optimization to Ad Campaign Management and AI Workflow Integration. We aim to build long-term, consultant-level partnerships with our clients to ensure continuous growth.



? The Role ?

We are looking for a dedicated Junior Backend Engineer with 1-2 years of experience to join our remote team. In this role, you will work for 5 hours a day, assisting in the web applications, internal side projects (e.g., mobile apps), and AI tool integrations.

We will connect you as soon as possible.

title: High converting social media ads
description:
OVERVIEW:



At Blue Zone Pets, we believe the single biggest lever you have over your dog's health is what you put in their bowl. We're a pet nutrition brand built around one mission: their longest life, back in your hands. Our food is 80% real meat, dried below 40°C to lock in maximum nutrients, with zero fillers, zero additives — just ingredients you can actually read and trust. We're building a brand that dog owners genuinely believe in, backed by a 4.6 Trustpilot rating and a growing community of owners who've seen the difference real nutrition makes. We're still early, moving fast, and looking for people who want to build something that matters. Join us as a Graphic Designer and help us become the standard for how dogs should be fed.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

1. Design high-performing creatives, static ads, and branded assets that are on-brand and built to convert — owning the visual output from concept to final file.

2. Use AI generation tools to produce raw assets, then refine them with enhancement tools (Magnific AI, Topaz, Photoshop AI) until quality is indistinguishable from a professional shoot.

3. Proactively pitch new content ideas, visual formats, and workflow improvements — you don't wait for briefs, you spot opportunities and ship.



REQUIREMENTS:

1. A sharp-eyed designer with deep command of layout, typography, colour, and composition — highly proficient in Figma (primary) and Adobe Creative Suite.

2. Skilled at AI-assisted design: you use generative tools to create base assets and enhancement tools to push them to production quality. One render is never your final output.

3. Self-managing, organised, and deadline-driven — you don't need hand-holding. You see what needs doing and do it.

4. A quick learner who adapts fast to new tools and workflows; experience with Notion for project management, WhatsApp for daily communication, and openness to tools like Gather for virtual collaboration as we scale.

5. Genuinely excited about what we're building at Blue Zone — you care about quality, you care about pets, and you want to be part of a brand that's changing how people think about dog nutrition.



WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT FROM US:

- A small, ambitious team where your work has direct impact — no layers, no bureaucracy, just ownership and 
ntum.

- A culture that rewards initiative. If you spot an opportunity and act on it, we'll notice.

- Real growth potential — we're scaling quickly, and the people who join now will shape how this company operates as it grows.

- Founders who are hands-on, transparent, and genuinely invested in your development — not just your output.



COMPENSATION:

- Part-time position. Monthly creative sprints

- Competitive rate based on experience and qualifications. Per project basis, $10 per project ? $300 p/m



APPLICATION PROCESS:

Here's how to apply:



Fill out this form ? Apply here: 
/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfpKsPzRTlRlBchmQGnBe44Ny5yJKk-vDUbNtUykxA_Ezm2aQ/viewform?usp=header



Only completed applications will be considered.



Once you've submitted, reply here with the subject line: "PAW"



We're looking forward to hearing from you. If you're the right fit, you'll be joining a team that's building something dogs (and their owners) actually deserve.



Best regards,

Dean

Co-founder of Blue Zone Pets

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

1. Design high-performing creatives, static ads, and branded assets that are on-brand and built to convert — owning the visual output from concept to final file.

2. Use AI generation tools to produce raw assets, then refine them with enhancement tools (Magnific AI, Topaz, Photoshop AI) until quality is indistinguishable from a professional shoot.

3. Proactively pitch new content ideas, visual formats, and workflow improvements — you don't wait for briefs, you spot opportunities and ship.



REQUIREMENTS:

1. A sharp-eyed designer with deep command of layout, typography, colour, and composition — highly proficient in Figma (primary) and Adobe Creative Suite.

2. Skilled at AI-assisted design: you use generative tools to create base assets and enhancement tools to push them to production quality. One render is never your final output.

3. Self-managing, organised, and deadline-driven — you don't need hand-holding. You see what needs doing and do it.

4. A quick learner who adapts fast to new tools and workflows; experience with Notion for project management, WhatsApp for daily communication, and openness to tools like Gather for virtual collaboration as we scale.

5. Genuinely excited about what we're building at Blue Zone — you care about quality, you care about pets, and you want to be part of a brand that's changing how people think about dog nutrition.



WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT FROM US:

- A small, ambitious team where your work has direct impact — no layers, no bureaucracy, just ownership and 
ntum.

- A culture that rewards initiative. If you spot an opportunity and act on it, we'll notice.

- Real growth potential — we're scaling quickly, and the people who join now will shape how this company operates as it grows.

- Founders who are hands-on, transparent, and genuinely invested in your development — not just your output.



COMPENSATION:

- Part-time position. Monthly creative sprints

- Competitive rate based on experience and qualifications. Per project basis, $20 per project ? $600 p/m

/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfpKsPzRTlRlBchmQGnBe44Ny5yJKk-vDUbNtUykxA_Ezm2aQ/viewform?usp=header

title: GHL Expert & SEO Specialist (50/50 Profit Sharing Partnership)
description:
PLEASE READ CAREFULLY BEFORE APPLYING



Do you want to build long-term passive income instead of just working hourly?



I am looking for an expert GoHighLevel (GHL) Web Developer and SEO Specialist to partner with me in a "Rank and Rent" business model.



What is Rank and Rent?

The goal is to build "Digital Real Estate." We build high-quality websites, optimize them for SEO, and rank them on the first page of Google. Once the websites start generating leads (usually in 3–6 months), we rent the websites to U.S.-based business owners or sell them the leads.



This is a long-term partnership. While it takes time to rank, the reward is passive income for both of us once the revenue starts coming in.



The Partnership Split:

This is NOT an hourly job. This is a high-commission partnership.



You will receive 50% of the net profit from every website you build and manage.



You will have full transparency to track the leads and the money earned from your specific sites.





My Role (The Business Owner):

1. Set up the U.S. Company (LLC) and Business Bank Account.

2. Provide all software, subscriptions, and tools needed for operations.

3. Find and close deals with U.S. companies to rent our sites or buy our leads.

4. Manage all bookkeeping and ensure you are paid your 50% share on time.



Your Role (The Developer/SEO Specialist):

1. Build high-converting, SEO-optimized websites on GoHighLevel.

2. Set up all necessary automations within GHL.

3. Perform SEO audits and maintenance to keep the websites ranking high.

4. Manage the technical side of the lead generation for the businesses we partner with.



Requirements:

1. Expert knowledge of GoHighLevel (GHL).

2. Proven experience in SEO (Search Engine Optimization).

3. A "Delayed Gratification" mindset—you understand that SEO takes 3–6 months, but the long-term passive income is worth the wait.

4. Strong communication skills and honesty.



How to Apply:

If you have never heard of this business model, please watch this video to understand the strategy before applying: 



To apply, please send a message with:

1. Your experience with GoHighLevel and SEO.

2. Any websites you have ranked on Google in the past.

3. Why you are interested in a 50/50 profit-sharing partnership rather than an hourly wage.



PS: Payments will be made via Wise or Paypal every month. You will have a live dashboard to see exactly how many leads are generated and what the profit is for the sites you manage.

CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.



About Zack Miller

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.

Monday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Tuesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Wednesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Thursday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

- Implement A/B tests in intelligems for product price tests, shipping price tests, theme tests, landing page tests, and more. 

- Research new ideas for direct response content marketing strategies.

- Apply a process-first mentality and provide feedback to help further develop our operating systems.



Required Experience & Education

title: Bookkeeper/Accountant
description:
Position Overview

Voracious Mind LLC is seeking a detail-oriented and experienced Bookkeeper to manage our financial records. In addition to our core business operations, Voracious Mind LLC works in affiliation with a nonprofit organization. The selected candidate will assist with bookkeeping for both entities and must understand nonprofit accounting principles and financial frameworks.

A primary focus of this role will be establishing and maintaining clear, compliant Charts of Accounts (COA) that accurately reflect the unique financial structures of both a standard LLC and an affiliated nonprofit organization. The ideal candidate will possess a deep understanding of fund accounting, non-profit financial principles, and the ability to maintain strict separation of books between the two entities.

Key Responsibilities

Chart of Accounts Setup & Management

•Establish and manage a Chart of Accounts for Voracious Mind LLC, reflecting standard business operations.

•Design, implement, and maintain a customized Chart of Accounts for the affiliated nonprofit organization, ensuring terminology and structure align with nonprofit financial frameworks (e.g., categorizing income as contributions or donations rather than sales).

•Ensure the structural integrity of both financial systems to facilitate accurate reporting and compliance.

Bookkeeping & Reconciliation

•Perform regular (weekly/monthly) reconciliation of bank accounts, credit cards, and other financial accounts for both Voracious Mind LLC and the affiliated nonprofit.

•Accurately add, categorize, and review line items for all incoming and outgoing transactions.

•Maintain strict financial boundaries between the LLC and the nonprofit entity, ensuring no commingling of funds and proper documentation of any inter-entity transfers or shared expenses.

•Track and record contributions and financial adjustments accurately.

Financial Reporting & Compliance Support

•Generate monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements (Balance Sheet, Profit & Loss, Statement of Cash Flows) for both entities.

•Provide clear financial visibility to organizational leadership to support mission-driven decision-making.

•Assist in preparing financial records for annual reviews, tax filings (for the LLC), and maintaining internal compliance documentation for the nonprofit organization.

Qualifications & Experience

•Experience: Minimum of 3–5 years of bookkeeping or accounting experience.

•Non-Profit Expertise: Prior experience working with nonprofit organizations and understanding of fund accounting is required.

•Technical Skills: Proficiency in standard accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks Online, Xero) and advanced spreadsheet skills (Excel/Google Sheets).

•Attention to Detail: Exceptional accuracy in data entry, line-item categorization, and reconciliation.

•Confidentiality: Ability to handle sensitive financial information with the utmost discretion and integrity.

•Entity Management: Proven ability to manage books for multiple related entities while maintaining strict financial separation.

Application Process

To apply for this position, please fill and submit this PHASE 1 applicant form below, and our team will review your application and will reach out to you with next steps.

- 3D Animation & Motion: Design, texture, and animate 3D assets that maintain physical accuracy and high visual fidelity.

- AI-Enhanced Production: Leverage advanced AI tools (Midjourney, Stable Diffusion, Runway, etc.) to accelerate workflows and generate photorealistic base assets or textures.

- Next-Gen Video Creation: Produce photorealistic video content, integrating live-action feel with CGI or AI-generated elements.

- Brand Evolution: Translate complex marketing strategies into cohesive, high-impact visual assets across digital platforms.



Technical Requirements

- Adobe Creative Suite: Expert-level mastery of Photoshop, After Effects, and Premiere Pro.

- 3D Software: Advanced proficiency in Blender, Cinema 4D, or Unreal Engine.

- AI Implementation: Proven experience in prompting and refining Generative AI for professional-grade, photorealistic outputs.





Application Requirement

A portfolio or showreel is mandatory for consideration. Your samples must specifically demonstrate:

- Photorealistic 3D or AI-generated content.

- Advanced Photoshop compositing.

- High-fidelity 3D animations.



To Apply: Please submit your resume and a link to your digital portfolio. Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.

title: Walmart Advertising Specialist (Walmart Connect)
description:
We are seeking an experienced Walmart Advertising Specialist (Walmart Connect) to manage and scale advertising campaigns on Walmart Marketplace. This role focuses on driving profitable growth through structured campaign management, performance optimization, and strategic advertising initiatives.



The ideal candidate has hands-on experience with Walmart Connect, understands Walmart’s advertising ecosystem, and can independently manage campaigns while continuously improving ROAS and overall marketplace performance. This role may be structured as part-time or full-time depending on experience.



Responsibilities:



Manage and optimize Walmart Connect advertising campaigns across the Walmart Marketplace

Conduct keyword research and competitor analysis to identify growth opportunities

Identify new advertising opportunities to expand reach and increase revenue

Collaborate with internal teams to align advertising strategy with product catalog and promotions

Requirements:

Strong understanding of Walmart advertising structure, campaign setup, and algorithm behavior

Experience managing ROAS, ACOS, and profitability-focused advertising strategies

Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret campaign data and performance trends

Ability to work independently and manage campaigns end-to-end

Experience managing Amazon PPC campaigns preferred

Familiarity with advertising tools such as Pacvue, Perpetua, Teikametrics, or similar platforms preferred

Experience working with growing marketplace or e-commerce brands preferred
